Fellow Conservative,

Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart.

I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5eedff8925234e6f9d3cf717d4de771e&_e=2uxP-2ZaLeO7UOOn23vwxIVPWPGDICdp9SR7ENbDy8mZHqovWdBJhV_mwEMlhik3kPkRCmZ5t6pFsR7AjUj0TceRWeykBZzI7XFaW0nwIFe0ArDdefOuiRCzDmoVgNj1V_BLw8bWbxvk21q-v-T6_7gVDvN1TaiQ-hu_TQ-ZoLoqADdNkPf8a1j3j1LebLixKSkvQWbnKWy9dZzKFwKShS_uRxlkXiYGG6jbYZ6X0d4QeqDqdEmtFlk8jlnw0wIIYF_A8DvNBdyJlE0kwyyulDWtttlJuVuxe1ntiE4rhpsDiMLeomIb2M0cbiNkSIu1GohoCLBsdNt5h6Wz5bJVw2ucaWNsnUiSGUPOUrLimZq63C3VqEhuu_tGWdUpTYGu0RvM2I5jjJiJE1D23Yfv8vnwkTYEd9xlX4xZpub2MQn99VpyqDIQClItwFBpzACtGUIVlXFfOwpeGTIX038VPg%3D%3D)
For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend.

In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. **[Now in my campaign for the U.S. Senate, I'm going to use 34 to rally support for our shared conservative values as I work to defeat the liberal Democrat I'm running to unseat.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5eedff8925234e6f9d3cf717d4de771e&_e=2uxP-2ZaLeO7UOOn23vwxIVPWPGDICdp9SR7ENbDy8mZHqovWdBJhV_mwEMlhik3kPkRCmZ5t6pFsR7AjUj0TceRWeykBZzI7XFaW0nwIFe0ArDdefOuiRCzDmoVgNj1V_BLw8bWbxvk21q-v-T6_7gVDvN1TaiQ-hu_TQ-ZoLoqADdNkPf8a1j3j1LebLixKSkvQWbnKWy9dZzKFwKShS_uRxlkXiYGG6jbYZ6X0d5FrSE-BvcUkNZ3bZFQjFTOv0JaDGizl22JS-j1p3wqfYfYDdIC-DmF3pJslOo_sq-FlCtzrH0h1NnM4JYfb720MyO7ohcswv9f-yBGApoyjFtLZfNjsQEOYFZSlE8Bp6FWvYVw4h8yMrpt7kI6laYWVeVBy-xWhaXRbyEhdXfzXwYFzpXZOrLrVbmyrKvut_58RpsDzCgonsjnV9MKQ0lDvmErI0yPvEkspynRcR7bYw%3D%3D)**

My opponent has amassed a war chest of over **TEN MILLION DOLLARS.** If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field.

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=5eedff8925234e6f9d3cf717d4de771e&_e=2uxP-2ZaLeO7UOOn23vwxIVPWPGDICdp9SR7ENbDy8mZHqovWdBJhV_mwEMlhik3kPkRCmZ5t6pFsR7AjUj0TceRWeykBZzI7XFaW0nwIFe0ArDdefOuiRCzDmoVgNj1V_BLw8bWbxvk21q-v-T6_7gVDvN1TaiQ-hu_TQ-ZoLoqADdNkPf8a1j3j1LebLixKSkvQWbnKWy9dZzKFwKShS_uRxlkXiYGG6jbYZ6X0d6yu79-90AwEflEk_o8832HOCEbbepmZJrW5Sq5_YyJ837-g_LWkpzkRL7SytAiTvX9fMk2ZyOQ_upBEikw7ptsGzPfSe1zx7OlqRhlW060UTB7H8iNnxKysxxXwT9a3rgWLvARNwvA1pGHFk6z_K_OS-QixiDVOv8Q0QOdURgFKoaNg5tiou7x79ngCofbII9ZC7y-VOF242_KCmszlhlOdeETGwyAYjkbCMYm0ou2tw%3D%3D)
I hope that as we move forward together in this campaign, you'll come to associate the number 34 with victory, as I have over my career.

We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to return a Republican majority to the Senate and _actually_ build a better America for hard-working families.

My opponent and national Democrats are leading the nation down the wrong path, undoing some of the great work Republicans have done in the last few years.

clean_body: I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I’ve switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campai I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I've switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campaign. | Fellow Conservative, Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart. I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys. For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend. In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. My opponent has amassed a war chest of over TEN MILLION DOLLARS. If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field. I hope that as we move forward together in this campaign, you'll come to associate the number 34 with victory, as I have over my career. We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to return a Republican majority to the Senate and actually build a better America for hard-working families. My opponent and national Democrats are leading the nation down the wrong path, undoing some of the great work Republicans have done in the last few years. And the thing is, millions of liberals are making donations to their campaigns because Democrats are spinning tales of a eutopia that they can't deliver now - or ever - despite throwing TRILLIONS of dollars to fix issues they don't understand. I have what it takes to WIN the tough fights, The future of Georgia and our country depends on what conservatives, like yourself, do today. The Senate majority may come down to who wins in Georgia, so I hope you will consider supporting my campaign. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. I hope to hear from you soon. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. As important as the money is, I also want to know you're with me. A donation of any amount will let me know you're on Team Herschel. Thanks so much. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Fellow patriot,

How can I be so sure of this? name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: I Stand For Freedom
body:
| | | | President Biden announced his most unconstitutional act of federal overreach to date.
---
---
Dear Peter,
President Biden recently announced his most unconstitutional act of federal overreach to date. He is seeking to mandate large employers to vaccinate their employees.
This is wild. We all know that the federal government has no such authority to issue this mandate.
You know it, I know it, and even President Biden knows it.
Yet here Biden goes again, refusing to adhere to the rule of law and our Constitution. Biden doesn’t seem to care at all about following the law.
I know so many of you have reached out to us asking about how my office plans to respond. I am working tirelessly to defend your rights and stand for your freedom. Indeed, I fully expect to be in court challenging this federal overreach shortly.

clean_body: | | | | President Biden announced his most unconstitutional act of federal overreach to date. Dear Peter, President Biden recently announced his most unconstitutional act of federal overreach to date. He is seeking to mandate large employers to vaccinate their employees. This is wild. We all know that the federal government has no such authority to issue this mandate. You know it, I know it, and even President Biden knows it. Yet here Biden goes again, refusing to adhere to the rule of law and our Constitution. Biden doesn’t seem to care at all about following the law. I know so many of you have reached out to us asking about how my office plans to respond. I am working tirelessly to defend your rights and stand for your freedom. Indeed, I fully expect to be in court challenging this federal overreach shortly. | | | | | | | | Remember, it was Benjamin Franklin who once said, "Those who give up freedom for safety deserve neither." Mountaineers and Americans are always free, Mr. President. This is about freedom and respecting our Constitution. We are coming for you in Court. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Our rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
A big victory, and a big step back Peter,Our rights and our freedoms are [worth fighting for.](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cjhurtd-ahkdjtlkr-r/)We saw proof of that in the past week - _twice._ First, the withdrawal of anti-gun David Chipman as the nominee for the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms (ATF), which was a MAJOR victory for our gun rights. But we know this battle isn't over.Then, we watched Joe Biden stand before the cameras and launch an **invasive, unconstitutional vaccine mandate** in a major rollback for our personal freedoms. **Will you step up and join me in fighting for our rights as Americans?** [CLICK HERE - TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY! >>>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cjhurtd-ahkdjtlkr-y/) **I have ALWAYS stood tall for our personal liberties in Congress - but I can't say the same for the majority Democrats.**That's why we need to TAKE BACK the majority to use our VOTE and our voice to stop Biden and the Democrats from trampling our rights. Throughout my time in public office, I have always been a pro-business, pro-freedom leader, and I refuse to back down when our rights are at stake.We just saw it twice. This is a battle we can't afford to lose.**[Can I count on you to step up and join me at this huge moment for our rights?](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cjhurtd-ahkdjtlkr-j/)** [Back Scott Fitzgerald and Stand Up For Our Rights](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cjhurtd-ahkdjtlkr-t/) Thanks,Scott Fitzgerald
Congressman [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cjhurtd-ahkdjtlkr-i/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cjhurtd-ahkdjtlkr-k/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-cjhurtd-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-u) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-cjhurtd-ahkdjtlkr-o/)
---

| Hello, Thank you for signing up to join us at the protest tomorrow.
Please note that our staging location has changed as the President's event site has changed. The President's event will now take place at the NREL Flatirons Campus in Arvada, CO.
The address for that location is 19001 W 119th Ave, Arvada, CO 80007. Protest staging will take place just to the east of NREL Flatirons on the north side of 120th Ave as depicted below.
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DgloHGoppKwdLNCLEs82TvcC4n_7apZvDlj5pao3z2Va0lhmA636pTeByCfWyEvXywjhTug0qJWoshJ0aO08pX4XH1XCluyvfA--p6HNiuwrSg_bHlVQZd-uY2ZkGGHSL96zns2PHXS_ecKgXIIYsbsBGNZj42Tc2ioDfbBqH5FSHCyrNMS2mWKcaB5OHn1s7u3DTDLakZuw9taDwSW6hC7VTq_IzIV2&c=K5V1SyWiXLaJXgPaUGDjnUzH0gZOsFZZLG2NZQq8v5NN595g6opvqg==&ch=DEJqwJLA0XbGuKFUYdamKXJWii5o8Ul2IVAnXdyUm8uIUb7-XxJkaA==)
---
Please avoid parking on the sides of 120th Ave as you are will be impeding traffic and therefore are at risk of being towed or ticketed.
Please remember that this is a peaceful protest and we are not here to engage in any illegal or mischievous activities. The Jefferson County Sheriff's department will be present for our safety and to detur the risk of counter-protesters at the site.
Staging for the protest begins at 11:30 AM and we encourage you all to bring signs, flags, and banners. Please note that we will be basically in a field so please dress accordingly to avoid injury or harm.
If you should have any questions as to where to go, what to bring, or anything else don't hesitate to reach out to us. We are here to help 24/7 and thank you all for the support and your attendance.
Thank You again for joining us and we look forward to seeing you tomorrow.
Sincerely, Events Team Laurel Imer for Congress 202-505-1251 contact@laurelimerforcongress.com

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: Joe Biden wants to CONTROL YOU
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58317405:J1Vzsm25N:m:1:3103520637:2204C03F66EA94E8F52AEAF16F0DF685:r "Headline") Peter, Even the liberal media sees what Joe Biden is planning. The infrastructure bill was only the beginning, and it all comes down to one word--**CONTROL.** Joe Biden has a plan to fundamentally control our lives from the cradle to the grave with a path towards socialism, and the Democrats are stepping on the gas to get this done before Americans realize what is happening to them. **Even one of Biden 's top economists, Heather Boushey admits:** | _If we get this passed, a decade from now, people are going to see many more touch points of government supporting them and their families._
---
Joe Biden campaigned in 2020 promising to be **" the most progressive president in history,"** and now he's showing us that the $3.5 Trillion spending proposal allows him to deliver on that promise, and all of it will be paid for with your tax dollars.
**[I need your IMMEDIATE help to slam the brakes on Biden's plan to make us all a Government Dependent. Will you help me end his plan before the government takes over our lives completely?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58317405:J1Vzsm25N:m:1:3103520637:2204C03F66EA94E8F52AEAF16F0DF685:r "I need your IMMEDIATE help to slam the brakes on Biden’s plan
to make us all a Government Dependent. Will you help me end his plan before the government takes over our lives completely?")**
**Biden and Pelosi have been planning to make us all a Government Dependent for years, and if they get their way, it will be worse than Obamacare.** They aren't going to wait for a rational debate or negotiations with Republicans to come to a consensus; they are going to slam this through before anyone can object.
And they just might be able to do it.
* **Force companies to pay for family** and medical leave for ALL workers even before a child is born.
* **Provide Federal income supplements** each month in the form of an expanded child tax credit that follows children from daycare to kindergarten to two years beyond their federally funded college education.
* **Supplement Incomes** after college and during workforce training.
* **Expand Medicare** to cover dental, vision, and hearing.
* **And MUCH, MUCH MORE!**

Joe Biden and his cronies have a stranglehold on power on Capitol Hill and will call in any favor or twist any arm they need to get this through. They have a plan for everything that includes raising taxes to tackling climate change, and soon their plan may include the kitchen sink.
**But that 's where you come in. While they rely on Washington Insiders, I'm counting on the American people to hear my clarion call to stand up for our future and fight before America as we know it becomes a memory.**
**[Will you help me organize patriots nationwide to stop the lifelong slide to Government Dependence for all Americans? I need you to donate at least $45 today and let me know if you are standing with us!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58317405:J1Vzsm25N:m:1:3103520637:2204C03F66EA94E8F52AEAF16F0DF685:r "Will you help me organize patriots nationwide to stop the lifelong
slide to Government Dependence for all Americans? I need you to donate at least $45 today and let me know if you are standing with us!")**
The Democrats will lie - just like they did with Obamacare. The Media will shame anyone who dares to object.
**No matter what they try,_we must stand firm._** We cannot allow them to do this to our nation.
**[Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 will be the first shot in a very long battle- a battle that we owe it to our children to win.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58317406:J1Vzsm25N:m:1:3103520637:2204C03F66EA94E8F52AEAF16F0DF685:r "Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 will be
the first shot in a very long battle – a battle that we owe it to our children to win.")**
The Democrats cannot prevail in their desire to make us all a Government Dependent, and that's why we can't wait any longer to fight back.
**[Will you help me defeat them?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58317405:J1Vzsm25N:m:1:3103520637:2204C03F66EA94E8F52AEAF16F0DF685:r "Will you help me defeat them?")**
For a free America,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58317405:J1Vzsm25N:m:1:3103520637:2204C03F66EA94E8F52AEAF16F0DF685:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri
| [FIGHT FOR AMERICA](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58317405:J1Vzsm25N:m:1:3103520637:2204C03F66EA94E8F52AEAF16F0DF685:r "FIGHT FOR
AMERICA")
---
| **PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
---

| | What the hell is going on here?

On one side of this race, we’ve got Terry, a guy with a proven track record as a leader, who has plans to help all Virginians by building the economy, expanding health care, and supporting working families.

On the other side, we’ve got a guy _**endorsed by Donald Trump**_ who wants to roll back progress, promote Trump’s election conspiracies and push extreme, right-wing agenda policies like ending abortion.

How is this even a contest?

I’m literally tearing my hair out! This race is way tighter than it should be, Derek, and I just don’t get it. _**In fact, Terry and Glenn are virtually tied in some recent polls — including a poll from a top-rated pollster at Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight.**_

clean_body: | | | = | | What the hell is going on here? On one side of this race, we’ve got Terry, a guy with a proven track record as a leader, who has plans to help all Virginians by building the economy, expanding health care, and supporting working families. On the other side, we’ve got a guy endorsed by Donald Trump who wants to roll back progress, promote Trump’s election conspiracies and push extreme, right-wing agenda policies like ending abortion. How is this even a contest? I’m literally tearing my hair out! This race is way tighter than it should be, Derek, and I just don’t get it. body:
We're taking action. | Joe Biden is a liar. Plain and simple. After repeatedly telling the American people that he would NEVER mandate a COVID vaccine.

Peter,

Joe Biden is a liar. Plain and simple.

After repeatedly telling the American people that he would NEVER mandate a COVID vaccine, he's reversed course. _**He just mandated the vaccine for tens of millions of Americans.**_

This is an overreach by the Biden administration.

We want to send a letter to Joe Biden showing him that we are REJECTING his totalitarian DICTATOR-like mandates. Will you co-sign it with us?

**[Add your name NOW to send a message to Joe Biden that the American people are REJECTING his vaccine mandate.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58320122:JuXWym2uN:m:1:3253819041:982310DDC4E03E41EA132B8528ECE80B:r)**

_Dear Joe Biden,

Your decision to mandate COVID vaccines for tens of millions of Americans is unconstitutional. You promised multiple times you would never mandate the vaccine. You LIED.

As an American citizen, I REJECT your overreaching mandate and look forward to voting you out of office in 2024.

Sincerely,
A Patriotic American_

Our goal is to get 500,000 signatures from American patriots, like YOU, letting Joe Biden know that we will NOT stand for this unconstitutional mandate.

**[Please add your name before 11:59 PM TONIGHT to make sure your voice is heard.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58320122:JuXWym2uN:m:1:3253819041:982310DDC4E03E41EA132B8528ECE80B:r)**

Thank you,

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Joe Biden’s unconstitutional vaccine mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58795934:W3RBT0dYN:m:1:2068296031:360D6820278E49BFC9E175AA83E14584:r)
Friend,

We wanted to forward along our [**_press release_**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58795935:W3RBT0dYN:m:1:2068296031:360D6820278E49BFC9E175AA83E14584:r) from last week on Joe Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandates.

Republicans are standing up against Biden's unconstitutional federal overreach that will punish Wisconsin small businesses and families. Across the country, Republican governors are speaking out, and the Republican National Committee is [_**planning to sue**_](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58795936:W3RBT0dYN:m:1:2068296031:360D6820278E49BFC9E175AA83E14584:r) to stop the mandate once it takes effect. State legislators in Wisconsin are also bringing the fight to the local media:
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58795937:W3RBT0dYN:m:1:2068296031:360D6820278E49BFC9E175AA83E14584:r)**
**
The WisGOP is calling on Tony Evers to join the over half of [**_state governors_**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58795938:W3RBT0dYN:m:1:2068296031:360D6820278E49BFC9E175AA83E14584:r) who refuse to play a role in Joe Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandate. You can read the full press release on our website [_**here**_](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58795935:W3RBT0dYN:m:1:2068296031:360D6820278E49BFC9E175AA83E14584:r), or below:
_Yesterday, Joe Biden announced an unconstitutional vaccine mandate plan that forces national politics on Americans ' personal decisions about their health. While over 20 Republican governors have spoken out against Biden's federal overreach, Tony Evers has remained silent on this plan that will hurt Wisconsin small businesses and disproportionately affect lower-income and minority Americans.

In July, the White House said it is "not the role of the federal government" to force Americans to get vaccinated. Now, Joe Biden is abandoning individual choice in favor of allowing big government to make health decisions for working people. Wisconsinites deserve to know whether Tony Evers will cave to Joe Biden and his un-American mandate that will force Wisconsinites out of work and prevent them from providing for their families. If he stands with Wisconsin small business owners, he must speak out against this unconstitutional federal overreach.

**" Joe Biden's authoritarian mandate will hurt Wisconsin small business owners and families," **said Republican Party of Wisconsin Executive Director Mark Jefferson. **" Tony Evers must join the governors who have spoken out against Biden's unconstitutional and un-American federal overreach."**__
_
Republicans will always fight to defend your liberties and freedoms. If you want to get involved by volunteering with your local county party, click [_**here**_](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58795939:W3RBT0dYN:m:1:2068296031:360D6820278E49BFC9E175AA83E14584:r). If you cannot volunteer, but would like to contribute financially to help fund our efforts, click [_**here**_](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58795940:W3RBT0dYN:m:1:2068296031:360D6820278E49BFC9E175AA83E14584:r).
Thank you,
Team WisGOP

clean_body: Friend, We wanted to forward along our from last week on Joe Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandates. Republicans are standing up against Biden's unconstitutional federal overreach that will punish Wisconsin small businesses and families. Across the country, Republican governors are speaking out, and the Republican National Committee is to stop the mandate once it takes effect. State legislators in Wisconsin are also bringing the fight to the local media: The WisGOP is calling on Tony Evers to join the over half of who refuse to play a role in Joe Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandate. You can read the full press release on our website , or below: Yesterday, Joe Biden announced an unconstitutional vaccine mandate plan that forces national politics on Americans ' personal decisions about their health. While over 20 Republican governors have spoken out against Biden's federal overreach, Tony Evers has remained silent on this plan that will hurt Wisconsin small businesses and disproportionately affect lower-income and minority Americans. In July, the White House said it is "not the role of the federal government" to force Americans to get vaccinated. Now, Joe Biden is abandoning individual choice in favor of allowing big government to make health decisions for working people. Wisconsinites deserve to know whether Tony Evers will cave to Joe Biden and his un-American mandate that will force Wisconsinites out of work and prevent them from providing for their families. If he stands with Wisconsin small business owners, he must speak out against this unconstitutional federal overreach. " Joe Biden's authoritarian mandate will hurt Wisconsin small business owners and families," said Republican Party of Wisconsin Executive Director Mark Jefferson. " Tony Evers must join the governors who have spoken out against Biden's unconstitutional and un-American federal overreach." _ Republicans will always fight to defend your liberties and freedoms. If you want to get involved by volunteering with your local county party, click . If you cannot volunteer, but would like to contribute financially to help fund our efforts, click . Thank you, Team WisGOP This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system May 22, 2018. You’re one of the first to see this. | Hi Peter, I wanted to give you a quick heads up on a special project we announced this morning. **We partnered with VoteVets to release a powerful TV ad backing President Biden’s decision to withdraw from Afghanistan.** The ad highlights veteran and Afghanistan war hero, Dan Berschinski, who lost both of his legs fighting America’s longest war. **[You can watch the ad here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35742594/306002189/-803653937?v=wNMdllD17yY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ODA3OGRiLTVmMTUtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=x8fitAwOfjpMb4MbaHe1YWKoC9Rj-1oAwzbmkbl2dA0=&emci=a42e6855-0115-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=068078db-5f15-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16951753)** **[Watch the Ad!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35742602/306002203/-803653937?v=wNMdllD17yY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ODA3OGRiLTVmMTUtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=x8fitAwOfjpMb4MbaHe1YWKoC9Rj-1oAwzbmkbl2dA0=&emci=a42e6855-0115-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=068078db-5f15-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16951753)** Starting today, the ad will run nationally in households across America. But as one of our top supporters — I wanted you to be one of the first to see it, Peter. **Unite the Country made a significant contribution to VoteVets to help with this project because we believe it is more important than ever that we stand with the President in the face of _unrelenting_ attacks from the GOP.** Most people do not know this, Peter, but I spent time as part of a civilian team in Afghanistan during the early years of the Obama administration. That’s where I developed not only an _immense_ level of respect for the men and women who voluntarily wear the uniform of the United States, but also a deep sense that our decision to be in the country was flawed. I am proud that this President, _our_ President, had the courage to do what the three previous Presidents did not: **bring our men and women home.** In politics, followers chase popularity, but real friends are there in the tough moments. We are proud of this effort with VoteVets, and we are proud to stand with President Biden in the face of this difficult, yet incredibly necessary, decision. **I hope you will stand with us.** **[Watch the Ad!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35742610/306002217/-803653937?v=wNMdllD17yY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2ODA3OGRiLTVmMTUtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=x8fitAwOfjpMb4MbaHe1YWKoC9Rj-1oAwzbmkbl2dA0=&emci=a42e6855-0115-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=068078db-5f15-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16951753)** Thank you for allowing us to do what we do.

Sincerely,

Mark Doyle

Look Derek, this election is coming up — sooner than you realize.
And frankly, **_Democrats are in danger of losing up and down the ticket._**
Glenn Youngkin is a right wing extremist who is funding his campaign with $75 million of his own personal fortune.
He’s promised to defund Planned Parenthood, he _opposes_ Medicaid expansion, he’s _anti_ -LGBTQ+ and has no interest in sensible gun legislation.
Not to mention, **he looks to Ted Cruz and Donald Trump as political mentors.**
It doesn’t make sense, Derek — **_how do the polls have him statistically tied with Terry?_**
We’ve only got 3 days left until people start voting, Derek, and we _need_ to pick up the pace.

Governor Greg Abbott and his Republican allies passed the most extreme, anti-choice legislation our country has seen since before _Roe v. Wade_ — and the Supreme Court let them get away with it.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: I’m voting NO today, are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

The California recall election is here and I’ve already voted NO to ensure Governor Newsom wins.

**Please, if you haven’t voted yet, make sure you go out and vote today! Polling locations (voting centers) close at 8:00 PM. If you haven’t mailed in your ballot yet, you can still do so as long as it’s postmarked with TODAY’s date. You can also drop your mail in ballot off at any polling location throughout California![_Click here to find out more voting information →

https://www.sos.ca.gov/elections/upcoming-elections/2021-ca-gov-recall/newsom-recall-faqs_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35745533/306013566/-732795384?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210914_1_2&refcode2=32525977-6415-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjUyNTk3Ny02NDE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hEoexHJaRPLQYl5Fjs1RyveQnE0NiMCKJ-ebpXcavaY=&emci=98479b94-be14-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=32525977-6415-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2678920)**

In just the last few weeks, Rep. Cawthorn has gone from merely ridiculous to truly alarming. In a recent appearance before a GOP gathering in Macon County, North Carolina, Cawthorn told attendees:
_“...if elections continue to be rigged, it’s gonna lead to one place and that’s bloodshed. As much as I am willing to defend our liberty at all costs, there’s nothing that I would dread doing more than having to pick up arms against a fellow American.”_
---
Really? “ _**Pick up arms against a fellow American**_ ”? Even suggesting such a thing, no matter how far-fetched, is beyond the pale.
Unfortunately, that’s only the latest in a laundry list of items that make Cawthorn unfit for office:
* He’s a serial liar, who rode falsehoods and exaggerated credentials all the way to a Congressional seat. These lies included claiming that he was recruited by the Naval Academy (he was not), that he was admitted to Princeton and Harvard (nope), and that he was training for the Paralympics (actual American Paralympians had never heard of him and called his claims “absurd.”).

* He has been accused repeatedly by multiple women of harassment, sexual assault, and aggressive, violent reactions to being told “no.”

* To top it all off, Rep. Cawthorn is an unequivocal supporter of the Jan. 6 insurrection. When asked at the same Macon County GOP event when he would “call us to Washington again,” Cawthorn’s response was “We’re working on that.”

**It couldn’t be clearer that Madison Cawthorn cares nothing about his community, his constituents, or his fellow Americans.**
Luckily for North Carolinians, and frankly all of us, we have a proven community leader, educator, and man of integrity running to send Cawthorn packing in November 2022.
[_**That man is Eric Gash, and we’re working to deliver him to Washington next November so that North Carolinians — and educators everywhere! — will have a real voice advocating for them in Congress. Can you split a donation now between EEE and Eric’s campaign?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35747877/306021403/450095318?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210914ericgash2_eee_180DO_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhNDk3NGNhLTY3MTUtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fVgQ-hKRCeqvRYEH4uuud4RWQX8aAj5eIRi0sevGzxQ=)

clean_body: | = Educators & allies, Let’s talk about far-right Representative Madison Cawthorn. More to the point, let’s talk about the fact that a former math teacher, elementary school principal, and community leader has a real chance at kicking Cawthorn out of Congress —= ** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In just the last few weeks, Rep. Cawthorn has gone from merely ridiculous to truly alarming. In a recent appearance before a GOP gathering in Macon County, North Carolina, Cawthorn told attendees: “...if elections continue to be rigged, it’s gonna lead to one place and that’s bloodshed. As much as I am willing to defend our liberty at all costs, there’s nothing that I would dread doing more than having to pick up arms against a fellow American.” Really? “ Pick up arms against a fellow American ”? Even suggesting such a thing, no matter how far-fetched, is beyond the pale. Unfortunately, that’s only the latest in a laundry list of items that make Cawthorn unfit for office: He’s a serial liar, who rode falsehoods and exaggerated credentials all the way to a Congressional seat. These lies included claiming that he was recruited by the Naval Academy (he was not), that he was admitted to Princeton and Harvard (nope), and that he was training for the Paralympics (actual American Paralympians had never heard of him and called his claims “absurd.”). He has been accused repeatedly by multiple women of harassment, sexual assault, and aggressive, violent reactions to being told “no.” To top it all off, Rep. Cawthorn is an unequivocal supporter of the Jan. 6 insurrection. When asked at the same Macon County GOP event when he would “call us to Washington again,” Cawthorn’s response was “We’re working on that.” It couldn’t be clearer that Madison Cawthorn cares nothing about his community, his constituents, or his fellow Americans. Luckily for North Carolinians, and frankly all of us, we have a proven community leader, educator, and man of integrity running to send Cawthorn packing in November 2022. = ** = Thanks for your support, Elect Educators Everywhere | Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: Leave no man behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58323817:JjUXom2Nz:m:1:3253819041:09F50C86FD4DA5D633A023C633A37836:r)
---
| Peter, 11 years ago this week, when I was serving as a bomb technician under Joint Special Operations Command in the Army, my life changed forever. I lost both legs and a finger when a roadside bomb blew up beneath me while in the Kandahar region of Afghanistan.

If it weren't for the bravery and selflessness of my fellow soldiers, and the grace of God, _I very well could have lost my life_.

What I remember most clearly from that day is my fellow soldiers sprinting towards the bomb instead of away from my motionless body. They rushed in the direction where an explosive device had just detonated, putting their own lives in danger to save mine.

While I may have lost my ability to continue being an asset on the battlefield that day, I didn't lose my drive to keep fighting for our amazing country. So, I learned to walk again, graduated from college and set my sights on a new mission: restoring America First greatness to the United States.

On this anniversary of that explosion, will you help me win this latest battle for the future of our country?
---
| [JOIN THE FIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58323817:JjUXom2Nz:m:1:3253819041:09F50C86FD4DA5D633A023C633A37836:r "JOIN THE FIGHT")
---
| I wouldn't be alive today if it weren't for the most solemn of mantras: leave no man behind.

Unfortunately, Joe Biden has done the exact opposite. He has abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan, and in doing so, he has betrayed the men and women I served alongside.

**His behavior is completely unforgivable, and as a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words "commander" or "chief" anywhere in his title.

If you agree, please help me hold Joe Biden accountable for his betrayal and stop his disastrous America Last agenda:**
---
| [DONATE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58323818:JjUXom2Nz:m:1:3253819041:09F50C86FD4DA5D633A023C633A37836:r "DONATE $25")

| I want to thank you all from the bottom of my heart for your support in letting me continue my service to our country in Congress. That foundation isn’t a network of dark money donors or a flush campaign bank account. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35751358/306036189/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210914response_JM_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWFlMTFhMi02ZjE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5HCbHfb5dpTEB0DZ6A4TKoz_00YjSKgx5JzR8nlOt8=)

Hey Peter, Let me just say, I’m humbled by how many of you took the time to respond to our survey last week. From the very beginning, I’ve known that we will win or lose on the strength of this campaign’s foundation. That foundation isn’t a network of dark money donors or a flush campaign bank account. **It’s people like you, who care deeply about our collective future as Tennesseans, who are fed up with the division plaguing our politics, and who are committed to bringing real leadership back to this state.** More than 500 of you spoke up last week to let me know what you care about and want to see from your next governor. [_**Before I get to what I’m taking away from those responses, can you pitch in to fuel our 95-county listening tour that’s currently underway?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35751359/306036190/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210914response_JM_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWFlMTFhMi02ZjE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5HCbHfb5dpTEB0DZ6A4TKoz_00YjSKgx5JzR8nlOt8=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Here’s what I learned from the survey:
* The #1 issue on people’s minds right now is COVID-19 (almost 85% of respondents). This is no surprise, especially with Gov. Lee’s complete abdication of leadership from the very start of the pandemic.

* Voting rights (73%) was the next most urgent issue. Like everyone else, I’ve been following the GOP’s attempts to disenfranchise voters in states across the country with anger and trepidation. Here in Tennessee, we’ve largely avoided draconian new laws that further restrict voter access, but we still have work to do to further expand voting rights and access to the ballot box. As Governor, I have every intention of ensuring that everyone who wants to cast a ballot can do so without fear or difficulty.

* Healthcare (71%) and education (65%) were the next two most urgent issues identified by respondents. I’ll be frank: Gov. Lee has failed us not only on the COVID-19 front, but also in ensuring that healthcare is affordable and accessible, and that all of our children are set up for success with a strong public education.

Finally, in reading through the written responses on what you’d like to see from your next Governor, I was struck by just how far our elected officials have strayed from simple concepts of leadership. Basic things like “willing to think of the state first before themselves” and “finding a way to get people talking and listening to each other for the greater good.” Words like _intelligence, compassion, empathy_ , and _honesty_ were repeated again and again.
While I’m saddened that our leaders have repeatedly failed us and completely forgotten who they were elected to serve, I’m rejuvenated by the fact that so many people are clearly ready for change. They know — you know — that our families and communities deserve so much better.
**We _do_ deserve leaders who are intelligent, compassionate, and honest — [_help our campaign deliver on that promise by making a donation of any amount now._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35751366/306036197/-123621691?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210914response_JM_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWFlMTFhMi02ZjE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5HCbHfb5dpTEB0DZ6A4TKoz_00YjSKgx5JzR8nlOt8=)**
****
[Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35751367/306036198/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210914response_JM_all_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWFlMTFhMi02ZjE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5HCbHfb5dpTEB0DZ6A4TKoz_00YjSKgx5JzR8nlOt8=)

Your support is the fuel that drives this campaign forward. Thank you. Together, Tennessee thrives.
Dr. Jason Martin

name: Eric Gash
subject: I spoke truth to power last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Gash For Congress PO Box 543, Hendersonville, NC 28793
body:
It’s on all of us to stop Madison Cawthorn.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35751823/306037642/1639334829?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDIzNzBhMS03MDE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FeOtEaOauXMvAs_Pb0xNiFqbeg2D8DlIuNLEsWN_HVM=)

My district looked at the numbers and chose that path anyway, and Cawthorn showed up at yesterday’s school board meeting to chirp his displeasure.

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Protecting the most crucial tool in our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35755122/306045568/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzVmZWY1Zi03NTE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjnoWX-lxp56FD7tiUsbeZD6AF-_HVKMSvRqpfKHdSI=&emci=55e932c7-7115-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2c5fef5f-7515-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=9494239)
---

| | My colleague John Lewis is deeply missed in Congress, but his life's work and his legacy live on as we do our work to protect the right to vote in America. John was not shy about sharing the challenges that people of color faced simply to gain the right to vote. He understood how powerful that right was to a functioning democracy. In the fifteen months since his passing, a new wave of attacks have reminded us that progress does not have to be linear. We must be as vigilant as ever against undemocratic actors who are fighting to erode the rights of everyday Americans. The unscrupulous actions of lawmakers in states like Georgia, Florida, and Texas have forced us to face a reckoning. By eliminating polling places, shortening hours, eliminating voting-by-mail, and other targeted actions, Republicans in these states made clear that winning is more valuable than a functioning democracy. Like the efforts that my colleague John faced, these attacks against democracy have an outsized impact on the voices of traditionally-marginalized communities. **At a time when our country is more diverse than ever, it is necessary we fight these blatant discriminations until every single American is guaranteed a voice at the ballot box.** Recently, House Democrats took a critical first step in our fight to protect the most crucial tool to our democracy by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. More than honoring a true freedom fighter's legacy, the effort will restore the full strength of the original Voting Rights Act, codifying the tools for a legitimate democracy and enabling us to stop blatant racial discrimination in redistricting and voting. It was an honor and privilege to advance these efforts through the House. Now the Senate must act to make this a reality. Thank you John. clean_body: | | | My colleague John Lewis is deeply missed in Congress, but his life's work and his legacy live on as we do our work to protect the right to vote in America. John was not shy about sharing the challenges that people of color faced simply to gain the right to vote. He understood how powerful that right was to a functioning democracy. In the fifteen months since his passing, a new wave of attacks have reminded us that progress does not have to be linear. We must be as vigilant as ever against undemocratic actors who are fighting to erode the rights of everyday Americans. The unscrupulous actions of lawmakers in states like Georgia, Florida, and Texas have forced us to face a reckoning. By eliminating polling places, shortening hours, eliminating voting-by-mail, and other targeted actions, Republicans in these states made clear that winning is more valuable than a functioning democracy. Like the efforts that my colleague John faced, these attacks against democracy have an outsized impact on the voices of traditionally-marginalized communities. At a time when our country is more diverse than ever, it is necessary we fight these blatant discriminations until every single American is guaranteed a voice at the ballot box. Recently, House Democrats took a critical first step in our fight to protect the most crucial tool to our democracy by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. More than honoring a true freedom fighter's legacy, the effort will restore the full strength of the original Voting Rights Act, codifying the tools for a legitimate democracy and enabling us to stop blatant racial discrimination in redistricting and voting. It was an honor and privilege to advance these efforts through the House. Now the Senate must act to make this a reality. Thank you John. For your lasting memory, for your commitment to breaking down barriers, and for the fight we carry on in your name. Team, I want to be transparent about how critical your support today is to re-electing Michael. Mitch McConnell and the National Republican fundraising machine are targeting him so they can flip the Senate. We’ll be in a vulnerable position if we fall behind in our fundraising this early in the midterm cycle, so I’m about to ask for your support before tomorrow’s mid-month fundraising deadline. I know it might seem early to pitch in to Michael’s re-election efforts, but donations made early in the race have a profound impact down the line. Not only do early donations help us plan for long-term strategic investments — they also help us fend off future attacks from the National GOP. You see, our campaign reports our quarterly fundraising details to the Federal Election Commission, who will publish it in a public report. That means our opponents can pore over that report to look for weak points in our campaign as they plan future attacks. We’ll send a strong signal that we’re in this fight for the long haul if we stay on track with our fundraising goals, but right now, we’re falling behind. **We have to make up that ground before tomorrow’s mid-month fundraising deadline, so chip in $3 or whatever works for you right now to make sure we have a strong showing on our upcoming report. ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $3 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35758902/306051164/-544172133?express_lane=true&amount=3&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20210914_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWMzNjQ2Zi03ODE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zq-2uNZY_sJBsYj97DSI5-HZSawg6Wz4L3wEQwrVfJs=)**

clean_body: Our fundraising for this quarter will be public soon. | = Team, I want to be transparent about how critical your support today is to re-electing Michael. Mitch McConnell and the National Republican fundraising machine are targeting him so they can flip the Senate. We’ll be in a vulnerable position if we fall behind in our fundraising this early in the midterm cycle, so I’m about to ask for your support before tomorrow’s mid-month fundraising deadline. I know it might seem early to pitch in to Michael’s re-election efforts, but donations made early in the race have a profound impact down the line. Not only do early donations help us plan for long-term strategic investments — they also help us fend off future attacks from the National GOP. You see, our campaign reports our quarterly fundraising details to the Federal Election Commission, who will publish it in a public report. That means our opponents can pore over that report to look for weak points in our campaign as they plan future attacks. We’ll send a strong signal that we’re in this fight for the long haul if we stay on track with our fundraising goals, but right now, we’re falling behind. We have to make up that ground before tomorrow’s mid-month fundraising deadline, so chip in $3 or whatever works for you right now to make sure we have a strong showing on our upcoming report. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Trust me, National Republicans will keep a close eye on our fundraising as they ramp up their attacks — we can’t afford to give them even an inch to work with. Thanks for reading and being on this team with us, Kelsey Hamilton Finance Director P.S. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: This is longer, but I hope you'll read it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWoKIU3do032UXeZmazvRGiE6SGyVVGmlsowvl4LBYNnGPR3nF1fYOGqW2YxrE_1MpkNiNR6m-bKaBv0rV-h73eGLv651f7A9MpVm9Ib6tttPU2V-FP8B14qtoXIRrTRjCHpBeSaHQrNQX-TmKyLYu2uI7YNFzcCKKF5QHrQWB2I0_ljf1Vrqf5Usw30OKRT3kfZybaBaC3Jk669yiqlE15IEl_TxRWC1zHeRq-2kFGFmaHGN6usRSjZqNWzMcQDVx1JxgIygSKuJqgClkZJd_O2TDbJZ1rSPJhfQgOfjms6IaVCShHyXdm8j1grg0zgNIQ/3fb/_khghO-qQqKLxAXuw5YOCg/h0/ntnGzD_2RpoZMNjdT7gwDT31C6ohFxztk6HWJxXE1FI)
This is a longer email, Derek, but I hope you'll read it.

Right-wing billionaire and Donald Trump's former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, came to New Hampshire to rally Trump's far-right base. She is just one of the many Trump allies trying to unseat me and flip the Senate red.

During Betsy DeVos' confirmation hearing for Secretary of Education back in 2017, she demonstrated a complete lack of understanding and support for the public education system – and it was clear that she was unqualified to serve as secretary of education. **At her confirmation hearing, I specifically questioned Ms. DeVos on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law.**

Unfortunately, she didn’t improve upon that disastrous confirmation hearing during her tenure in the Trump administration – pursuing policies that undermined public schools in New Hampshire and across the country. From proposed funding cuts to her efforts to implement a voucher system, **DeVos ignored the needs of both educators and students in an attempt to dismantle our public education system.**

I’m writing today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done fighting for a more robust public education system. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and New Hampshire’s State Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. Republicans know this, and DeVos' visit is a clear attempt to unseat me by rallying Trump's far-right base. **If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding our narrow majority.**

Having Donald Trump and his allies fully invested in this race is bad news. [**I hate asking for money, but my campaign is falling behind our goal, and we need the funds to fight back against Republican attacks. clean_body: | | | This is a longer email, Derek, but I hope you'll read it. Right-wing billionaire and Donald Trump's former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, came to New Hampshire to rally Trump's far-right base. She is just one of the many Trump allies trying to unseat me and flip the Senate red. During Betsy DeVos' confirmation hearing for Secretary of Education back in 2017, she demonstrated a complete lack of understanding and support for the public education system – and it was clear that she was unqualified to serve as secretary of education. At her confirmation hearing, I specifically questioned Ms. DeVos on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law. Unfortunately, she didn’t improve upon that disastrous confirmation hearing during her tenure in the Trump administration – pursuing policies that undermined public schools in New Hampshire and across the country. From proposed funding cuts to her efforts to implement a voucher system, DeVos ignored the needs of both educators and students in an attempt to dismantle our public education system. I’m writing today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done fighting for a more robust public education system. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and New Hampshire’s State Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. Republicans know this, and DeVos' visit is a clear attempt to unseat me by rallying Trump's far-right base. If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding our narrow majority. Having Donald Trump and his allies fully invested in this race is bad news. I'm fighting to give New Hampshire families a brighter future by strengthening public education, expanding the Child Tax Credit, protecting health care, and more. But there's still much work ahead – and if Republicans regain control of the Senate, they will undo all of the progress we've made so far. Thank you so much. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: re: Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

As I'm sure many of you know, earlier this month the Supreme Court refused to block an extreme anti-choice bill in Texas from becoming law.

This new legislation directly contradicts _Roe v. Wade_ and, in doing so, endangers the lives of millions of people. These extreme restrictions seek to criminalize doctors who provide care for their patients.

That is one of the many reasons why we **_must_** protect and uphold _Roe v. Wade_.

I always have and always will oppose any proposals that limit reproductive care options for people. I believe that personal health care decisions should be made by patients and their doctors -- not by extremist lawmakers.

This fight isn't over, Peter. The Justice Department has announced a lawsuit against the state of Texas, and Congress has the power to pass legislation to protect reproductive freedom. I have sponsored such legislation and will be pushing to get it passed.

**[If you're looking for a way to help right now, reproductive health care clinics could use your support more than ever. You can learn more information here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/BdC0DMMxNNqEnQbnkmvMCwruqcYo9p8GTb514LXqQVE=/No_mQ63FGzX94iWLQf9pHeak_W4Iw1qlIeJQkXmiGU8=)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

subject: We’ve got a lot of work to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35759547/306053551/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_MMG_AC_20210914_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDhhMDY3YS03YTE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cCNjj4-Eb3tMu0eJa9rS78pJBGY8npT_YLh6JQ_RZAY=&emci=1758fe72-7a15-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=108a067a-7a15-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)

Hey folks, The Senate just got back from summer recess, and we’ve got a _lot_ of work to do. I’m hitting the ground running to advance the Build Back Better agenda and ensure it makes bold investments that will finally address the climate crisis. That means furthering the transition to clean energy, establishing an efficiency rebates program for household appliances to reduce carbon emissions, and powering New Mexico’s economic recovery. Another top priority? Ending the Senate filibuster. It’s become nothing more than a Republican tool of obstruction. We can’t afford to let the GOP keep getting in the way of passing important legislation that would change lives and livelihoods. I will stop the filibuster so we can finally pass crucial voting rights legislation like the _For the People Act_ and the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_. So we can move forward the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ to protect the right to access reproductive care during this concerning time in our history. So we can finally create the green, good-paying union jobs folks are counting on. But I’m counting on you to power this work. Every single grassroots donation, whether it’s $10, $25, or $50, helps fuel my campaign and allows me to focus on the urgent fights in the U.S. Senate. **So, can you chip in a grassroots donation of any amount to help give our fundraising a boost before our mid-month deadline tomorrow? This is our last big deadline before our end-of-quarter push, and meeting our mid-month goal will keep us on track to report strong numbers at the end of the quarter.** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35759548/306053552/2119781871?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_MMG_AC_20210914_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDhhMDY3YS03YTE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cCNjj4-Eb3tMu0eJa9rS78pJBGY8npT_YLh6JQ_RZAY=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35759550/306053553/2119781871?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_MMG_AC_20210914_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDhhMDY3YS03YTE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cCNjj4-Eb3tMu0eJa9rS78pJBGY8npT_YLh6JQ_RZAY=)

clean_body: Hey folks, The Senate just got back from summer recess, and we’ve got a lot of work to do. I’m hitting the ground running to advance the Build Back Better agenda and ensure it makes bold investments that will finally address the climate crisis. That means furthering the transition to clean energy, establishing an efficiency rebates program for household appliances to reduce carbon emissions, and powering New Mexico’s economic recovery. Another top priority? Ending the Senate filibuster. It’s become nothing more than a Republican tool of obstruction. We can’t afford to let the GOP keep getting in the way of passing important legislation that would change lives and livelihoods. I will stop the filibuster so we can finally pass crucial voting rights legislation like the For the People Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. So we can move forward the Women’s Health Protection Act to protect the right to access reproductive care during this concerning time in our history. So we can finally create the green, good-paying union jobs folks are counting on. But I’m counting on you to power this work. Every single grassroots donation, whether it’s $10, $25, or $50, helps fuel my campaign and allows me to focus on the urgent fights in the U.S. Senate. So, can you chip in a grassroots donation of any amount to help give our fundraising a boost before our mid-month deadline tomorrow? This is our last big deadline before our end-of-quarter push, and meeting our mid-month goal will keep us on track to report strong numbers at the end of the quarter. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for all you do. —Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. clean_body: let us tell you why | | | = | | Here are the facts, Derek: Last year, Virginia voted against Donald Trump by a double digit margin. But now, recent polling shows the race between Democrat Terry McAuliffe and Trump’s candidate, Glenn Youngkin, is virtually tied.One recent poll even had Youngkin up by two points. On Friday, Virginians will start casting their ballots in this must-win election for Democrats, and there’s no question that Republicans will pull out all the stops to get out the vote. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Glenn Youngkin has vowed to spend $75 million to win this race — at any moment, he could make good on that promise and halt Democrats’ progress. But this week, we have a chance to launch Terry McAuliffe’s campaign into the lead. On Thursday, he will face Glenn Youngkin on the debate stage and hold him accountable for his Trumpian tactics. Then on Friday, Virginians will start voting. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, McAuliffe HQ =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Ali S. Zaidi, Collier for Texas
subject: one million dollars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89772/images/Logo%20%282%29.png]
We just reached a critical milestone, team,

Our movement has officially raised a million dollars in fundraising since we launched our exploratory campaign, showing the momentum Mike has from Texans all over the state.

Yep, you read that correctly. $1,000,000 — that’s six zeroes!

But do you know what we’re most proud of? We have not and will not take a dime from corporate PACs. In fact, teacher is our most common donor occupation. This is a movement powered by the people of Texas for the people of Texas.

But before I get any further, we wanted to thank you, thank you, thank you for all your support. From the retired teacher from Abilene to the rancher from Corpus Christi and the firefighter from Rockwall, this is your campaign.

Because of your support, our team has already raised four times the amount we raised at this point in 2018, with seven times as many donors.

As Mike always says, powerful corporations can buy as many lawmakers as they want but the good people of Texas get only one Lt. Governor. This is just the beginning of the path to taking our great state back and putting it in the hands of Texans.

We look forward to announcing the next phase of this campaign soon.

Thanks again for everything you do. Together, we can rise up and build a future that puts everyday Texans first.

Ali S. Zaidi, Collier for Texas

name: Team Nikki
subject: Unbelievable
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

On Sunday, Ron DeSantis travelled to Nebraska to lay the groundwork for his Presidential run and raise money from some of the country’s biggest GOP donors.

And yesterday, the Washington Post reported that he’s had more prime-time Fox News appearances than any other 2024 GOP Presidential hopeful.

For months, DeSantis has been content to let the pandemic rage in Florida while he starts his campaign for the White House. It’s unbelievable.

We deserve better.

Team, we’re asking for your help to fight back against DeSantis and win this race. If you agree that we deserve a Governor who puts Floridians before Presidential ambitions, click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-desantis-pres]

DeSantis has refused to step up and lead us through times of crisis. Instead, he’s focused on cozying up to the radical right on Fox News and courting GOP megadonors.

Floridians deserve a Governor, and right now, we don’t have one.

Nikki is the one candidate who can get the job done. If you can, please click here to chip in now and help us win this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-desantis-pres]

—Team Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=84e1e20c05&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | This week I had the privilege of writing an Op-Ed for the _Philadelphia Inquirer_ about how the city's high energy burden must be addressed in response to climate change.

We must protect the city from more horrific weather events. On a local and state level, mitigating the ravishing effects of climate change can start with acknowledging the astronomical energy burden in our city.

[](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=d8588f5ed0&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
A robust plan focusing on energy burden addresses ways to stall global warming, save taxpayers money, and shore up our city and state from inevitably increasing weather events. Good use of funds and programs would allow us to be proactive, not reactive, which is both economically and environmentally prudent and necessary for a competitive economy, better quality of life, and thriving neighborhoods. It's important to note that these topics have been part of my conversations with community, city, and state leaders already doing this work on the ground. My work will always be informed by the folks who have been focused on this advocacy and making real progress.

[As State Representative, I will stand for smart proactive spending to help avert disasters. Please help me get to Harrisburg. ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=6a3b459c5d&e=3f8e2ea1e3) _Deja_
---
|
### Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a
House that Represents You?

| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=c49407d087&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

name: Christy Smith
subject: Why this anniversary is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35766114/306076229/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQ3MzZjNS04OTE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPi5wJtKUECbcbJQEsEa1v-S98zr0Js3t6fd2IMlE6U=&emci=db7d6fd6-8115-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=e0d736c5-8915-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=11385749)

Trigger Warning: Domestic Violence. If this email could be triggering to you, please don’t feel any pressure to read further. I see you, I hear you, I am fighting for you. Peter,

I grew up in a home where there was domestic violence. I can remember the fear in my mom's eyes and the bruises on her face. I also remember that all the systems that were supposed to protect us failed us instead.

This month marks 27 years since the Violence Against Women Act (VAWA) first passed. It was landmark legislation that protected women and survivors of domestic violence. And because of Republican opposition, it expired under Trump's watch.

It didn't have to be this way. There could have been a bipartisan vote to renew VAWA -- an issue that shouldn't be partisan in the first place. But instead, Mike Garcia voted _against_ helping women who have been assaulted and stalked. He voted _against_ trying to prevent that violence in the first place. He voted _against_ expanding services for survivors and combating sexual violence on college campuses.

Every day the Senate waits to reauthorize VAWA is a day that puts survivors and potential victims at risk. It is irresponsible and unethical to do nothing.

**[We must act immediately. If you're with me, sign the petition today in support of survivors across the country and demand that Congress renew the Violence Against Women Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35766115/306076236/1014969382?ms=em21_210914_vawa&refcode=em21_210914_vawa&noskip=true-s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQ3MzZjNS04OTE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPi5wJtKUECbcbJQEsEa1v-S98zr0Js3t6fd2IMlE6U=&emci=db7d6fd6-8115-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=e0d736c5-8915-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=11385749)** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35766119/306076237/1014969382?ms=em21_210914_vawa&refcode=em21_210914_vawa&noskip=true-s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQ3MzZjNS04OTE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPi5wJtKUECbcbJQEsEa1v-S98zr0Js3t6fd2IMlE6U=&emci=db7d6fd6-8115-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=e0d736c5-8915-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=11385749) VAWA specifically allocated money to victims' services so that survivors of violence could access everything from therapy to safe housing -- but when the Senate failed to reauthorize it in 2019, they largely cut off the resources so many of these women count on.

Their failure to get to work is putting millions of people in harm's way -- **and that's personal to me.**

The women in our district are business leaders, elected officials, teachers, students, wives, mothers, daughters, and friends. They deserve protection and safeguards that allow them to do their jobs, learn in school, raise their kids, and live their lives without being worried about their safety.

I will stand up for each and every constituent when I'm in Congress, and I can promise you I will vote to reauthorize the Violence Against Women Act.

**[Join me in demanding Congress pass this critical legislation. It's way past time.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35766120/306076243/1014969382?ms=em21_210914_vawa&refcode=em21_210914_vawa&noskip=true-s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQ3MzZjNS04OTE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPi5wJtKUECbcbJQEsEa1v-S98zr0Js3t6fd2IMlE6U=&emci=db7d6fd6-8115-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=e0d736c5-8915-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=11385749)**

Thank you for supporting what's right.

\-- Christy [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35766122/306076244/-392799195?refcode=em21_210914_VAWA&recurring=1-s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQ3MzZjNS04OTE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPi5wJtKUECbcbJQEsEa1v-S98zr0Js3t6fd2IMlE6U=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35766127/306076246/-392799195?refcode=em21_210914_VAWA-s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQ3MzZjNS04OTE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPi5wJtKUECbcbJQEsEa1v-S98zr0Js3t6fd2IMlE6U=)

It’s wrong, and in my view it’s i Friend, Joe Biden’s executive order mandating vaccines for millions of Americans has taken federal overreach to a new level. [**I’ve consistently opposed mask mandates, vaccine mandates, and vaccine passports because our government needs to trust its citizens to make these important decisions for themselves. **](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=55a4fcae0b124d25b24feab0c49624cd&_e=GjBtbDxLsV3THEa9AKOdj6TAe_p49rlIIzmrqB1hRFuk6_XVWKpLyAzCYERiUX7pfO5JIYxhXSRlC5C_m2jQECZ4Kj-_uF6OlgvDDtYY-QkUZZd05SXxQ0GpfOSQ9kCNpeRGlZTBlA0TEsfK1MMuoTnfvR0brna4pV6woHnU9FfmmkRQaBvf4fgPSAD17irdcZ5JO_jvCYO8CH_8M8_wQ46ZZ9D3RpcSOaR9RUofOYqnB14fmCf47mFga-bgEg7Z0HWNWGYXQVVzHTcy5USiEVe4CkWWOyjaGb0du_UY-ow6QBS_WryOIcOoL3leQUNJbnUW3x0jhPdSbxSbQyPnDkXRQzT-t8aGOY3H33oqiW-SINteEmaofDLfNQcNJgualJglWB6qJ9krG3viwNpmDjf0wbnpOtWPeFT58OufNJpDBxKlAUAN56S44XR0si94Db-noZ_0284gvjbZWkMdlHZ7j4zR28T-IBXZQ_xcF76Ig2SI6i7tqAhAWuE2OZJf) I believe we MUST respect individual liberties and trust Kansans to make decisions for themselves and their families. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Humbly asking if you can make your first online donation before tomorrow's drive ends
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends -
In Mark’s first Senate campaign, he received a historic number of individual donations that powered him to victory. And in a race as close as ours, they all counted.
Mark was very proud of that fact.
But today, we’re asking: Is there anything we can say to convince YOU to make your first online contribution to his re-election campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to an end tomorrow?
Especially since we’ve fallen behind in this crucial FEC fundraising deadline month.
This is a big deal:
[**Can you please make a contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign today? We’ve fallen behind on our fundraising goals and need your help to catch up.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210914-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1329_6688874_Rdu2PW&akid=1329%2E6688874%2ERdu2PW)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210914-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1329_6688874_Rdu2PW&akid=1329%2E6688874%2ERdu2PW)**
Thank you in advance for all you’ve done and for giving today. It means a lot.
— Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1329%2E6688874%2ERdu2PW).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
