name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: More Florida - Less Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Fight the Biden tyranny! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=56f0cb46d5&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Ranty, dictatorial Biden is back! Apparently, he's trying to distract from his approval rating in the 30s by trying new unconstitutional mandates.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=13c38abac5&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who never ever will hold Biden accountable!**

Been a rough year for the country under Biden.

Inflation over 8% now (not seen since Carter). A shameful and treacherous Afghanistan withdrawal that left Americans behind enemy lines. A crashing economy. Race problems. A humanitarian disaster on the Southern Border.

No wonder Biden wants to change the topic. There is literally nothing going right and he's destroyed everything he's touched.

So his new thing? Killing American businesses and taking on America's governors, like Gov. DeSantis!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e882c6f43d&e=afa21b7626)
---
| _Biden rolled out a slew of measures to boost vaccination rates nationwide, requiring proof of vaccination for federal workers and anyone working at a business with at least 100 employees. If people choose to opt out, they will have to submit to weekly COVID-19 testing, a costly and cumbersome alternative to the free vaccine.

He then turned to take on Gov. DeSantis.

After blasting the nearly 80 million Americans who have not gotten vaccinated, the president turned his ire to GOP governors, particularly Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis and Texas Gov. Greg Abbott.

“To make matters worse, there are elected officials actively working to undermine the fight against COVID-19," he said. "Instead of encouraging people to get vaccinated and mask up, they’re ordering mobile morgues for the unvaccinated dying from COVID in their communities.

"Right now, local school officials are trying to keep children safe in a pandemic while their governor picks a fight with them and even threatens their salaries or their jobs. Talk about bullying in schools," Biden added.

"If they’ll not help, if these governors won’t help us beat the pandemic, I’ll use my power as president to get them out of the way," he threatened.

“How could we get to the point in this country where you would not let them earn a living because of their choice on the vaccine?” DeSantis said. “I just think that’s fundamentally wrong. I do not believe that people should lose their jobs over this issue, and we will fight that.”_

I agree with Gov. DeSantis!

Since the start, Florida has led the way. While Gov. DeSantis has made the vaccine and monoclonal antibodies widely available- over 90% of Florida's most vulnerable seniors have received the vaccine- Florida has refused to mandate action, either masks or vaccines.

As a result, Florida is booming AND we are in the bottom third of states in terms of new infections, and infections per million residents.

As for Biden? Twitter influencer Comfortably Smug put it best:

**_“Two weeks to slow the spread is now ‘give us your two weeks notice,'"_**

Biden is a decrepit tyrant and all states, including Florida, need to fight him. HARD.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8f06d0b878&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **As usual, Florida- and Gov. DeSantis- is leading the way. But my question is, WHERE'S OUR LEADERS IN CONGRESS???**

As Biden flails from one disaster of his own making to another, he's using this unconstitutional power grab- far from the first of his regime- to distract from his failures.

_But why aren't Republicans in Congress speaking up? Why can't they use the power they are given to put a check and balance on this jerk?_

Biden's incompetence will go down in history. He won't last the entire term. But we can stop him from his worst offenses.

We must use the power of Congress to investigate and slow down his agenda. Make it grind to a stop. Use parliamentary procedure. and then take back Congress in 2022 and impeach him AND Kamala!

_I'm not an impotent Swamper. I'm a soldier. I will hold Biden and his sycophants accountable. I will vote to impeach and investigate his corrupt regime. My Democrat opponent, Democrat Darren Soto, will not._

What Biden has done- and keeps doing- is impeachable. We must take back Congress in 2022 and oust this demented fool!

We need to change Congress first. That's the only way we hold him accountable. Right now it's all on the governors, but we need stronger leaders in Congress too! [Help me get elected and impeach Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=79143d0627&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=db9b510d70&e=afa21b7626)? I got more votes here than any Republican ever in 2020. It's a red-trending area in a red-trending state! We can win it in 2022.

No more "nice guy" Swampy uniparty politics. Help me get to Congress and impeach him!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=710ddcc729&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9c672c3ece&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=496af98e15&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ddca7b0a1f&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=d191b7be97) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=d191b7be97).

subject: The Big Endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Picking up big momentum |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9eebd3e211&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the proud America First Patriot leading the charge in America’s audit and Election integrity around the country.

**And President Trump just endorsed my campaign for Secretary of State of Arizona.**

>From the very beginning I backed President Trump. From the very beginning I KNEW that Arizona was stolen from President Trump by the conniving Democrats in the coup of the millennium. I paid for the initial hearings out of pocket and I spoke up when others were silent.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fb20b3e7b0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Look at what President Trump had to say:_

**_“It is my great honor to endorse a true warrior, Representative Mark Finchem, of the Great State of Arizona, for the position of Secretary of State. He is a patriot who has fought for our Country right from his earliest moments in government. Mark was willing to say what few others had the courage to say. In addition to his incredibly powerful stance on the massive Voter Fraud that took place in the 2020 Presidential Election Scam, he is strong on Crime, Borders, our currently under siege Second Amendment, and loves our Military and our Vets. Mark will also be fighting hard for further Tax and Regulation Cuts. Mark Finchem has my Complete and Total Endorsement. He will never let the people of Arizona down!” – President Trump_**

Thank you, President Trump for your endorsement. You are leading the way on restoring election integrity. I am truly honored to be recognized for the hard work I put in and will continue to do to restore the integrity of our elections.

This is huge news. This is not only a validation of all of our good work in Arizona but this is a STRONG statement that the Fake News Media can’t cover up. We have the President on our side in Arizona.

**_And now with President Trump, and your continued support, there is nothing that can stop America’s Audit going NATIONAL._**

This is why I am writing you _urgently_ today. This is a tremendous opportunity to strike a blow to the Radical Left who stole the election in 2020. But to take advantage,_[I need your support now to press the attack.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f8f8aaf0e9&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ca04dab814&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| ***JOIN ME AND PRESIDENT TRUMP***
In 2022, the Secretary of State Races will be the most critical to watch. Despite the fact that we are about to drop HUGE news from the Maricopa Audit, the good work that we do in Arizona can only be CEMENTED when we have an America First Patriot overseeing the elections, not a Corrupt Leftist like Katie Hobbs!

**_And that is exactly what I will do as Secretary of State in Arizona. I will never let the people of Arizona down!_**

But there are already attacks from all sides, and we _only expect those to increase_!
**Legal attacks, media attacks, political attacks. **At this point, I wake up expecting a new one.

**And now with President Trump validating and joining our movement in Arizona, nothing can stop us.**

[_But I need your help. Donate TODAY to join me and President Trump in restoring election integrity around the country!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f93867e2c4&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2e51d83013&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| I am proud to go on record stating that there is more than enough evidence to show clear and convincing fraud in 2020.

**It is our duty to recall the electors and Arizona MUST decertify the 2020 election results.**

_This is the only way to stop election fraud in the future. This is the only way to fight back against the unjust, incompetent, and evil coup of a Presidency that is the Joe Biden administration. [Join the fight today!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3256bb1127&e=44b8c466b0)_
[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d7a605532b&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c9b9e392ee&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. President Trump just endorsed my campaign. We must raise what is needed to defeat the corrupt Democrats. I have to raise $75k by the end of this month to meet my fundraising numbers. [Will you contribute $15, $35, $100 or more to help me get there?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2f6dbfbaa4&e=44b8c466b0) Every amount helps!

He will never let the people of Arizona down!” – President Trump Thank you, President Trump for your endorsement. You are leading the way on restoring election integrity. I am truly honored to be recognized for the hard work I put in and will continue to do to restore the integrity of our elections. This is huge news. This is not only a validation of all of our good work in Arizona but this is a STRONG statement that the Fake News Media can’t cover up. We have the President on our side in Arizona. And now with President Trump, and your continued support, there is nothing that can stop America’s Audit going NATIONAL. This is why I am writing you urgently today. This is a tremendous opportunity to strike a blow to the Radical Left who stole the election in 2020. But to take advantage, | | *JOIN ME AND PRESIDENT TRUMP In 2022, the Secretary of State Races will be the most critical to watch. Despite the fact that we are about to drop HUGE news from the Maricopa Audit, the good work that we do in Arizona can only be CEMENTED when we have an America First Patriot overseeing the elections, not a Corrupt Leftist like Katie Hobbs! And that is exactly what I will do as Secretary of State in Arizona. I will never let the people of Arizona down! But there are already attacks from all sides, and we only expect those to increase! Legal attacks, media attacks, political attacks. At this point, I wake up expecting a new one. And now with President Trump validating and joining our movement in Arizona, nothing can stop us. | | I am proud to go on record stating that there is more than enough evidence to show clear and convincing fraud in 2020. It is our duty to recall the electors and Arizona MUST decertify the 2020 election results. This is the only way to stop election fraud in the future. This is the only way to fight back against the unjust, incompetent, and evil coup of a Presidency that is the Joe Biden administration. God Bless You, | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot P.S. President Trump just endorsed my campaign. We must raise what is needed to defeat the corrupt Democrats. I have to raise $75k by the end of this month to meet my fundraising numbers. Every amount helps! PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is:** Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

We’ll be blunt:
#

We’ll be blunt: We’re reaching out because our fundraising is pacing behind this month, and we need your support right now to help us catch up.
[**Can you donate $3 or whatever you can afford today to help us close the gap and elect Cheri Beasley? We’re coming up on an official FEC deadline, so this would be the worst time for our campaign to fall short of a goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35768291/306084147/1741212721?refcode2=243ef0fb-8f15-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210914-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDNlZjBmYi04ZjE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELZrh_fa4YqQ4FWsI7p077jb_fA9CgXzPlBqofC_rSM=)
Republicans are raising massive amounts of cash to win this race and take back the Senate majority.
_The Hill_ just reported that a Republican super PAC “is expected to drop at least $10 million to boost Budd.” Ted Budd is Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate in this race, and last quarter, he pumped $250,000 of his own money into his campaign.
That’s why it’s so important that we hit this fundraising goal before we publicly report our numbers after the FEC deadline. It will send a clear message that our campaign has the momentum and resources required to flip this seat.
But the truth is the month is almost halfway over, and we’re only 32% of the way to our goal.
Unlike a super PAC or self-funder, our campaign is powered by lots of people giving what they can. So this is why we’re reaching out to you.
[**Please make a donation of any amount to help us elect Cheri Beasley, flip North Carolina and expand Democrats’ Senate majority! clean_body: We’ll be blunt: We’ll be blunt: We’re reaching out because our fundraising is pacing behind this month, and we need your support right now to help us catch up. = Republicans are raising massive amounts of cash to win this race and take back the Senate majority. The Hill just reported that a Republican super PAC “is expected to drop at least $10 million to boost Budd.” Ted Budd is Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate in this race, and last quarter, he pumped $250,000 of his own money into his campaign. That’s why it’s so important that we hit this fundraising goal before we publicly report our numbers after the FEC deadline. It will send a clear message that our campaign has the momentum and resources required to flip this seat. But the truth is the month is almost halfway over, and we’re only 32% of the way to our goal. Unlike a super PAC or self-funder, our campaign is powered by lots of people giving what they can. So this is why we’re reaching out to you. = All our best, Team Beasley = * Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
Before midnight tonight, I need to raise an additional $3,500 toward my September End-Of-Quarter fundraising goal. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=3b6f040125564f2a8b64c9e929dde564&_e=e9c_Lgun79h1-xrguT-ATpncHykMa4KfZUqsZByRSyPczYXY0tfyPpIhvDxVmQcGjA1v89SBqpi-o4CFJni_7RUGHnOSskDse8jnrGUA1vYxRp71n-LxOA_h4g6DwKdUnmJ2FrFl6w3b7Y0EdgzyUnHR2nObt-iQREBfzkOzZFHYA0952S7IlDZ2d8KjFIu8D7boVJau6fA8pg6jLjtCrP5rFL27XaFS2CupVPdDAiXRy0NcQQhNF3NwibSHqMMbRRFPFlIZ2DUFsm-IVP9AIvTSctR_bC_GGMArf5vVaJZuwVH-ue73WytuZlfEcV5fiefXkoqMKT27EHHwInZ02eEgz1tT8jTud4HOylL2RqwfvG0_KVeFbYL1qWz5jOyrPHQK6S8UKZJvidQ4yvY43IoplZfisnIFBOTecE1TDKPMFM_w97WJXpeYsQeJR0CapjtvcwMhM-28QkjDtNHcLg%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

Here is hoping that you had a nice weekend.

Today, as I do every Monday, I was looking over weekend fundraising numbers with my campaign manager and noticed we didn't make as much headway as I hoped we would.

_**Why does this matter to you?**_

Because the House and Senate are barreling toward passing some of the biggest tax increases in history – with only Democrat support - and without giving the American public so much as a month to scrutinize their complete makeover of American society.

**I could give you $3.5 trillion reasons to lend me a helping hand this Monday** , but in the interest of time I’ll just give you one: Democrats have a narrow 5 seat Majority in the House; **I can win the race against Oregon’s Peter DeFazio and help catapult Republicans to the House Majority**.

[**But I need your help today.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=3b6f040125564f2a8b64c9e929dde564&_e=e9c_Lgun79h1-xrguT-ATpncHykMa4KfZUqsZByRSyPczYXY0tfyPpIhvDxVmQcGjA1v89SBqpi-o4CFJni_7RUGHnOSskDse8jnrGUA1vYxRp71n-LxOA_h4g6DwKdUnmJ2FrFl6w3b7Y0EdgzyUnHR2nObt-iQREBfzkOzZFHYA0952S7IlDZ2d8KjFIu8D7boVJau6fA8pg6jLjtCrP5rFL27XaFS2CupVPdDAiXRy0NcQQhNF3NwibSHqMMb1ogbpqMc9u219Ukul1nyqjYu08ZF4ud5NrGHsNTsNBQddoonumWrqMSNUVYz_eQQ7vY2ghgQd3ZpTvBe29RZCy24zNob-ICKEYICwl-hlJffJkZ9GI0JWnGKRMr-MDbl2fkBeGjYwttkQdlveLQoOZ3g8Ced02mPn_GGrxkTukyVe8yFxv5AHsiqQvWfkgqBdlX6aYAlIw9joxDfgNVqLA%3D%3D)

**Last week I wrote to you laying out what needed to happen before September 30th to meet our quarterly fundraising goal of $250,000**. Today, I’m writing to update you on where things stand:
* **Over the weekend** we raised $11,534

* Which leaves me with **$59,526 left** to raise before September 30th

Today, as I do every Monday, I was looking over weekend fundraising numbers with my campaign manager and noticed we didn't make as much headway as I hoped we would. Why does this matter to you? Because the House and Senate are barreling toward passing some of the biggest tax increases in history – with only Democrat support - and without giving the American public so much as a month to scrutinize their complete makeover of American society. I could give you $3.5 trillion reasons to lend me a helping hand this Monday , but in the interest of time I’ll just give you one: Democrats have a narrow 5 seat Majority in the House; I can win the race against Oregon’s Peter DeFazio and help catapult Republicans to the House Majority. Last week I wrote to you laying out what needed to happen before September 30th to meet our quarterly fundraising goal of $250,000. Today, I’m writing to update you on where things stand: Over the weekend we raised $11,534 Which leaves me with $59,526 left to raise before September 30th Meaning Ihave to raise $3,500 every day** between now and then to hit my quarterly goal With sincere thanks Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Right now, we're fighting our way out of **the massive COVID-19 spike in Arizona**. The Delta variant has spread like wildfire through our unvaccinated population, and more kids than ever are getting sick and dying.

**We should be using every tool at our disposal — vaccines, masks, social distancing, and more — to make sure we slow the spread.** And when it comes to mandates, cities and towns should have the authority to mandate whatever makes the most sense for _their_ employees.

Unfortunately, our current Attorney General seems to be a lot _less_ concerned with the health of Arizonans and a lot _more_ concerned with his Senate run. Brnovich is going after Tucson for requiring its employees to get a COVID-19 vaccine — something he announced the same week that the COVID-19 death toll reached **_19,000_** in Arizona.

A recent survey showed the majority of Arizonans actually _support_ vaccine and mask mandates to help get us back to normal**.** But the vocal minority who oppose such policies are, you guessed it, Republican Primary voters. There's no denying it, Brnovich is **eroding local control** and **putting people's lives in danger** to win over the increasingly unhinged Republican base.

For too long, this office has been controlled by political interests and corporate gain, rather than the needs of the people. **As Attorney General, I promise to fight nonstop to protect Arizonans from this pandemic.**

**[By chipping in now, you can join the fight for a safer Arizona>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35768771/306085848/2127152568?refcode=X_091421_BrnovichVaccines_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmU5ZGEyNS05MjE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BTARjgjhUbxJRz0iZdVhq1xBFRm7b3QJPuxnA-gLNyQ=)**

Thank you!

_\-- Diego_ | **Rep. Diego Rodriguez is running for Attorney General to be the People's Attorney, focused on our needs instead of partisan stunts. As a lifelong Democrat, a prosecutor, a defense attorney, and now as a State Representative, Diego is the most experienced and most qualified candidate that we can trust to fight for our rights.**

[**Will you join Team Diego by chipping in a few dollars now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35768772/306085849/2127152568?refcode=X_091421_BrnovichVaccines_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmU5ZGEyNS05MjE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BTARjgjhUbxJRz0iZdVhq1xBFRm7b3QJPuxnA-gLNyQ=)

name: Team Inslee
subject: Official Climate Survey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
How has the climate crisis affected you?

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/yr7KJREyEYSZ/NHpjUEt4THBNQjVkWS93d0lxNk01cHhtTzFVVFUvM3dzbzZQODF1bU55QzM3R00rNEtoZzcvOGhhallTZktQTWdUeHlZWjZ5N0wwRHFKbENFcUEvc1p5SUs3cFpNTnVwVWhUd1R4VVphVm89S0/UXliTXVhS3NCNUVFc2VuUElJc0RGS1VsN2YzaDhZdDdUMHZLd3JZY2lTVT0S1) Friend, Today, we look back on a summer that was defined by the climate crisis. Wildfires and droughts in the west. Deadly heat waves throughout the country. Unprecedented flooding in Tennessee and abroad. And Hurricane Ida, yet another "once-in-a-century" storm, devastated Louisiana and wreaked havoc on communities up and down the Eastern Seaboard. At this moment in history, Jay wanted us to reach out and ask: How has the climate crisis affected _you_? How long have you been in the fight for climate action? [**_Take our official climate action survey to tell us._**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/V4dzSd272zBp/NHpjUEt4THBNQjVkWS93d0lxNk01cHhtTzFVVFUvM3dzbzZQODF1bU55QzM3R00rNEtoZzcvOGhhallTZktQTWdUeHlZWjZ5N0wwRHFKbENFcUEvc1p5SUs3cFpNTnVwVWhUd1R4VVphVm89S0/UXliTXVhS3NCNUVFc2VuUElJc0RGS1VsN2YzaDhZdDdUMHZLd3JZY2lTVT0S1) [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/V4dzSd272zBp/NHpjUEt4THBNQjVkWS93d0lxNk01cHhtTzFVVFUvM3dzbzZQODF1bU55QzM3R00rNEtoZzcvOGhhallTZktQTWdUeHlZWjZ5N0wwRHFKbENFcUEvc1p5SUs3cFpNTnVwVWhUd1R4VVphVm89S0/UXliTXVhS3NCNUVFc2VuUElJc0RGS1VsN2YzaDhZdDdUMHZLd3JZY2lTVT0S1) The climate crisis, like the COVID-19 crisis, is one that none of us can solve on our own. But by sharing our stories, raising our voices, and refusing to let up, we can -- and will -- bring real solutions to bear. [**_Today is about sharing our stories. Please take two minutes to respond to our official climate survey today._**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/V4dzSd272zBp/NHpjUEt4THBNQjVkWS93d0lxNk01cHhtTzFVVFUvM3dzbzZQODF1bU55QzM3R00rNEtoZzcvOGhhallTZktQTWdUeHlZWjZ5N0wwRHFKbENFcUEvc1p5SUs3cFpNTnVwVWhUd1R4VVphVm89S0/UXliTXVhS3NCNUVFc2VuUElJc0RGS1VsN2YzaDhZdDdUMHZLd3JZY2lTVT0S1) Thanks, Team Inslee | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/D_r2cG9w9kc2/NHpjUEt4THBNQjVkWS93d0lxNk01cHhtTzFVVFUvM3dzbzZQODF1bU55QzM3R00rNEtoZzcvOGhhallTZktQTWdUeHlZWjZ5N0wwRHFKbENFcUEvc1p5SUs3cFpNTnVwVWhUd1R4VVphVm89S0/UXliTXVhS3NCNUVFc2VuUElJc0RGS1VsN2YzaDhZdDdUMHZLd3JZY2lTVT0S1)

clean_body: How has the climate crisis affected you? | Friend, Today, we look back on a summer that was defined by the climate crisis. Wildfires and droughts in the west. Deadly heat waves throughout the country. Unprecedented flooding in Tennessee and abroad. And Hurricane Ida, yet another "once-in-a-century" storm, devastated Louisiana and wreaked havoc on communities up and down the Eastern Seaboard. At this moment in history, Jay wanted us to reach out and ask: How has the climate crisis affected you? How long have you been in the fight for climate action? The climate crisis, like the COVID-19 crisis, is one that none of us can solve on our own. But by sharing our stories, raising our voices, and refusing to let up, we can -- and will -- bring real solutions to bear. Thanks, Team Inslee |

name: Brian Hawkins
subject: The truth about Democrats from a black pastor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hawkins for Congress
body:
I'm a threat to Nancy Pelosi because I'm Black, Conservative, Back the Blue and Protect the 2nd Amendment and I am running for Congress. I'm Black, Conservative, Back the Blue and Protect the 2nd Amendment and I am running for Congress. |
---
Fellow Conservative, allow me to introduce myself....

My name is Brian Hawkins - I grew up in poverty, on welfare in the inner-city, and what's more, I'm an EX-FELON turned pastor, father of three and city councilman. **Now, I'm running for Congress.**

**[In a moment, I am going to ask you to contribute just $5 or $10 to my campaign before my fundraising deadline on September 30th](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=569a49bb6ca04d4d92bb7e43a3f4395b&_e=pGC_7vVK7KoBGrfGyX_6lCb_iMJteckaxRZIo3QT8CGY4gTU5L64tgWglFrkD5cK9ltIuzeJumwHT9mtkeHjDGcHIRYheLkdIcpB0WsVgYhxQ2wWy5DWdqZ5PxIghQqD1h5h97JJNbsbo18MLTil23ZjIs7oEeuvuX9kJcYqllU5VAHrqmrM91s_6KVrQuGPRngjb2kr5ZYzRaTfYOi69N7zKaIr7pAWCpltaPjtdGYHtG6IkdTmMM_bh8glvYqDug0xt0pzaYGGbryvlOLVvoOy8MOYNTx65i5OMuRhaVBjCTQmcYCjx0jSCbgc11gsZFM34_cGYaZs8sOr7_P7ODpY2s7AUihBHtzvSBBHypEU5XWqNfyNmU9fxxjJ0fOfVGDkZ3foh3o6bEGa80Jx7V3hHM9PE0eUp-vKCj4MJVMlZcp63p6Ji0taqx3SL1lycYoEwvcdSsl9EvVcZKL0AB8WbxNIQN5om2irjomosHA%3D)** - **but first, you need to know why my campaign for Congress is DANGEROUS to Democrats like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden...**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=569a49bb6ca04d4d92bb7e43a3f4395b&_e=pGC_7vVK7KoBGrfGyX_6lCb_iMJteckaxRZIo3QT8CGY4gTU5L64tgWglFrkD5cK9ltIuzeJumwHT9mtkeHjDGcHIRYheLkdIcpB0WsVgYhxQ2wWy5DWdqZ5PxIghQqD1h5h97JJNbsbo18MLTil23ZjIs7oEeuvuX9kJcYqllU5VAHrqmrM91s_6KVrQuGPRngjb2kr5ZYzRaTfYOi69N7zKaIr7pAWCpltaPjtdGYHtG6IkdTmMM_bh8glvYqDug0xt0pzaYGGbryvlOLVvnqLs7DjmOV7L5kLWdU2wAndxTdSIgQbkp06vNYlqZpjN9JEV3gYfLPCGEAVoQVFkBDO6Pxf3wJiwUS7smcbx3qfgwtebzgwehzfdEAzWqo-rV1wyYEtSNjFT7xjQAmQwWcdxl7fHnZ0vWixR7g1Idbop8HfrpUrX2aSJQfgzr_pfsegNaVOFWpKlGYM3Bn7kYYBiUtsTOGoZWxiNnRu190%3D)
**I'm Black. I'm Conservative. I Back the Blue.
I Protect the 2nd Amendment. I am Pro-Life.**
I am the _exact_ type of Republican that threatens the radical-Left's narrative about conservatives and destroys their stronghold on minority communities - **[My candidicy is dangerous to the future of the Democrat Party.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=569a49bb6ca04d4d92bb7e43a3f4395b&_e=pGC_7vVK7KoBGrfGyX_6lCb_iMJteckaxRZIo3QT8CGY4gTU5L64tgWglFrkD5cK9ltIuzeJumwHT9mtkeHjDGcHIRYheLkdIcpB0WsVgYhxQ2wWy5DWdqZ5PxIghQqD1h5h97JJNbsbo18MLTil23ZjIs7oEeuvuX9kJcYqllU5VAHrqmrM91s_6KVrQuGPRngjb2kr5ZYzRaTfYOi69N7zKaIr7pAWCpltaPjtdGYHtG6IkdTmMM_bh8glvYqDug0xt0pzaYGGbryvlOLVvvJpdFDRF8krgrpgcbxVksSS7htvmWUJXFCZpuhzKL-AaFNvW4HXv_hdsaZ9BpR7f22RWkDbch04SjQPslXsXVm3jh-fE1q_9LB1EnsHXFXfj23_7SzkgnZlYV7nlH3PYKqx0flvGoNtGY9alK2F0EFTqeYDRA6mb8U2nxfml4JAa2yHsU5M2mUF3uFDTAWEPSB9T0Lw1L88QluAr4rlqOQ%3D)**

The Left believes I'm a victim because of my race. But I'm a free-thinking American blessed with so much opportunity. **[That's why I'm running for Congress](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=569a49bb6ca04d4d92bb7e43a3f4395b&_e=pGC_7vVK7KoBGrfGyX_6lCb_iMJteckaxRZIo3QT8CGY4gTU5L64tgWglFrkD5cK9ltIuzeJumwHT9mtkeHjDGcHIRYheLkdIcpB0WsVgYhxQ2wWy5DWdqZ5PxIghQqD1h5h97JJNbsbo18MLTil23ZjIs7oEeuvuX9kJcYqllU5VAHrqmrM91s_6KVrQuGPRngjb2kr5ZYzRaTfYOi69N7zKaIr7pAWCpltaPjtdGYHtG6IkdTmMM_bh8glvYqDug0xt0pzaYGGbryvlOLVvhjgBcjNmRP_5-T3sxPkCVp1st0XT1zIuR-n7fC2pW0H-IIIN6fw4aSYayFQQ01uy2Z9dFe6P6vwDb-XWxpPhLwt_xR-gsQlIcnfFQk0zMMitk567ihGOCmcoL8xTwXXFiDus7iYQbu0Pdk7l5IVKxcgHnlb-DgD3fzas0jA2ktHUIweLV3kyE_8NbaONwasNi12h6WVdYbl-Uloi1B7luY%3D)** to stop the generations of victimhood in the black community, to show that the Republican Party _is_ the party of diversity and inclusion.

**I am facing a HUGE fundraising deadline at the end of the month and my numbers will be made public to everyone, including Pelosi and Biden.**

[**DONATE BEFORE THE DEADLINE -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=569a49bb6ca04d4d92bb7e43a3f4395b&_e=pGC_7vVK7KoBGrfGyX_6lCb_iMJteckaxRZIo3QT8CGY4gTU5L64tgWglFrkD5cK9ltIuzeJumwHT9mtkeHjDGcHIRYheLkdIcpB0WsVgYhxQ2wWy5DWdqZ5PxIghQqD1h5h97JJNbsbo18MLTil23ZjIs7oEeuvuX9kJcYqllU5VAHrqmrM91s_6KVrQuGPRngjb2kr5ZYzRaTfYOi69N7zKaIr7pAWCpltaPjtdGYHtG6IkdTmMM_bh8glvYqDug0xt0pzaYGGbryvlOLVvlVxxdGhncEHqKfMTExM3J-T6ijzFkF6gErn7qhmJnocm6gFXWnBYoxKJnPX5zp5NZnnk_uLeAIFHPVlimE_P_SvGIYymqvK2lKXCn44r4z3bklLLgwSgSdIIvjDqL18N8blgWw_vtdnl4rMEmWH004JpxOEUWWJOiFSJdwHNax4mZ29_516tJoX6PyXl7r156XlNSK1Qt4HVQZzyxm3BH0%3D)

**[Can I count on you to join my team right now with a donation of $5 or $10? clean_body: I'm a threat to Nancy Pelosi because I'm Black, Conservative, Back the Blue and Protect the 2nd Amendment and I am running for Congress. I'm Black, Conservative, Back the Blue and Protect the 2nd Amendment and I am running for Congress. | Fellow Conservative, allow me to introduce myself.... My name is Brian Hawkins - I grew up in poverty, on welfare in the inner-city, and what's more, I'm an EX-FELON turned pastor, father of three and city councilman. Now, I'm running for Congress. - but first, you need to know why my campaign for Congress is DANGEROUS to Democrats like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden... I'm Black. I'm Conservative. I Back the Blue. I Protect the 2nd Amendment. I am Pro-Life. I am the exact type of Republican that threatens the radical-Left's narrative about conservatives and destroys their stronghold on minority communities - The Left believes I'm a victim because of my race. But I'm a free-thinking American blessed with so much opportunity. to stop the generations of victimhood in the black community, to show that the Republican Party is the party of diversity and inclusion. I am facing a HUGE fundraising deadline at the end of the month and my numbers will be made public to everyone, including Pelosi and Biden. Putting up strong fundraising numbers will show the Democrats that their stronghold on minority voters is on shakey ground, that people are waking up to their race-hustling agenda. God Bless, Pastor Brian Hawkins Republican for Congress FOLLOW ME ON SOCIAL MEDIA @REALPASTORBRIAN | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Don't want to receive any more of our emails? | Paid for by Hawkins for Congress

| Peter,

| The American people's patience with President Biden is wearing thin.
After this tyrant rushed to order 100 million Americans to bend the knee and submit to his onerous mandates, we are now inching closer and closer to a dictatorship...
We are no longer a free country when forced injections are coupled with all-out medical segregation! One way or another, this tyranny will not stand - let's send a clear message to the Swamp to [STOP THE MANDATES!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001134KUR80ikBF58ciPtDuCMyOjEsXeWtwmjhT6IYLfKgDr9_0mB8G9NAz6mxu-zrLGGHxuPRiiUKMJ3Kf7FHQo9XcAjxHbbMVUzoG-EBnbmFnEV54wpm7W0WDdOE3jHELKvvM3aLF0e-eSn_q6_L9p1bpAx-c3DWheq4POyfcS4HO9jGknca6bx0m-VyN0un7&c=96_wIFjLCNc86tWvatOXcRrBW1VsCghH37fYg2u1Thmo_-Pi6NKSJw==&ch=I0yfHI6Ndx__-wYCNC7UndGX5Byr_y4ljbbzedJcWlJ-WVS46VaZMw==)

| The Left's push for medical discrimination is the last stand for every freedom-loving American...
If we surrender our rights now, we aren't going to be getting them back anytime soon - that isn't how power-hungry tyrants in the Swamp operate!
Since they have made it clear that an all-out assault on our personal medical choices is their end goal, [we have to take a stand and fight RIGHT NOW!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001134KUR80ikBF58ciPtDuCMyOjEsXeWtwmjhT6IYLfKgDr9_0mB8G9NAz6mxu-zrLGGHxuPRiiUKMJ3Kf7FHQo9XcAjxHbbMVUzoG-EBnbmFnEV54wpm7W0WDdOE3jHELKvvM3aLF0e-eSn_q6_L9p1bpAx-c3DWheq4POyfcS4HO9jGknca6bx0m-VyN0un7&c=96_wIFjLCNc86tWvatOXcRrBW1VsCghH37fYg2u1Thmo_-Pi6NKSJw==&ch=I0yfHI6Ndx__-wYCNC7UndGX5Byr_y4ljbbzedJcWlJ-WVS46VaZMw==)
Can I count on you to join me?
I will always fight for our right to live freely, but I NEED YOU to take a stand with me!

body:
CNN knows that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year’s midterm elections. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=801f48cd22544e2ebff3e34ea431267b&_e=5BKmG2lYUObzt2y5YB2Z5Q7APewrAYzKKB0hNQd0n2WmCGhpY4pYujI7D04Fm84G6tlgjUN_Kx0QSELcvItVxxjY8K1uAEq3fSwDb_kEfSLnyW6M_OUUbrL6d4ucdB3QiY3lkrKVLu6Q7jTH7fkD8YT2RNn3Hi3CiUeFgY46DRMsR92yHmBzhT2s03bek_aX3l5cA54Isj8FLgeSnrfLHvYERW1Kelm4DTCeoc0yPU1oRJDnnOww4S3da-4cdpuQNoKZh96qv26kEDNntrotSGwSy-gYTR4xTazMAvs61kqQRx7v__30w-XRjzUjHTkd31e43NGpV1hM5ePSifZoYHJLKq2tEmOzfD666JNsLtkXwcH9BMSdUOGXvDWV7uZUOlbxenAKvp5wClOJAIl1LfL6i2YiJHnKWjH5ND5il_ILRztFS5YqRVEMTJJpZCho_7dnNSk0Sw6lGgtH2YHZo-3-Eedk5Re6eKXwmRsvcgg%3D)

---
Peter,

I knew it was only a matter of time before left-leaning news networks would start attempting to slander our campaign at every possible opportunity.

CNN has stepped into the role they've come to embrace over the years: The Democrat Party's mouthpiece. _Recently they published a story about me that couldn't be further from the truth._

The truth is that Democrats - including the top executives at CNN - know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections.

**Peter, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy.**

My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. **[Can I count on you to help us ensure we hit our goal before midnight with a gift of $10, $25, $100- or even my favorite number, $34!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=801f48cd22544e2ebff3e34ea431267b&_e=5BKmG2lYUObzt2y5YB2Z5Q7APewrAYzKKB0hNQd0n2WmCGhpY4pYujI7D04Fm84G6tlgjUN_Kx0QSELcvItVxxjY8K1uAEq3fSwDb_kEfSLnyW6M_OUUbrL6d4ucdB3QiY3lkrKVLu6Q7jTH7fkD8YT2RNn3Hi3CiUeFgY46DRMsR92yHmBzhT2s03bek_aX3l5cA54Isj8FLgeSnrfLHvYERW1Kelm4DTCeoc0yPU1oRJDnnOww4S3da-4cdpuQNoKZh96qv26kEDNntrotSH-WIKFldGEyrm_kA-Q5CJGh76lxwtaznORB53c3U-lHQWQlI8SVOEA3gB9z0H8-hdA5btFO8w2gNq88yv2CD09zGZZ0Po74s7V3FiKKwAAXKVbYrBkDdrWy0kVLPg-KPE5y88w9-USKBFLG4BvAYNM9HvV0Rme_7kG6Sqb8PHU9JuYqSKmdO_Tilu_0FNwcTDHcMEe6kemvsSyzyKzqO6k%3D)**

[** STAND WITH ME AGAINST THE LIBERAL MEDIA -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=801f48cd22544e2ebff3e34ea431267b&_e=5BKmG2lYUObzt2y5YB2Z5Q7APewrAYzKKB0hNQd0n2WmCGhpY4pYujI7D04Fm84G6tlgjUN_Kx0QSELcvItVxxjY8K1uAEq3fSwDb_kEfSLnyW6M_OUUbrL6d4ucdB3QiY3lkrKVLu6Q7jTH7fkD8YT2RNn3Hi3CiUeFgY46DRMsR92yHmBzhT2s03bek_aX3l5cA54Isj8FLgeSnrfLHvYERW1Kelm4DTCeoc0yPU1oRJDnnOww4S3da-4cdpuQNoKZh96qv26kEDNntrotSMzEKbnwrC9WtdmnnJ6qEkeKag0pBvag60nvj5YsNJhD6Qo_2NJyAE393Y6_OlbKCKWNahmJvem4PTatsM8Jx7Y-5hs94ijsNL9hVV32aqVu-s1_4bzO0Y9Z_lJtweI3KeyoIbbD5yU9YgXkOmi6WeaykswyqazH0IACrRCyVcO0WoFcJ8r6Sm4b5MpLMpb0MAEpz3ZWwb-FA9X8Fn-lvvQ%3D)
When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on - or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way.

I chose the latter because the future of our country - and the future of Georgia - is too important to sit on the sidelines.

**[You would be doing me a great honor if you would support our campaign to take back the Senate with a contribution today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=801f48cd22544e2ebff3e34ea431267b&_e=5BKmG2lYUObzt2y5YB2Z5Q7APewrAYzKKB0hNQd0n2WmCGhpY4pYujI7D04Fm84G6tlgjUN_Kx0QSELcvItVxxjY8K1uAEq3fSwDb_kEfSLnyW6M_OUUbrL6d4ucdB3QiY3lkrKVLu6Q7jTH7fkD8YT2RNn3Hi3CiUeFgY46DRMsR92yHmBzhT2s03bek_aX3l5cA54Isj8FLgeSnrfLHvYERW1Kelm4DTCeoc0yPU1oRJDnnOww4S3da-4cdpuQNoKZh96qv26kEDNntrotSNPxyKuGwpYlGZyLWlPej0xFqXilVMZ_Wb_9HPz0J71SVxqLl4vaEMxKLzWyDEkgfWheKkxBy4lseRrpYloSt-E2y_gP2yzRlY5Eh_0_6IMTTMWBv-5o5hDNRnd3CcWopDIOyp2P7O19jRXQ_aCCK1Zuuxsp8HDtEdkf6h2I9ercUh9Tpa0nxelNcAYYefbcyxVsbjPyfhciM7oeRpLhl9w%3D)**

Democrats know there is not a more critical Senate race than the one in Georgia, Peter, that's why the attacks on me are going to be constant between now and November 2022.

We've got to be ready for anything.

Thank you,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=801f48cd22544e2ebff3e34ea431267b&_e=5BKmG2lYUObzt2y5YB2Z5Q7APewrAYzKKB0hNQd0n2WmCGhpY4pYujI7D04Fm84G6tlgjUN_Kx0QSELcvItVxxjY8K1uAEq3fSwDb_kEfSLnyW6M_OUUbrL6d4ucdB3QiY3lkrKVLu6Q7jTH7fkD8YT2RNn3Hi3CiUeFgY46DRMsR92yHmBzhT2s03bek_aX3l5cA54Isj8FLgeSnrfLHvYERW1Kelm4DTCeoc0yPU1oRJDnnOww4S3da-4cdpuQNoKZh96qv26kEDNntrotSGTN71SPYmriAKsuxNTterYSy_ZT4LMRTyuVOKpi0_obCTHQTWq06EPuPILtdYeatMRJ7NWw3IRhH80HtbIC3qx8n7Tn5sjPCmbD8Dq5Hf0hlcCH_TSojwGj3ZcYrPZsNDIro4cuFT2WI_cMbUElxhajlakBaid67t_moHgz9yWJSjUcrb7b-tueWi4mieQgxsb-tvguzxA715lA-EkSzCY%3D)

subject: How radical is this…you’d be amazed
body:
The $3.5 trillion spending bill is unlike anything we’ve ever seen.
---
| | | | | | You're receiving this message because you signed up to receive emails from Smiley for Washington. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can unsubscribe at the bottom of this email.

| Dear Friend,
---
| When America is in hard times, spending alone is not the answer - but don't tell Patty Murray that. Murray is standing shoulder to shoulder with Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer to pass a $3.5 trillion spending bill that is considered the single most expensive legislation in American history, and that Socialist, Bernie Sanders, wrote it.
They're sliding in the Green New Deal, amnesty for illegal immigrants, expanding Medicare and funding union bailouts. If you ever wondered why our race is so important, look no further than this bill.
And the crazy thing is since Democrats don't have the votes to pass the bill using normal Senate procedures, they're planning to manipulate the legislative process and rush it through. That's right, they know this bill is bad for America so they're going to cram this down our throats in order to squeeze every last penny out of our pocket books.
Some have asked if our race is winnable... If you haven't seen the polls, less than a third of Washingtonians even want Patty Murray to run again and politicians in DC are underwater in every poll across the country...The answer is [YES!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y6wHSb_ITVADRSKk8W25vkyOLkAZrbluIRSE2PhGdfnx8YVBI03zK5Bn_6Vv49rH6klbcRDqSV6kIHD7qwCePk6jSc6GbWn4PgG3pb0oyNGgIVwlpoiIuGwMlKr-urPzx7y5ezNJnHyGEmbxsHbQzqY68_caI97bHsw7dJIYh-YLaJ0hmf9RuGTzku6i0FYSjsEQFutRIp8=&c=d_dLKrrRDM4qmzt3AKoqunJ2RTOY5zxJtLyziy_wghhOI_nefgctEA==&ch=Yg2URAMCq4jy7IwF2O2xMXei22BSbTZ01WgGPQ7Ps3mDQxtvNUN3jA==) This race is absolutely winnable and [THIS IS OUR CHANCE TO BE THE SEAT THAT FLIPS CONTROL OF THE SENATE IN 2022](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y6wHSb_ITVADRSKk8W25vkyOLkAZrbluIRSE2PhGdfnx8YVBI03zK5Bn_6Vv49rH6klbcRDqSV6kIHD7qwCePk6jSc6GbWn4PgG3pb0oyNGgIVwlpoiIuGwMlKr-urPzx7y5ezNJnHyGEmbxsHbQzqY68_caI97bHsw7dJIYh-YLaJ0hmf9RuGTzku6i0FYSjsEQFutRIp8=&c=d_dLKrrRDM4qmzt3AKoqunJ2RTOY5zxJtLyziy_wghhOI_nefgctEA==&ch=Yg2URAMCq4jy7IwF2O2xMXei22BSbTZ01WgGPQ7Ps3mDQxtvNUN3jA==). This is our chance to send someone from Washington State to Washington D.C. who will stop the madness, instead of someone who will be part of the problem.
But I need your help. Someone has to step up and take this fight on and I'm willing to do it - for all of us - but I can't do it alone.
[Will you pitch in $20, $50, $100 or more today to help me get there. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y6wHSb_ITVADRSKk8W25vkyOLkAZrbluIRSE2PhGdfnx8YVBI03zK5Bn_6Vv49rH6klbcRDqSV6kIHD7qwCePk6jSc6GbWn4PgG3pb0oyNGgIVwlpoiIuGwMlKr-urPzx7y5ezNJnHyGEmbxsHbQzqY68_caI97bHsw7dJIYh-YLaJ0hmf9RuGTzku6i0FYSjsEQFutRIp8=&c=d_dLKrrRDM4qmzt3AKoqunJ2RTOY5zxJtLyziy_wghhOI_nefgctEA==&ch=Yg2URAMCq4jy7IwF2O2xMXei22BSbTZ01WgGPQ7Ps3mDQxtvNUN3jA==)
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE $20](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y6wHSb_ITVADRSKk8W25vkyOLkAZrbluIRSE2PhGdfnx8YVBI03zK5Bn_6Vv49rHTbPD4GI4Tr_0FM1BEzcauRgfLc6QBzPqquDvL7cSmLwhCz42LC37JiS7KsSbMFtl7Gs39Sn6N_PeJYQ-xGp0WmHUmCtsOhT_1N1bhVztoiN_QsWpuBdLZAar8Kd0FMfZc11c6kcsV2rtu-Q2BwFi_B2blj71JHdC&c=d_dLKrrRDM4qmzt3AKoqunJ2RTOY5zxJtLyziy_wghhOI_nefgctEA==&ch=Yg2URAMCq4jy7IwF2O2xMXei22BSbTZ01WgGPQ7Ps3mDQxtvNUN3jA==)
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE $50](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y6wHSb_ITVADRSKk8W25vkyOLkAZrbluIRSE2PhGdfnx8YVBI03zK5Bn_6Vv49rH1sytziwdMHvULWvU76iJo8zRNrEZij9eWsjnIBdd5gzZesyq4W6oG89oymLcwIpssPiiOXflilS4D02ATa9RoGDysY8JBJew7YA58sV31RBB50cGy6vJPDLm405qcN5hTmDIKUGWUHASEtZxH6fgIV8LjSzy1Psa&c=d_dLKrrRDM4qmzt3AKoqunJ2RTOY5zxJtLyziy_wghhOI_nefgctEA==&ch=Yg2URAMCq4jy7IwF2O2xMXei22BSbTZ01WgGPQ7Ps3mDQxtvNUN3jA==)

| | | [CONTRIBUTE $100](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y6wHSb_ITVADRSKk8W25vkyOLkAZrbluIRSE2PhGdfnx8YVBI03zK5Bn_6Vv49rHdY-zZG8RQRfuPiXImk8-1DLb5U1HGX0Fhm3lYw_yEk4dAwFY4mzR1HqgpZyoBQCd0tqykgw_LooeMFNsQyuNEdEllpdD3Xf48Wez5P2t06k6mZfx1ZrBKyIcxWWRd6Xu-j50IdpakW4_VPCW-THcvYg2WKD1uz6D&c=d_dLKrrRDM4qmzt3AKoqunJ2RTOY5zxJtLyziy_wghhOI_nefgctEA==&ch=Yg2URAMCq4jy7IwF2O2xMXei22BSbTZ01WgGPQ7Ps3mDQxtvNUN3jA==)

| There is only one way to put an end to this out of control spending and that's by retiring Patty Murray and restoring checks and balances in Washington D.C.
[Please consider donating any amount today](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y6wHSb_ITVADRSKk8W25vkyOLkAZrbluIRSE2PhGdfnx8YVBI03zK5Bn_6Vv49rH6klbcRDqSV6kIHD7qwCePk6jSc6GbWn4PgG3pb0oyNGgIVwlpoiIuGwMlKr-urPzx7y5ezNJnHyGEmbxsHbQzqY68_caI97bHsw7dJIYh-YLaJ0hmf9RuGTzku6i0FYSjsEQFutRIp8=&c=d_dLKrrRDM4qmzt3AKoqunJ2RTOY5zxJtLyziy_wghhOI_nefgctEA==&ch=Yg2URAMCq4jy7IwF2O2xMXei22BSbTZ01WgGPQ7Ps3mDQxtvNUN3jA==) and I promise, this fight will be one I never back down from.
Thank you,
Tiffany

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: The real Luna
body:
We don't need another phony |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=ffb0455319&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend, You’ve probably seen the news this morning that President Trump endorsed my opponent, Anna Paulina Luna. I want to make sure you hear from me directly in response.

**Let me be very clear: I support President Trump and his policies 100%. That’s why, while Luna disappeared after badly losing the 2020 election, I volunteered as an election security attorney for President Trump in the Wisconsin recount. **

Here’s the truth about Anna Paulina Luna. In her own words, she is “ _able to take on different personalities depending on what image I am going for. I think getting into character of what you are selling is super important.”_

**That cynical phoniness is exactly what Luna is using to try to trick Florida Republicans in this election.**

Luna twice supported the Obama/Biden ticket, and now she’s playing a new character - even making up a new last name for herself - to get what she wants. It’s the game she’s played her whole adult life.

Unfortunately, it appears that President Trump was given bad information about Luna, just as he was in the recent special election in Texas where he endorsed the eventual loser in the GOP primary, instead of the true conservative Jake Ellzey who had the support of the Republican voters on the ground and is now in Congress.

**Our district has already been subjected to phony Charlie Crist who betrayed our party and is now trying to take out our fantastic Governor Ron DeSantis. Let’s be honest: Luna is just Crist in a skirt, and our district can’t afford that.**

Friend, I am determined to work harder than ever to earn your support and win the Republican nomination for Congress in Florida’s 13th District. _We need a candidate who TRULY supports President Trump and his policies, not a phony who will abandon our principles and our party the minute it benefits her._

God bless,
Amanda
---

clean_body: We don't need another phony | | | | | Dear Friend, You’ve probably seen the news this morning that President Trump endorsed my opponent, Anna Paulina Luna. I want to make sure you hear from me directly in response. Let me be very clear: I support President Trump and his policies 100%. That’s why, while Luna disappeared after badly losing the 2020 election, I volunteered as an election security attorney for President Trump in the Wisconsin recount. Here’s the truth about Anna Paulina Luna. In her own words, she is “ able to take on different personalities depending on what image I am going for. I think getting into character of what you are selling is super important.” That cynical phoniness is exactly what Luna is using to try to trick Florida Republicans in this election. Luna twice supported the Obama/Biden ticket, and now she’s playing a new character - even making up a new last name for herself - to get what she wants. It’s the game she’s played her whole adult life. Unfortunately, it appears that President Trump was given bad information about Luna, just as he was in the recent special election in Texas where he endorsed the eventual loser in the GOP primary, instead of the true conservative Jake Ellzey who had the support of the Republican voters on the ground and is now in Congress. Our district has already been subjected to phony Charlie Crist who betrayed our party and is now trying to take out our fantastic Governor Ron DeSantis. Let’s be honest: Luna is just Crist in a skirt, and our district can’t afford that. Friend, I am determined to work harder than ever to earn your support and win the Republican nomination for Congress in Florida’s 13th District. We need a candidate who TRULY supports President Trump and his policies, not a phony who will abandon our principles and our party the minute it benefits her. God bless, Amanda | Amanda Makki for Congress| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Amanda Makki, All rights reserved.

clean_body: we’re off to a bad start | | | = | | Derek, Terry launched an ambitious fundraising goal of raising $250,000 before he takes the debate stage on Thursday. But — and I’m disappointed to have to report this — we’re off to a really slow start. Take a look at today’s fundraising, compared to yesterday’s: = | = Do I need to remind folks how important it is that we stay on track? Glenn Youngkin has promised to spend $75 million on this race — that means we can’t afford to miss even one fundraising goal. If we do ... it could be game over. = | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you for doing what you can, Ellie Warner Finance Director Terry for VA = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

Peter,

I told you Biden didn't care about you.

He doesn't care about you or your freedoms. **He just mandated the Covid vaccine for 80 MILLION Americans.** The last time I checked, we live in a FREE Country.

_The Left is working overtime to CONTROL you, Peter._ **First,** they wanted to mandate MASKS, and **now** they're mandating VACCINES - can you believe it?

I think the vaccine is brilliant and I'm very pleased with how quickly we turned it around, _despite the Trump haters who said we'd never get it done._ **However, mandating vaccines is simply UN-AMERICAN.**

As if it wasn't obvious, I totally OPPOSE this liberal overreach that requires Americans to be vaccinated. I need my BEST supporters to stand with me right now.

**[Please add your name RIGHT NOW to publicly stand with me against Biden's un-American vaccine mandate.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58326115:J3tYcm2NQ:m:1:3253819041:C296993E105CB3D6AAEF937FD9A479A7:r)**

**[Add your name IMMEDIATELY to OPPOSE Biden's vaccine mandate and to get on the list of supporters I see.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58326115:J3tYcm2NQ:m:1:3253819041:C296993E105CB3D6AAEF937FD9A479A7:r)**

name: Sean Patrick Maloney
subject: as of 11:30am:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.) It's DCCC Chair Sean Patrick Maloney.

This is a critical moment for our country and our House Majority, so I'll be blunt:

****[I've set a must-hit $100,000 goal for our House Democrats, and we simply must meet it before our Mid-Month deadline expires in 24 hours. Please, can you rush in $3 immediately to defend our House Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)****
| [MID MONTH DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT, 9/15](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/qkxpQe2-)
[NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/qkxpQe2-)

[_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/qkxpQe2-)
---

I've been disgusted watching Republicans attack our fundamental rights over the past few months.

They've already undermined our voting rights and restricted reproductive rights -- _and they 'll be able to do even more if they take away our Majority._

**As I write this, they 're shattering fundraising records to defeat our House Majority and buy their way back into power.**

I refuse to let that happen, but I can't stop them on my own.

****[That's why I'm asking you directly: Can I count on you and your $3 to defend our House Democrats and stop Republicans from marching back into the House Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.)****
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/mPmpcq_)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~EpTLV3~KM~)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_8wc6mzryC~)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_wMDr_)
---
| [**Or chip in another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thank you,

Sean Patrick Maloney
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45615393&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4MzM5MTU4OQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45615393&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4MzM5MTU4OQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Distorting facts is what Democrats do best
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
CNN knows that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year’s midterm elections. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c71a1fef74e842719bc17491fb8fec66&_e=TkExdwHq2BzqKbpQJf1FMOcmN-WatPR1WXHqKsxDczaoZiB2gZ17hsdgxsGYfJCNPmxQzEAUl8R25s_oZZzDMdIPRVgU6vZ1P3CmLiKSiXEmAqskF7nc3kzLqah5I2czuN8dQxko04usC-cQURc-WF-iqjwDCnYflexU_xMw3QquT5rz9ycTLgPhW7HZWrWmpc8C74MzkoQFFRgw-uNrIAnNOE7GE7_9pUqxiUke3NflByUCWJCRkFVieT3aEsI_h4EhV0fJ15dWcvJszpVAHh878xFnIjH5Trzl7i33GOnnan5ZGD94pALWnPzDboVAeuEmCJBpqAKJd0tAhzSoijPuAgceOy-Dp8_PDlyHERXExKnol1Xp8tHC-KX4micNXI1ZCv2pY8zAgdekJjpo5KeQl0XHc2GjJhKwSv-oqCupC45jO215qCWa0zF5U9kIxhfR9O6E_rqIIQRk3clnrA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

I knew it was only a matter of time before left-leaning news networks would start attempting to slander our campaign at every possible opportunity.

CNN has stepped into the role they've come to embrace over the years: The Democrat Party's mouthpiece. _Recently they published a story about me that couldn't be further from the truth._

The truth is that Democrats - including the top executives at CNN - know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections.

**Fellow American, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy.**

My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. **[Can I count on you to help us ensure we hit our goal before midnight with a gift of $10, $25, $100- or even my favorite number, $34!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c71a1fef74e842719bc17491fb8fec66&_e=TkExdwHq2BzqKbpQJf1FMOcmN-WatPR1WXHqKsxDczaoZiB2gZ17hsdgxsGYfJCNPmxQzEAUl8R25s_oZZzDMdIPRVgU6vZ1P3CmLiKSiXEmAqskF7nc3kzLqah5I2czuN8dQxko04usC-cQURc-WF-iqjwDCnYflexU_xMw3QquT5rz9ycTLgPhW7HZWrWmpc8C74MzkoQFFRgw-uNrIAnNOE7GE7_9pUqxiUke3NflByUCWJCRkFVieT3aEsI_kwBkDAYlzChvm4GyzWXKgwKRzpZX7U0ZOJy5_kxdlvHKYuGb0es-NygYEX8LIbFBKc89zMtsDqOdXwS_oyJaJgpBbOoLwPXJUWty5eePtgwXWm3LsLf0IQaJiPWKeBPFQBU2eopwlt1Ve3D1_7JjzsFPDjvpuw60Gld39kqZOP8ss3jNutDdEKfSWHSY33G9nzP8wUsOED-75xfHOAWY8g%3D%3D)**

[** STAND WITH ME AGAINST THE LIBERAL MEDIA -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c71a1fef74e842719bc17491fb8fec66&_e=TkExdwHq2BzqKbpQJf1FMOcmN-WatPR1WXHqKsxDczaoZiB2gZ17hsdgxsGYfJCNPmxQzEAUl8R25s_oZZzDMdIPRVgU6vZ1P3CmLiKSiXEmAqskF7nc3kzLqah5I2czuN8dQxko04usC-cQURc-WF-iqjwDCnYflexU_xMw3QquT5rz9ycTLgPhW7HZWrWmpc8C74MzkoQFFRgw-uNrIAnNOE7GE7_9pUqxiUke3NflByUCWJCRkFVieT3aEsI_51IBPfqfJNcFAQxpRBqgdwtvJGO_9FnEVL22yLZaZ0LhTdLTYNVRqDVLRdwU17kJhDLBWXvHncArnZSbjJCxvPPdizo3xvrsSwc3SQkinFRLm5cOndeacsEb19WcmIiiA0xXS9A10tuTP8RLEYkJv5SAn_nJP5HOkPAGO2dFosMAlYyxetIR68nGOjByzrdzXhDdbgMKLwePfsi21X0RNg%3D%3D)
When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on - or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way.

I chose the latter because the future of our country - and the future of Georgia - is too important to sit on the sidelines.

**[You would be doing me a great honor if you would support our campaign to take back the Senate with a contribution today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c71a1fef74e842719bc17491fb8fec66&_e=TkExdwHq2BzqKbpQJf1FMOcmN-WatPR1WXHqKsxDczaoZiB2gZ17hsdgxsGYfJCNPmxQzEAUl8R25s_oZZzDMdIPRVgU6vZ1P3CmLiKSiXEmAqskF7nc3kzLqah5I2czuN8dQxko04usC-cQURc-WF-iqjwDCnYflexU_xMw3QquT5rz9ycTLgPhW7HZWrWmpc8C74MzkoQFFRgw-uNrIAnNOE7GE7_9pUqxiUke3NflByUCWJCRkFVieT3aEsI_yEV-22P_Yl9C34dJvxhGwUzRd84KX_L-1F5L8J5D4DiY2ky1DE2SKIg8a106e6vPYYNVg_u1ZvtzwsaZJJA4vw7Gx_1LnpBg25A9IV7_lm7zb7BO4DYJLqILn2OQEYUSroZRY537fgpHyZZ8XELzDd2dep44n6HekP_s3W3H8cNCbYcT_VpejBvndb4YGLaKT7RI0A-vgAI2qEjF3q-R8g%3D%3D)**

Democrats know there is not a more critical Senate race than the one in Georgia, Fellow American, that's why the attacks on me are going to be constant between now and November 2022.

We've got to be ready for anything.

Thank you,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c71a1fef74e842719bc17491fb8fec66&_e=TkExdwHq2BzqKbpQJf1FMOcmN-WatPR1WXHqKsxDczaoZiB2gZ17hsdgxsGYfJCNPmxQzEAUl8R25s_oZZzDMdIPRVgU6vZ1P3CmLiKSiXEmAqskF7nc3kzLqah5I2czuN8dQxko04usC-cQURc-WF-iqjwDCnYflexU_xMw3QquT5rz9ycTLgPhW7HZWrWmpc8C74MzkoQFFRgw-uNrIAnNOE7GE7_9pUqxiUke3NflByUCWJCRkFVieT3aEsI_fWLII3_zH1qWelH9EL9WCwo0dv8nEeUKxXgB-1Hn915pRERlWkcxNH6ipNSLawbLci1KsWtKi35VlLYXAkoYshlPQKgUbwuQlA_oHfuxvz0ZYQndyWQg8HL9QIJslmbK-hLoorlzunzBLq-6vg8ZAZLcj-qTCf2SpyPb_rSgjmMtOMGsV1T36CKp9O90xuwQ5vsZhOlZPum-cVJLER7G-A%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c71a1fef74e842719bc17491fb8fec66&_e=TkExdwHq2BzqKbpQJf1FMOcmN-WatPR1WXHqKsxDczaoZiB2gZ17hsdgxsGYfJCNPmxQzEAUl8R25s_oZZzDMdIPRVgU6vZ1P3CmLiKSiXEmAqskF7nc3kzLqah5I2czuN8dQxko04usC-cQURc-WF-iqjwDCnYflexU_xMw3QquT5rz9ycTLgPhW7HZWrWmpc8C74MzkoQFFRgw-uNrIAnNOE7GE7_9pUqxiUke3NflByUCWJCRkFVieT3aEsI_vSMxpjp-4hO6i9B5aJU-6HrMyaBz41DIAfmG5M54tvuzzIrRKwPXu1V3qRBlee1pNjOXFsjGs0N82uPN684lDr5LiePJtACAqpNCEvaP3SNyPZ4vU5nvTGPScZei_bZLTBAp5THFJCn81CMD4__TImhtoIR2NUzhL39_GNn1PSc1w5Gi1bXOx8O56pH2C_N9fxHRLvneOeO2B138LNvjCQ%3D%3D)

[
](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c71a1fef74e842719bc17491fb8fec66&_e=TkExdwHq2BzqKbpQJf1FMBwKgKrbUqH-oCRs9a0p3tA6G7R8xdlQ4imUWJ3EEhS5vel0lpaxjzTxNfr8JdcTlT9A2GRLDGRFl7pZBCO5C7rIrT2VEllYIuWBIL5rL1_IHGO3tzs9Cj6m26CQRmuWc_n49YJeywNMmS_qhnX8dc6ORZn3GR1Sy-MCuYUw65IwlHAWxqnMcx3WlErKjFagt_Yjg691y09WE2uzOHMVRp1q7ecQv4aaiIJ2j58KgATJjPox7IA0r_e8qHoFucGggw%3D%3D)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.
---

_Don't want to receive any more of our emails?
We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=c71a1fef74e842719bc17491fb8fec66&_t=Byi_GBHAZLOTNszjz0XwsOejz57SuDUavnQjN-AErz6QQumnq1A14JE6zjLiMWGQUDkaE9MxoZuy5a6B3cgpFvOPxsVlJLOFO7eaKCI6aQnTOJ9dvHqJM2Yg9c8S8GYO646pWfnhXG0c6uJKPYRl9p9bdqYE7xRM8G1FCojdroA%3D)._

Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on - or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way. I chose the latter because the future of our country - and the future of Georgia - is too important to sit on the sidelines. Democrats know there is not a more critical Senate race than the one in Georgia, Fellow American, that's why the attacks on me are going to be constant between now and November 2022. We've got to be ready for anything. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Great America Update
subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c330%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=d6jMferlUcsAGKfWgThZCQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66589%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RCUeMOrDe58sMuk2Vz%2bc5Q&sysid=1) Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66589%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RCUeMOrDe58sMuk2Vz%2bc5Q&sysid=1) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66580%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p4KhfNJAcJhVK%2fjgmEQmRQ&sysid=1) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism --especially among our young people--that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66580%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p4KhfNJAcJhVK%2fjgmEQmRQ&sysid=1) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66581%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BhD0TcnnoGMlmO6CWObW0A&sysid=1) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

The unfair reality has been directly tied to the legislative maps set in motion by the redistricting process a decade ago. Indiana Republicans are manipulating the system once more, but we have the power to change the narrative during the 2021 redistricting process. [**Join the Fight**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35773146/306103608/624230061?refcode=Redistrict.FR.09.14.21.&Redistrict.FR.09.14.21.=Redistrict.FR.09.14.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTlhMDJlNi05ZTE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bileYmV3ZPNo5cAU1daYSZt3srw5c0lha22HKZFRnrk=) Indiana Democrats wanted to get this news to you today because these new maps will shape the Hoosier State for a generation. If Republicans have their way, transformative policies like the American Rescue Plan and the American Jobs Plan could become a distant memory. The opportunities to eliminate childcare deserts, revitalize health care access for Indiana's veterans, and update the state's infrastructure system could all grind to a halt. If you are mad about low-wage jobs, underfunded public schools, and the unnecessary culture wars crippling our state, then join us in the effort to call out the Republicans' partisanship and attempt to manipulate the system once more. We must hold them accountable every step of the way and never stop fighting for a brighter future for Indiana. Indiana Republicans are manipulating the system once more, but we have the power to change the narrative during the 2021 redistricting process. = Indiana Democrats wanted to get this news to you today because these new maps will shape the Hoosier State for a generation. If Republicans have their way, transformative policies like the American Rescue Plan and the American Jobs Plan could become a distant memory. The opportunities to eliminate childcare deserts, revitalize health care access for Indiana's veterans, and update the state's infrastructure system could all grind to a halt. If you are mad about low-wage jobs, underfunded public schools, and the unnecessary culture wars crippling our state, then join us in the effort to call out the Republicans' partisanship and attempt to manipulate the system once more. We must hold them accountable every step of the way and never stop fighting for a brighter future for Indiana. name: =?utf-8?Q?Alexandra=20Rojas=2C=20Justice=20Democrats?=
subject: A sincere note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
** Justice Democrats
------------------------------------------------------------

This is going to be a long email, but please stick with me and read the whole thing. It’s important.

Justice Democrats was started by a handful of Bernie 2016 staffers and super volunteers. We had just worked on this inspiring campaign for president. Bernie put a progressive agenda front and center for millions of people for the first time — myself included.

A group of us got together and thought: what if we could take all the lessons we learned from Bernie 2016 and run to replace all the members of Congress who were standing in the way of real change?

When we launched in 2017, we got a New York Times article covering our effort to elect working-class progressives to Congress. It’s been a long, tough road between then and our latest feature in The New Yorker, the increased media coverage of our endorsed candidates, and having 10 Justice Democrats in Congress.

In 2018, when Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez was running for the House in a primary against a corporate Democrat, there was very little media attention. When Justice Democrats recruited AOC to run, she was working as a bartender — she even worked as a bartender for many months while running for office. Sometimes, that’s what it takes when you’re a working-class candidate.

We helped AOC manage her team, run her organizing program, and make everything we could of our small budget. Then, she won. We toppled one of the most powerful corporate Democrats and elected the youngest woman ever to serve in Congress in his place.

Money has always been one of the biggest things holding us back from doing more. It’s the one thing that our establishment opponents have a seemingly endless supply of and that we’re always working hard to raise just a fraction of what they can raise.

Now, we’re in a predicament heading into the 2022 elections. We won a few major upsets last year, from our first-ever recruit, Cori Bush, to progressive champions Jamaal Bowman and Marie Newman. We’ve proven we can win. We’ve shown that we can contribute as an organization in a serious and meaningful way to the organizing, fundraising, and comms strategies that can help progressive challengers oust powerful incumbents.

We’re a grassroots organization. Whether or not we can succeed, whether or not we can grow beyond what we did in 2020, largely depends on supporters like you donating when you can.

So today, I’m asking you to help us make 2022 a winning year for Justice Democrats. I promise you that no other org will spend your money more efficiently. If we can raise enough this year, I know we can elect more new Justice Dems than ever before.

So, what do you think? Can you make a donation today?

⇢ Yes, I can chip in $5, $27, or another amount to Justice Democrats to help elect the next generation of the Squad to Congress. (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20210914-movement-mc?refcode=em20210914-mc)

Contribute (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20210914-movement-mc?refcode=em20210914-mc)

We understand that not everyone can give. Typically, only 1-in-100 people who open an email from us end up contributing. Some people just don’t have the extra cash right now, and that is perfectly fine. We love all of you no matter what!

But if even 10% of the people reading this email decided to make a donation right now, it would give a huge boost to our budget heading into 2022.

I know we can do amazing things together. I’m grateful to be in this fight with you.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas

Donate » (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em-mc-footer)

Paid for by Justice Democrats

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com (#) . If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe (https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=23f6e0d673&e=5a4b10d0ec&c=6ce7a91e5f) . Mail us: 10629 Hardin Valley Rd #226, Knoxville, TN 37932.

name: =?utf-8?Q?DNC=20Hispanic=20Caucus?=
subject: We’re Kicking-off Hispanic Heritage Month This Wednesday, 9/15!
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
### The DNC Hispanic Caucus and Latino Victory Fund are kicking-off Hispanic Heritage Month!
---
|
---
| **Dear Friends,

I am thrilled to share that the DNC Hispanic Caucus is partnering with Latino Victory Fund to kick-off Hispanic Heritage Month! Please join me, DNC Chair Jaime Harrison, President of Latino Victory Fund Nathalie Rayes, and former Secretary of Housing and Urban Development Julian Castro to kick-off an entire month of celebration. Not only is this a moment of celebration, but a promise from Democrats to continue fighting for all Latino families.

Rsvp below to hear from these incredible powerhouses. I look forward to seeing you all on Wednesday, 9/15 at 7pm ET!

¡Hasta pronto!

\--Iris
Clerk Iris Y. Martinez
Chair, DNC Hispanic Caucus **

Friend,

In a moment I'm going to ask you to [**chip in $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35774735/306108318/77586780?refcode=em-91421-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzAzOGFlYy1hMjE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b-zM0bIzsNKoehn4v26Z3MgJ2gOY7v4xrvvQ1I4_i7c=) to help us reach our $25,000 mid-month fundraising goal. We're under siege in Texas. The GOP has taken away reproductive healthcare and put a $10,000 bounty on Texans with Senate Bill 8. With Senate Bill 1, they've criminalized actions that helped increase voter turnout in 2020.

They won't stop unless we stand up to them.

**Texas will gain two new congressional districts, and Governor Greg Abbott just called another special session to redraw the maps.** Make no mistake, the GOP will gerrymander Texas even further to maximize their grip on power. We also expect them to delay redistricting to disadvantage Democrats across the board at the state and federal level.

Right now, Austin is sliced up like a pizza and represented by five extreme, right-wing GOP Congress members. We have a unique opportunity to change that as the seat I'm running for is expected to be a new, Democratic-leaning district.

**Our campaign is determined to do everything possible to take back Texas, but to do that, it's incredibly important that we prepare now. We need to launch a strong campaign the very day we get the new lines.**

[**My team has set an ambitious goal of raising $25,000 before tomorrow's mid-month deadline so we can be ready once this special session concludes. | | Folks, When it comes to the race for VA-02, there’s a lot of uncertainty. For starters, we don’t know who my opponent will be. And due to redistricting, we _still_ don’t know what our district will look like. But two things are certain -- we need to publicly report our fundraising numbers at the end of the month, and _we need them to send a strong message:_ [**We have the grassroots power behind us to keep this seat blue. name: Derek Marshall
subject: Our lives are on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
Today is a very, very important day. Today, California votes on the Republican Recall, and decides the future of our state. **If you are in California or know anyone in the state, please urge them to take the time today to cast their “NO” vote if they haven’t already. **
****
This election is not about one person. It’s not about one Democratic governor. **It’s about all of us, the millions of people who will be affected if an extremist Republican seizes control of the state.**
It’s about every immigrant family waiting on someone’s legal status.

It’s about every gay couple that wants to feel safe.

It’s about every young woman who chooses to get an abortion.

It’s about every vaccinated worker who wants to be protected from the virus.

It’s about every child who wants a future not devastated by runaway climate change.
**Our lives are on the ballot today, and California must respond.**

My team has been hard at work supporting the Recall canvassing efforts, and all of the folks we’ve engaged have me feeling hopeful about the outcome of this election. It’s been an uphill battle at times, but**I’ve always said that the power of organizing within our communities is strong enough to overcome our biggest obstacles.** Together, I believe we will win.

**Once again, please take time today to reach out to anyone you know in California and urge them to vote NO. **

In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: Leave no man behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58326194:6DiNJm2VN:m:1:3253819041:B5650669A0F669981F60428A7D8A66B4:r)
---
| Peter, 11 years ago this week, when I was serving as a bomb technician under Joint Special Operations Command in the Army, my life changed forever. I lost both legs and a finger when a roadside bomb blew up beneath me while in the Kandahar region of Afghanistan.

If it weren't for the bravery and selflessness of my fellow soldiers, and the grace of God, _I very well could have lost my life_.

What I remember most clearly from that day is my fellow soldiers sprinting towards the bomb instead of away from my motionless body. They rushed in the direction where an explosive device had just detonated, putting their own lives in danger to save mine.

While I may have lost my ability to continue being an asset on the battlefield that day, I didn't lose my drive to keep fighting for our amazing country. So, I learned to walk again, graduated from college and set my sights on a new mission: restoring America First greatness to the United States.

On this anniversary of that explosion, will you help me win this latest battle for the future of our country?
---
| [JOIN THE FIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58326194:6DiNJm2VN:m:1:3253819041:B5650669A0F669981F60428A7D8A66B4:r "JOIN THE FIGHT")
---
| I wouldn't be alive today if it weren't for the most solemn of mantras: leave no man behind.

Unfortunately, Joe Biden has done the exact opposite. He has abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan, and in doing so, he has betrayed the men and women I served alongside.

**His behavior is completely unforgivable, and as a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words "commander" or "chief" anywhere in his title.

If you agree, please help me hold Joe Biden accountable for his betrayal and stop his disastrous America Last agenda:**
---

subject: just crunched the numbers —

body:
they have me worried.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35776413/306113795/-1930076705?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210914-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzVkMDU4NC1hNzE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EOrhw3DrHlQ2fm5k9M5gkX7K8JbHMk1arJuWRkf_Kpc=)

| Peter,

This is Daniel from Susan Wild’s finance team. I just crunched the numbers, and frankly, they have me worried: we’re halfway through September, but we’re not yet halfway to our fundraising goal.
