name: Jesse Sullivan
subject: are you ready to make Illinois Strong, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
My friend, this race is about politics as usual vs. strong moral leadership. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8762%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=tWrJeycuXp%2fIjuOTYIAulg&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03329%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YFQkCcvWCMbeSIzw8T27EQ&sysid=1) | |
---
My friend, this race is about politics as usual vs. strong moral leadership.

Just look at the legacy of failed political leaders like J.B. Pritzker.
* High taxes
* High crime
* Rampant corruption
* And an agenda so hypocritical it's making headlines nationwide...

_Pritzker is under federal investigation for tax evasion. He broke his campaign promise to end gerrymandering. This is old school machine politics, of “if you scratch my back, I’ll scratch yours.” _

**_Insiders benefit, and us outsiders lose._**

That's not a label worthy of Illinois. We should be leaders on job creation, on the economy, on education, on living our strong, American values. _Not corruption._

It's about time we make Illinois Strong and a state worthy of Lincoln's legacy.

I'm Jesse Sullivan and I'm running for Governor to do just that.******[JOIN MY TEAM >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03320%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2SQeNtuHHJKQTU1CEH%2fZBQ&sysid=1) **

My friend, I'm a fifth generation Illinoisan and I was born, raised, and now live just a mile from where President Abe Lincoln first entered politics.

_I guess you could say he's my biggest inspiration - other than my family._

Growing up, my parents and grandparents instilled in me the value of real, hard work. They always reminded me that to whom much is given, much is expected.

That's inspired my work throughout my life, from charity to foreign policy, to counterinsurgency work with the military, to entrepreneurship and investing in job creation.

I was always taught that if you put your mind to it, you can do it. That's the American dream I've had the chance to live. In fact, here's what it looks like:
****
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03329%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YFQkCcvWCMbeSIzw8T27EQ&sysid=1)
My friend, that's my family. My wife Monique and our four children.

_We are so blessed, truly. _

But when I look at my kids and I think about their future... I am concerned.

Will they stay in a state known for high taxes and bad outcomes?

That's a large part of the reason I am running for office. This is not about us. This is **_about protecting our values, our liberties, and our prosperity for the next generation._**

That means defending our principles, standing by our police officers, improving our education system, and making sure every Illinoisan has the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I'm telling you right now that I am a strong conservative, a God-fearing Christian, and friend - I am a tested leader.

Together, we can make our state work FOR US, not against us. We can run our government like we run our businesses: Successfully. We can make Illinois the strongest state in our union.

And it starts now, by putting an end to the corrupt, heavy-handed control of Springfield’s political class.

**But I'll be honest -- this is going to be a tough battle. **

**Our opponents are planning on spending hundreds of millions of dollars to maintain the status quo. They know a broken Illinois guarantees their power - and this movement is their greatest threat. **

But friend, if you join me today I can give you my word that I will make Illinois Strong and:
* _Always lead with compassion. _
* _Defeat corruption._
* _Create new, well-paying jobs._
* _Improve our education system._
* _Reform our justice system._
* _Hold our officials accountable._

_And I will NEVER back down. _

My friend, I know we're just getting to know each other but I really hope you'll join my team today to get started on our journey to make Illinois Strong.
[**SIGN UP NOW! JOIN THE TEAM**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03321%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fR01w%2fBFsqzx%2bmgUWF8eLw&sysid=1)
Thank you for your time,
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03329%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YFQkCcvWCMbeSIzw8T27EQ&sysid=1)
Jesse Sullivan
Candidate for Governor

Pritzker is under federal investigation for tax evasion. He broke his campaign promise to end gerrymandering. This is old school machine politics, of “if you scratch my back, I’ll scratch yours.” Insiders benefit, and us outsiders lose. That's not a label worthy of Illinois. We should be leaders on job creation, on the economy, on education, on living our strong, American values. Not corruption. It's about time we make Illinois Strong and a state worthy of Lincoln's legacy. I'm Jesse Sullivan and I'm running for Governor to do just that.**** My friend, I'm a fifth generation Illinoisan and I was born, raised, and now live just a mile from where President Abe Lincoln first entered politics. I guess you could say he's my biggest inspiration - other than my family. Growing up, my parents and grandparents instilled in me the value of real, hard work. They always reminded me that to whom much is given, much is expected. That's inspired my work throughout my life, from charity to foreign policy, to counterinsurgency work with the military, to entrepreneurship and investing in job creation. I was always taught that if you put your mind to it, you can do it. That's the American dream I've had the chance to live. In fact, here's what it looks like: ** My friend, that's my family. My wife Monique and our four children. We are so blessed, truly. But when I look at my kids and I think about their future... I am concerned. Will they stay in a state known for high taxes and bad outcomes? That's a large part of the reason I am running for office. This is not about us. This is about protecting our values, our liberties, and our prosperity for the next generation. That means defending our principles, standing by our police officers, improving our education system, and making sure every Illinoisan has the opportunity to pursue their dreams. I'm telling you right now that I am a strong conservative, a God-fearing Christian, and friend - I am a tested leader. Together, we can make our state work FOR US, not against us. We can run our government like we run our businesses: Successfully. We can make Illinois the strongest state in our union. And it starts now, by putting an end to the corrupt, heavy-handed control of Springfield’s political class. But I'll be honest -- this is going to be a tough battle. Our opponents are planning on spending hundreds of millions of dollars to maintain the status quo. They know a broken Illinois guarantees their power - and this movement is their greatest threat. But friend, if you join me today I can give you my word that I will make Illinois Strong and: Always lead with compassion. Defeat corruption. Create new, well-paying jobs. Improve our education system. Reform our justice system. * Hold our officials accountable. And I will NEVER back down. My friend, I know we're just getting to know each other but I really hope you'll join my team today to get started on our journey to make Illinois Strong. Thank you for your time, Jesse Sullivan Candidate for Governor | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | | | | 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves. A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e6a921edbb649b9b0fcdbbcdb754776&_e=PaX46sF8Dezyskwn5IXm6dbSB_Pw5gkcOi9NCMwji5slomq_Tu6hzGQv7niH2oyzs9i_KWSSzl-XOnaZfYj9w2zL6P9eb9fuEc3jw94lWNWYxYLOqbGFN1bUDOsej0e3mWwMZRH8y4srg5URcE5gOV-J1TaLULiFbG5ntOaZGfZYtxV_wZ17gV65OzqZtM-tOBdDqjLv8VE8pG9U41GzGF8G6xjDmEcu0SmVSdnAhOehUAszqeblsFg7wxXW0Y54I4Lb2AAGgTR-VKUGx4oqwR30vSz0Cl3ApYgtLSE9eV96TOORCg8hZbT15QDIoVvbw3yBjDsRi4ScoRbHpJKX_HMHWS0MP6spBJ5tJSgJpH0ZOLaYHNhx9nU1nFhyi39vJdkvpTHdCr-Q-_G-nIFzVC7xtf4hMdM5dc1zlxCc-uMG03W1dLOWO0Cjh_Zx0RjU)
Get this, Fellow Conservative...

A state that never allowed slaves is taking money from people who never owned slaves and giving it to people who have never been slaves.

That's right, California has moved forward with reparations plans for African Americans. As a black, conservative female, I find this move to be disturbing - not to mention, unconstitutional!

**Reparations divide our country. Opportunity brings us together.**

[**That's why I hope you will support my campaign to become the FIRST black female Republican elected to the House from the state of California right now by joining my team.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e6a921edbb649b9b0fcdbbcdb754776&_e=PaX46sF8Dezyskwn5IXm6dbSB_Pw5gkcOi9NCMwji5slomq_Tu6hzGQv7niH2oyzs9i_KWSSzl-XOnaZfYj9w2zL6P9eb9fuEc3jw94lWNWYxYLOqbGFN1bUDOsej0e3mWwMZRH8y4srg5URcE5gOV-J1TaLULiFbG5ntOaZGfZYtxV_wZ17gV65OzqZtM-tOBdDqjLv8VE8pG9U41GzGF8G6xjDmEcu0SmVSdnAhOcsgMsy-hMRNMYmiCoUd8ek_fOxfXfmFVE27yOVIdRqOWItGZusRMOLrYOtSTmfVbwIyQA2Z2H9Vfaq7mYSxFHlvDiqqUCtX7XUy6Ghk8XvGpHKN9OjbgZ51rmMGLtO2Yhz3W2lHJafnDffS7aBG0Z-Mp-xJZdqcpmCiI2z_k069qmbP84sxxB7bHBxnrChoPX0Hv44AshRcrQDZrlzt0zt)

[**SEND A BLACK CONSERVATIVE TO CONGRESS -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e6a921edbb649b9b0fcdbbcdb754776&_e=PaX46sF8Dezyskwn5IXm6dbSB_Pw5gkcOi9NCMwji5slomq_Tu6hzGQv7niH2oyzs9i_KWSSzl-XOnaZfYj9w2zL6P9eb9fuEc3jw94lWNWYxYLOqbGFN1bUDOsej0e3mWwMZRH8y4srg5URcE5gOV-J1TaLULiFbG5ntOaZGfZYtxV_wZ17gV65OzqZtM-tOBdDqjLv8VE8pG9U41GzGF8G6xjDmEcu0SmVSdnAhOfjG22xvg-lUku1ahvit6FzqM7_pEFpjpLtatMhGGHBKbfgd2ez2jT5UdZiDsgn7A2LWAXzVKV616kKmGW4T-S3B3Do_KJoEu4EovUe-pWSDfDeS31rrW57kLNvC198GMbgst_M8EvdD-8ftzK2M55wMsy3fIhWcPA4dAQtmp0Q8M83kH7LWXjPtgthB8FL98wk7ohaIM2ybm85T9M_2Ao9)
This is our opportunity as conservatives to bring diversity to the Republican Party and dismantle the racist narrative Democrats have held over conservatives for decades.

I have never asked for a handout and I have never seen myself as a victim because of the color of my skin. **Despite what the Democrats peddle through my minority community, I am a free thinking American who has been blessed with opportunity in this country.**

**If I was a victim like the Democrats thought I was, then I wouldn't be here, running for Congress for a SECOND time with the support of thousands of grassroots conservatives.**

[**So today, I am asking you to make a donation of $5 or more to my campaign to help me win in 2022.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e6a921edbb649b9b0fcdbbcdb754776&_e=PaX46sF8Dezyskwn5IXm6dbSB_Pw5gkcOi9NCMwji5slomq_Tu6hzGQv7niH2oyzs9i_KWSSzl-XOnaZfYj9w2zL6P9eb9fuEc3jw94lWNWYxYLOqbGFN1bUDOsej0e3mWwMZRH8y4srg5URcE5gOV-J1TaLULiFbG5ntOaZGfZYtxV_wZ17gV65OzqZtM-tOBdDqjLv8VE8pG9U41GzGF8G6xjDmEcu0SmVSdnAhOd134xYJuh81CvBhaZDpMx2pysx5jFrvVMVglyquhj1rWEfmxuBtYOSD84gGV97c55VYW-25_lY_KaQDctHBuFNRB6t7PxeK4yVGvzsba_D3DCzjp2gYD-VBJOOhpm1cYeLgUYZb_A_GvrEJUiS1zUOETlaU-UiNCRiL2AW1Mihl-y7vdi7xlnmWGEMfsu6LlFoS4VKR5vZYQ1P4Ihj0xIT) With your help, I can change the narrative and prove that all black Americans need in this country is opportunity, NOT reparations!

[**SEND A BLACK CONSERVATIVE TO CONGRESS -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e6a921edbb649b9b0fcdbbcdb754776&_e=PaX46sF8Dezyskwn5IXm6dbSB_Pw5gkcOi9NCMwji5slomq_Tu6hzGQv7niH2oyzs9i_KWSSzl-XOnaZfYj9w2zL6P9eb9fuEc3jw94lWNWYxYLOqbGFN1bUDOsej0e3mWwMZRH8y4srg5URcE5gOV-J1TaLULiFbG5ntOaZGfZYtxV_wZ17gV65OzqZtM-tOBdDqjLv8VE8pG9U41GzGF8G6xjDmEcu0SmVSdnAhOcgiXlQ6MeQtQ9D0YwsWrbAvRWdh3NkLodXQnQjjRVRpHmlgWQYHwVZh4WT3q1_RofKYp-u9qDPyBvAT9OGvZD2bffNXE6ZWyH-XuwflISPIsaoCT0wj39ZyTLWTEYCXIEVHJkeamyRejJcFvdxF7CPgFxFZI1e1yIAlShvn2Qv6I9peLZrt_AkpGoQLF-Ubn2QtcI6BQEnLYSZoA185UKr)

Thank you and God Bless,

Aja Smith
United States Air Force Veteran
Republican for Congress

Participating organizations will deploy paid canvassers and volunteers to knock 50,000 doors in the 50 days leading up to the November 2, 2021 General Election. In addition, nine canvass rallies will be held in battleground districts to highlight the critical importance of sending progressive voices to Richmond. Our Dates will be as follows.[ Follow along through Mobilize :](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDLsLJ-Vh_OKSHlTVaFH-TQySXUGljeGnY-rAJu0vYJxQ9Q8Zozg8_MVoPzueVmAQyvuiEI3J-0LdplS1r1JqW7-vfTyKddVKPGDfHYJ7u_mNFhrYBWdIQo-9mN1ZG5r5hym7dC4uRJnbcO8uncQmfMP3p7g7UdgO3IYvfamuP50oxRIhAjHZQrl5JKgGcMN6P-3CRRmkdU4yunATks6xoDj8T6LEBaucxLZeEeJHfURrKgcDV6BrEdV1T0e8l7Rg_WcB8peQnxRPo0SqNyO5aYB9tcGX_r8MXtSGAyIRV1nG/3fb/nzVguecNRZa9LGI8QD_pEA/h2/NW0ePjGeIDy5wQkWB9azwZVUhhZkKtNvXRhXhkSDod8)
* Sept 26 - 12 PM: Katie Sponsler in HD 66 (Chesterfield)
* Oct 3 - 10 AM: Nadarius Clark in HD 79 (Portsmouth)
* Oct 3 - 12 PM: Kelly Fowler in HD 21 (Virginia Beach)
* Oct 23 - 10 AM: Joshua Cole in HD 28 (Fredericksburg)
* October 30 - 12 PM: Katie Sponsler in HD 66 (Chesterfield)

Progressive partners and allies include Commonwealth Forward, CASA In Action, Meet Our Moment, Virginia for Everyone, Virginia Justice Democrats, Keep the Big Boys Honest, Virginia unions, and other partners.

Canvass rally speakers include Delegate Jay Jones, 2021 gubernatorial candidate Jennifer Carroll Foy, and 2020 congressional Democratic nominee Qasim Rashid.

Liberals in the mainstream media love nothing more than to call vocal conservatives racists, but when a black conservative running to defeat Gavin Newsom is assaulted... they are SILENT. Now more than ever, I’m counting on YOUR help to cut through the Left’s lies to ensure we flip the House. Together, we can put an end to this despicable double standard. clean_body: Will you endorse Francis Conole for Congress? | = | | Friend, Two weeks ago, Francis officially launched our campaign for Congress to represent New York’s 24th District and expand our Democratic majority in the House. The response has been overwhelmingly positive. And we’re well on our way to defeating John Katko and flipping NY-24 from red to blue in 2022. But first, we need your Official Endorsement. | | | Our Republican opponent John Katko is running a campaign powered by corporate PACs and special interest groups. He ended last quarter with nearly $1 million dollars thanks in large part to blank checks from wealthy corporations. Francis is doing the exact opposite. He’s running a campaign that relies on everyday supporters like you to keep us going and lead us to victory. That’s why your endorsement is so important to us. It’s our most important week ever.

And yet, we’re not seeing nearly enough folks step up to support our pre-debate fundraising goal.

In fact, at this rate ... _we’re going to miss it by a mile._

_**[We can’t afford a blunder this big at this point in our race. Donald Trump has a war chest with $100 million dedicated to electing far-right Republicans in next year’s elections. Constant attacks are on the horizon, but with your support before tomorrow’s mid-month fundraising deadline, Michael can stay on track to win his race and defend our slim Democratic majority. Put simply, we don't have to outraise the national GOP but we do have to stick to our fundraising goals so we can invest in what it takes to win. **That’s why we’re asking for your help before tomorrow’s deadline. clean_body: The headlines doubt our chances in 2022. You can help us prove them wrong. | = Hey there, have you seen the headlines? ****** The experts predict a tough path for Democrats like Michael to keep our Congressional majorities in the 2022 midterm elections. And they have good reason: The National Republican Senatorial Committee (whose job is to flip seats like Michael’s) has more than $65 million in the bank and they only need to flip one seat. Donald Trump has a war chest with $100 million dedicated to electing far-right Republicans in next year’s elections. Constant attacks are on the horizon, but with your support before tomorrow’s mid-month fundraising deadline, Michael can stay on track to win his race and defend our slim Democratic majority. Put simply, we don't have to outraise the national GOP but we do have to stick to our fundraising goals so we can invest in what it takes to win. That’s why we’re asking for your help before tomorrow’s deadline. Pitch in $3 to help re-elect Michael and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for being a part of this team. Let’s prove the headlines wrong. — Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Election Results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Consent of the Governed](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorr3a059mhW9FnUGd4HRygujhk-k28UnqrG1CDeLmw9zA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_14&n=1) Today we give new meaning to five forgotten words from our Declaration of Independence: The consent of the governed. Polls are open until 8 PM, and you can find your polling place [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=zxJBdFO2LZRu4lDamvUPFhwBA-ts7btnIExY3uyIgX7S2kGJl6tJ6Rr173WxZ9kj&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_14&n=2). You can follow the results [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=L4XxJUCR7FrwYyOQD7-_jaqPHkK91NVtSA0Dij5PT4GG38KSs3YZv3GiY2lEv6SF&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_14&n=3). The first returns appear shortly after 8 and will include early absentee ballots. Sometime later in the night Election Day voters will be added. I just voted as follows: Question 1: YES Question 2: KILEY If your ballot looks the same, you can share an image on social media [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAxvkSE5yaxjwd1L6S3urVb3NHnm7PebHcfHeu4NlJPrlQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_14&n=4). The Recall campaign has been driven by optimism and hope. It’s about our kids and grandkids. It’s a movement not just to fire America’s worst governor but to save America’s greatest state. Together we've lit a new spark of liberty, rekindling three other words from our nation's Founding that changed history once and can do so again: We the People. With gratitude, Kevin
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_14&n=5).

Marcy Kaptur | |

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux5rTXePTq_zAzKi5TP0ML37QAO6xGqflXVuOlbPv0o_ASzzyDp0cGSqu6JkJOG6HaF2ItMLBhjqun2sSVa3mGjOLLpu5e_P5yOVX9XvOCrutNJnltnuTqe0XPQIuWlahB7N7I6G0ki6lKLUm1ThY5dYtSkEYTFXqt7SYkR21ZkTKttsmTk992wPWVS74kMXX47osPCJA0pWY1V_a1_Y15z1fpNKdtZW-ez3Jb5bz0VBFhigSTuPywhIj5amgR-FQqkPPGTsj01X3mVQtEn6t5M7o9xnVBofCG1Z4qt8xDG8xxk-RVMolG5EV-gGVAV_RkSD3dkobDoQmlTYX1su4bPbSByoh_0fQJlxRyFM6Jj0e/3fb/uaeyX5SyR7-f0cCFhC4V1Q/h0/Y-aI6RJHK_u0RKxRW-JJe-TrfQGPAr5iaIt3rozJycQ)

| | Team,

With five Republicans on the seven-person Ohio Redistricting Commission, we knew redistricting was never going to be a fair process -- **_but the draft maps we’re seeing is evidence that Republicans are outright breaking the law!_**
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux5rTXePTq_zAzKi5TP0ML37QAO6xGqflXVuOlbPv0o_Arik2U-UqtogGiAkhNLhmhZOuC_N_AHIoak9Vwk9cZNNjzSOAkxfidzSq8z62etKUZULszYl0h8iqY51hW5mNHj3O5VPOeIog5Or3fU7_X_WTExXc410ygJzv_9UmbFtdnDp5VHxc7h-TzTt-EvfF4h92JPoMFt0UeYtCb8m7vWY2IbOUpW_IY_cWpcRTka42mUqQzJFAhc8FoVWKT0na2JAedWvaCT5z6mXVCGfrodNp-VlKt-Pdr-vdnTo6wOYLKv5pmxFXxKwJIoLe7ht4SBggXgmJLZlgl2GTLGMXsmnU95EBVr4k9QAZpwcYFKw1/3fb/uaeyX5SyR7-f0cCFhC4V1Q/h1/eju_6FWFjdFoaHEbid8C8d_vySZYPy9P8s0z7xUi-1M)
These maps are unconstitutional and a violation of our rights. Republicans are drawing the lines in such a way that **competitive races will now become safe seats for Republicans.**

If you thought our district was a safe bet, think again. Everything the GOP is doing _tips the balance _away_ from the will of the people_ and toward their own political agenda.

We can’t let them get away with this. The final deadline to approve a map is tomorrow, September 15th. The Ohio Constitution states it clearly:

**“No general assembly district plan shall be drawn primarily to favor or disfavor a political party.”**
**[We can’t allow the GOP’s gerrymandering scheme to threaten our progress and leave us vulnerable to the growing threat of far-right extremism. name: Eric Greitens
subject: Kamala knows it’s over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
Her 50-50 Senate majority is hanging by a thread.
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5a433dbcfc2543dc8d17fbfec19dae9f&_m=ceda71220da74d30b9c2d2f2fbbfe91f&_e=FVzdUe1itDh4zVJiOpmDDVWkFyuj3qdflPIqDdx2rhWjG3Pd4CqqlsGPh0o8LZf_IuXOnHmMNIzq7IpMf4YZdHArIrJz6YNjsOFkZ6lh0r74kAxHc_VlyBhR1q8FQosRmNe-YyHmrRzaVr9Q0SZHaJ-BFYJNS1ejiHuPnuQIuXtGhzEeKNdbjzJDzSq8QLv-mZXWR622V7K6s-v8e9FpnnnA-GRY9cHgAXnFz7JW3i9Bs_jF6d_M2CKMxXfmjthhQHcXYwmkohwoKBM2kyLdT6DCZ1zLIXeld3csr2EjXZGSWAh74dg8F-q4PrXwemDG3fhhgfBV_ocYVeh5ghxxF6s4urWBXWxj1p9kkvx8fS1zhf_vv7aN4RcXfg5nk7sj0EvxgvKsGbQPWDNMH5mVvsbXsNAfXemgdyAhGqJL9A8RfHBVhlq-4s2X4BPvGBJYFtDQa3DTHAJobhl1V_Oe96DhaQAhfjlC1ANC8FHb5hDWBI4cpvSpGHTQA6QxAkn9bY0lgyAGeDYgG1lfNL8-UsX9HOZQt2C2SsGN1kRW_SI%3D)
---
Peter,
---
The Biden-Harris administration is in free fall...
---
**A new poll shows Joe Biden’s approval rating has plummeted to _just 39%_ while Kamala Harris is the least popular vice president in 50 YEARS!**
---
Just **1 SEAT** is needed to FLIP the Senate -- and Kamala knows her 50-50 majority is coming to an end.
---

name: Kevin Faulconer, iPhone
subject: FWD: Last chance to vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
FWD: Vote to recall Gavin Newsom and elect Kevin Faulconer! Read more >>
Peter, I just wanted to make sure you saw my team’s email below. In just a few hours, polls will close and the election will be over. This is our last chance to replace Gavin Newsom and start our California Comeback. So please, head down to your polling place immediately and vote YES to recall Newsom and vote for me to replace him. Thanks again for your support, Kevin Faulconer Sent from my iPhone | |
---
To: All Supporters
From: Team Faulconer
Subject: Last chance to vote!
Date: Tuesday, September 14, 2021 10:00 a.m.
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/35d00e7dec01f902/40b25874f08ee461c3d6b838967d376c/34943)
COUNTDOWN TO CALIFORNIA’S COMEBACK
_Vote now!_

Friend,

Today is Election Day, and this is your last chance to vote to recall Gavin Newsom and elect Kevin Faulconer!

Kevin is the only candidate in this race with a detailed plan to clean up California.

* **CUT TAXES** : Kevin will cut the state income tax for middle-class individuals and working families.
* **HELP OUR HEROES** : Kevin will find housing for homeless veterans and eliminate the state income tax for the government salaries and pensions of all servicemen and women.
* **REFORM OUR SCHOOLS** : Kevin will make sure every child receives the quality education they deserve.
* **KEEP OUR COMMUNITIES SAFE** : Kevin will fund our police and make sure they have everything they need to clean up our streets.

So please, vote yes to remove Gavin Newsom as Governor and VOTE IN Kevin Faulconer to implement his California Comeback Plan!

But don’t wait – polls close at 8 PM tonight. To find your polling place, please click **[HERE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/35d00e7dec01f902/96c11605d7311fd1c3d6b838967d376c/34943)**.

Thanks for your vital support,
Team Faulconer
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/35d00e7dec01f902/e37a542262566f41c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/35d00e7dec01f902/dc8abaa9bbf7a644c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/35d00e7dec01f902/cf93f07d2eaa6c55c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/35d00e7dec01f902/5e5c9fe9c0396981c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Excuses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Every day that we don’t act to stop climate change, expand Medicare, and invest in education and housing, the more our people and our planet will suffer.
#
Peter,
Some people in Washington D.C. want to make excuses. Democrats who want to label themselves as “moderates” block long-overdue relief to the working people of this country. **Peter, blocking action on climate change, health care, and universal childcare is simply not moderate.**
And this is urgent. Every day that we don’t act to stop climate change, expand Medicare, and invest in education and housing, the more our people and our planet will suffer.
My team let me know that our progressive fight ahead really needs some additional grassroots support before we hit the middle of the month (11:59 pm tomorrow night). [**We’re looking to bring in 250 small-dollar donations before the mid-month deadline — can you chip in $3 for our urgent, progressive fight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210914?refcode=em20210914-634&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=634_420207_tUPIOE&akid=634%2E420207%2EtUPIOE)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210914?refcode=em20210914-634&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=634_420207_tUPIOE&akid=634%2E420207%2EtUPIOE)**
The status quo isn’t working for most of us. While the biggest corporations in America unleash a lobbying blitz to try to stop a corporate tax increase, I’m in the halls of Congress doing everything I can to deliver for folks who need relief.
Wall Street and Big Pharma should not have more influence in our democracy than working people. That’s another big reason why this fight is so urgent. We need to stand up and serve the interests of the people — not a few CEOs and billionaires. $3.5 trillion of investments in our people and our planet is a huge first step.
[**So,****Peter, can you help fuel my work to win progressive change? We need 250 grassroots contributions before tomorrow night, so I’m counting on you to help us get it done.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210914?refcode=em20210914-634&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=634_420207_tUPIOE&akid=634%2E420207%2EtUPIOE)
I think you know this by now Peter, but I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs. While so-called moderates and corporations try to stop our policies, I’m right there fighting with you and for you every step of the way.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210914-634-footer&t=23&refcode2=634_420207_tUPIOE&akid=634%2E420207%2EtUPIOE)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=634%2E420207%2EtUPIOE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=634%2E420207%2EtUPIOE)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: if we fall behind, everyone will see
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**The good news** is that there’s still a bit of time before our official FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close and we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers.
**The bad news** is that we have started out this month very slowly in terms of individual donations.
Let us put this information in context.
From September 1, 2019 to September 13, 2019 we had more than 15,000 individual donations.
From September 1, 2021 to September 13, 2021 we have just over 10,000 donations. Not great.
We have to close this gap. And it’s why we launched an Emergency Mid-Month Fundraising Drive. But time is running out:
[**Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to help re-elect Mark Kelly to the U.S. Senate? He needs you today to help keep up.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210914-2-subs&t=1&refcode2=1320_6688874_YOd3im&akid=1320%2E6688874%2EYOd3im)
These numbers are not arbitrary. If we fall behind and our numbers go public, everyone will see and the outside spending will only increase.
So thank you for chipping in.
Team Kelly
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210914-2-subs&t=2&refcode2=1320_6688874_YOd3im&akid=1320%2E6688874%2EYOd3im)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1320%2E6688874%2EYOd3im).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: CNN is trying to tank my campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
CNN knows that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year’s midterm elections. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=71f8b4d8f3c54a34820a6ee6f116408e&_e=7P2UUt7K-gCfclc6_S_T8BWYxtHSXBtdiZFto9YA4v8lIAi_zm7JXfzx1_KogWBz7jeFntaHp0lWz02FRbKsyhUfFh1ShaRwzAvLB17IE8rdQKNXFssEAqWMfbxeW-340upO-IM28ZR6a0xM3-qiljamBLSbkhKWtsxLcX1CfW_a9DbsA6ueI-zubpSx_4ixwaA0Lf8vGIUPgBD0iOVQM_kiKrjBrELUvhH1n1EwSxbXq6TNUAdMAq99pQvCvwd3pdbDEhplbi8bb6T7IOjitA2Yt9O1S3bSik8Fi8dYrlQnRzPePL-g4fuOi51bATZ5rnIZIuIv9Q4IKLyPALTtgpVXhSSpkz2JGCWbEdT-BogpsVNL_1nvLIqvgW0-Sf0i5Gykg0NE6c4w5xNgMFMkQukzxH6A38tXHhOCPdXqmVbHxcsuoXtgWnTE2aV8fb1k7XW5eK0q_99Oa0_Lo5UgZ3Uuk_3BE0zO2KmbpNHCqGA%3D)

---
Fellow American,

I knew it was only a matter of time before left-leaning news networks would start attempting to slander our campaign at every possible opportunity.

CNN has stepped into the role they've come to embrace over the years: The Democrat Party's mouthpiece. _Recently they published a story about me that couldn't be further from the truth._

The truth is that Democrats - including the top executives at CNN - know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections.

**Fellow American, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy.**

My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. **[Can I count on you to help us ensure we hit our goal before midnight with a gift of $10, $25, $100- or even my favorite number, $34!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=71f8b4d8f3c54a34820a6ee6f116408e&_e=7P2UUt7K-gCfclc6_S_T8BWYxtHSXBtdiZFto9YA4v8lIAi_zm7JXfzx1_KogWBz7jeFntaHp0lWz02FRbKsyhUfFh1ShaRwzAvLB17IE8rdQKNXFssEAqWMfbxeW-340upO-IM28ZR6a0xM3-qiljamBLSbkhKWtsxLcX1CfW_a9DbsA6ueI-zubpSx_4ixwaA0Lf8vGIUPgBD0iOVQM_kiKrjBrELUvhH1n1EwSxbXq6TNUAdMAq99pQvCvwd3pdbDEhplbi8bb6T7IOjitJDMyAE_-bFfpZn_D82sv25cU4zr607q_bjoUiZ9E2xve63a-EHO1kRFvzpWhXMleJEb6Gx-E7klet8meskqKGjvdifsi5lb4VSyyaEQ9lpuQz6FPWKK8Ec_mQg-hHsZuLQP0MTR6kawsvRxHDsOfiYIrMN58Qba8zOX3AwNJ2RRCiaGKakbc_8J_d5QxLG-kbCzeyIrB9ZILv5GA7mXHxA%3D)**

[** STAND WITH ME AGAINST THE LIBERAL MEDIA -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=71f8b4d8f3c54a34820a6ee6f116408e&_e=7P2UUt7K-gCfclc6_S_T8BWYxtHSXBtdiZFto9YA4v8lIAi_zm7JXfzx1_KogWBz7jeFntaHp0lWz02FRbKsyhUfFh1ShaRwzAvLB17IE8rdQKNXFssEAqWMfbxeW-340upO-IM28ZR6a0xM3-qiljamBLSbkhKWtsxLcX1CfW_a9DbsA6ueI-zubpSx_4ixwaA0Lf8vGIUPgBD0iOVQM_kiKrjBrELUvhH1n1EwSxbXq6TNUAdMAq99pQvCvwd3pdbDEhplbi8bb6T7IOjitG6MISvaIUvNAx7amme25Xc00VHCqb_W9OFW9o9U7HhIqaaw_rzPWd-_yCTZ17sKjujGk1nFlHML7FiEn8YJ26E8Ivt886bwkH3QG2LdsduiTmjJ_kXmTwORg3EHNd7qS00-BsOPZ9KVhWJ4VeplqF20HTHa_2aZS3e_C2xB4aX91fNAH0_t8oHcvKtN5e1BKGbmkaFq1RTCyJFAdOiLIsI%3D)
When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on - or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way.

I chose the latter because the future of our country - and the future of Georgia - is too important to sit on the sidelines.

clean_body: CNN knows that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year’s midterm elections. | Fellow American, I knew it was only a matter of time before left-leaning news networks would start attempting to slander our campaign at every possible opportunity. CNN has stepped into the role they've come to embrace over the years: The Democrat Party's mouthpiece. Recently they published a story about me that couldn't be further from the truth. The truth is that Democrats - including the top executives at CNN - know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections. Fellow American, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy. My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on - or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way. I chose the latter because the future of our country - and the future of Georgia - is too important to sit on the sidelines. Democrats know there is not a more critical Senate race than the one in Georgia, Fellow American, that's why the attacks on me are going to be constant between now and November 2022. We've got to be ready for anything. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Nice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Today marks exactly 420 days until Election Day 2022.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210914-2636-header&t=1&akid=2636%2E434096%2E4hqcVS)
Today is a _*reeeeaaally*_ special day for our campaign. Do you know why?
Well, Peter, we're about to tell you...
**Today marks exactly 420 days until Election Day 2022 — the day we can officially make John Fetterman our next U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania!**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30039?refcode=em20210914-2636&t=2&akid=2636%2E434096%2E4hqcVS)
[**_Peter, will you donate $42, $4.20, or anything you can to help celebrate this momentous day and build the strong, honest, and inclusive campaign it will take to elect John Fetterman to fight for us in the U.S. Senate?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30039?refcode=em20210914-2636&t=3&akid=2636%2E434096%2E4hqcVS)
**[Donate $4.20](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30043?refcode=em20210914-2636&t=8&akid=2636%2E434096%2E4hqcVS)**
To this day, most candidates shy away from making legal weed a central part of their platform. Even most Democrats! But John isn't exactly your cookie-cutter politician...
John Fetterman understands that legal weed means more revenue, jobs, justice, and freedom. He sees how it will benefit our farmers, veterans, and small businesses. **And most of all, he sees it as a vital chance to expunge all bogus marijuana records and release all those incarcerated for using the plant.**
Plus, the people agree! Legal weed is supported by nearly 70% of Americans.
[**_We hope you'll help John + our team celebrate this big day. Will you chip in $42, $5, or $4.20 to help elect John to the U.S. Senate, where he'll be one of the loudest (and tbh, probably the tallest) voices for legal weed in Pennsylvania and nationwide? We wouldn't ask if it weren't so important._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30039?refcode=em20210914-2636&t=9&akid=2636%2E434096%2E4hqcVS)
Thanks for fighting for marijuana justice alongside John.
— All of us at Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. John hasn't had to "evolve" on his core issues like legal weed like some other politicians have. Because where he stands today is where he's _always_ stood. [** _If that's the kind of leader you want fighting for you, please chip in for the first time today — any amount will go a long way in our fight to elect John to the U.S. Senate._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30039?refcode=em20210914-2636&t=10&akid=2636%2E434096%2E4hqcVS)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210914-2636-footer&t=11&refcode2=2636_434096_4hqcVS&akid=2636%2E434096%2E4hqcVS)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=12&akid=2636%2E434096%2E4hqcVS)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=2636%2E434096%2E4hqcVS)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | I don't have much time.

\-- Trump has resumed his horrifying political rallies to rally his base.
\-- He's threatened to run for President if Republicans retake the House.
\-- And he's suggested Republicans can retake the Senate, too!

There's no easy way to say this: [**Trump and his Republicans are plotting a COMPLETE takeover -- and they have a whopping $102 MILLION in the bank to pull it off. I 'm calling for an OVERWHELMING surge of Democrats to spring into action, help me defend our House Majority, and STOP Republicans from buying their way back to power. I'm calling for 4,500 gifts before my Mid Month Deadline in 24 hours. Can I count on your $3 to protect my House Democrats? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)
| [MID MONTH DEADLINE: 9/15, 11:59PM
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.)

---

I need you to understand what's at stake in this moment:

\-- We can either let this one-term President rally his base, funnel cash to Republicans, and help usher in a total GOP takeover...

\-- Or we can band together, have a MASSIVE Democratic fundraising surge, and watch this Republican plot completely **COLLAPSE**.

**[I will do everything I can to stop Republicans from defeating our House Majority and barging back into power. But I can't do this without you -- not when Trump and his Republicans are armed with $102 MILLION to destroy my House Democrats. Is there any way I could count on your $3 before my Mid Month Deadline tomorrow to defend our House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-)**

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: The truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Here's what I know to be true:

I know Wisconsin deserves better than a U.S. Senator who is so deep in the pockets of corporate interests that he continually sells us out to please his wealthy campaign donors. People are fed up with Ron Johnson's failed leadership -- that's why he has a 35% approval rating and _CNN_ is calling him the most vulnerable GOP incumbent.

I know this grassroots team has what it takes to go up against national Republicans and special interests to flip this Senate seat blue. I'm the only Democrat in this race who has won two statewide campaigns in Wisconsin, and with your help, I can do it again.

I know Wisconsin is our best chance to protect and expand our 50/50 Democratic Senate majority. Together, we're building a movement strong enough to stand up against whatever the Republicans throw our way in the months ahead.

But I also know everything can turn on a dime. Mitch McConnell's rolodex of mega-donors will do everything they can to undermine our campaign and keep this seat red next November. In fact, Ron Johnson and the Republicans are already attacking me directly, which means we need to be ready for anything.

**[Will you donate $5 or more before the FEC end-of-quarter deadline to help our campaign defeat Ron Johnson and flip Wisconsin's Senate seat blue? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35782440/306147076/-803653937?v=22_JfFpxQUk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmQ0YjVmOS1iZjE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ecx3KJJI4z8ihR1o5RxTtszRuFGtueLTePSopZpJIhs=&emci=44933dc5-b915-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=fbd4b5f9-bf15-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12523946) Friend, Everything is happening in real time. Mike was featured on The David Feldman show last night - [the video's right here. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35782441/306147077/-803653937?v=22_JfFpxQUk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmQ0YjVmOS1iZjE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ecx3KJJI4z8ihR1o5RxTtszRuFGtueLTePSopZpJIhs=&emci=44933dc5-b915-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=fbd4b5f9-bf15-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12523946)Mike comes on at the 2:00:00 mark, and he knocked it out the park. He'll definitely be back on the show more, as our friends Howie and Dave couldn't get enough of him. **Please share the video** with your friends and family! And as always, **please subscribe to our social media accounts **to get updates on recent interviews. | |
---
In other news, our incumbent opponent, Lou Correa, [has been busy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35782442/306147078/-1763494985?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmQ0YjVmOS1iZjE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ecx3KJJI4z8ihR1o5RxTtszRuFGtueLTePSopZpJIhs=) fighting against lowering prescription drug prices - [something that 86% of Americans support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35782443/306147079/116241144?e=e2c31a96d8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmQ0YjVmOS1iZjE1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ecx3KJJI4z8ihR1o5RxTtszRuFGtueLTePSopZpJIhs=) There isn't anywhere in the nation where you can get away with such a cruel and selfish (Lou takes some of the most money in Congress from Big Pharma) stance - and he's certainly not going to get away with it this election. The people of CA-46 and entire nation deserve better, and Mike's going to deliver on that.

Yours in solidarity,

clean_body: Your Support Is Lifting Us Up Mid-September Campaign Updates Listen to the recording of our first live interview! Friend, Everything is happening in real time. Mike was featured on The David Feldman show last night - comes on at the 2:00:00 mark, and he knocked it out the park. He'll definitely be back on the show more, as our friends Howie and Dave couldn't get enough of him. Please share the video with your friends and family! And as always, please subscribe to our social media accounts to get updates on recent interviews. | | In other news, our incumbent opponent, Lou Correa, = fighting against lowering prescription drug prices - = There isn't anywhere in the nation where you can get away with such a cruel and selfish (Lou takes some of the most money in Congress from Big Pharma) stance - and he's certainly not going to get away with it this election. The people of CA-46 and entire nation deserve better, and Mike's going to deliver on that. Yours in solidarity, Alex (Campaign Manager) | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Derek, we have **ZERO room for error.** With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell – and now, NBC News reports that the GOP is making Raphael a TOP target for defeat.

Thanks to Democrats' _razor-thin_ Senate majority, we've been able to make huge strides in defending voting rights, supporting working families and rebuilding our country's economy. **But the GOP is launching attack ads to smear Raphael and turn Georgia red – and if they're successful, we'll hand our majority to Mitch McConnell, and our entire progressive agenda will go up in smoke.**

Raphael Warnock is reaching out with an urgent message: Derek, we have ZERO room for error. With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell – and now, NBC News reports that the GOP is making Raphael a TOP target for defeat. Thanks to Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority, we've been able to make huge strides in defending voting rights, supporting working families and rebuilding our country's economy. But the GOP is launching attack ads to smear Raphael and turn Georgia red – and if they're successful, we'll hand our majority to Mitch McConnell, and our entire progressive agenda will go up in smoke. The only way we can fight back against Republican attacks and win this race is if grassroots supporters like you chip in now. But with so little time to go until our deadline, we're still falling short. So please, Derek, Raphael is counting on you: Thank you for your support in our fight for justice. – Team Warnock | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: John Castorani
subject: The headlines say it all ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
Remember what Pelosi famously said before Democrats passed Obamacare in 2010? For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=3141548ef99e4232bad89ed52892ab38&_t=2uYUoBLQtPPRPvCFgztEmAjzRBAQDL58WQ5i7TNxWHE5fgGpBLZ6jNVytiQspAv33jm11wLjqaaMbXO0Y3A2H3rCEe2QS9xTRqXOhxJmXLaw7lr0PWTFoxPZVTOqg8UFJtGsZzKBp1zxE7PD9GaNXEFWQjN1e8ZZTVjIcITa28s%3D) |

Fellow Conservative,

The headlines above say a lot about the unenviable positions moderate Democrats in the House find themselves in these days.

How much clout do they have? Do they stay silent? Or stand in protest against the authoritarian style leadership Nancy Pelosi and her lieutenants in the House operate by?

As it turns out - they do a whole lot of nothing.

They write letters protesting the hasty withdrawal from Afghanistan, and on occasion, have attempted – without success – to get Nancy Pelosi to negotiate the price tag of the $3.5 TRILLION spending package she’s about to ram through, despite the narrowest of majorities.

Remember what Pelosi famously said before Democrats passed Obamacare in 2010? ****We need to pass it first so the American people can find out what’s in it!** **

Well, ten years later and here we are again, Fellow Conservative. And the moderates, like my opponent Abigail Spanberger?**Well, she’ll end up voting for the socialist spending spree out of fear of Nancy Pelosi’s wrath**.

It doesn’t have to be this way. I know that with the right message, **[I can flip this district to the Republican column. Last year, Abigail’s opponent fell short by just 8,000 votes](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=3141548ef99e4232bad89ed52892ab38&_e=28EWMBdsVESBDaGY79in7k1esjx_Il-au4JM1IxXrYpk6RtFHwRXdzteFfndWzKQXksgAu3rY1zy5F-U61LbOeWVwgEdZLU8VjDGRUcYL0DlWr7YoXBNTrfEimmHv4UAKJ3jpJIF3vDuuFOJKXd8U6U0INYtjUmg8J1vZKDrmyJYdm924r0oN9zti1ZQz6_MCsgUeo17cMuwI-m2PPySnQBNyvEcI_JhPAe_l1UE8ym-4mJTz2jjgjhWP2V6cQXTY6I4Ca_7NF-vY7uFUqZY3tJQInmjKlMDwZycBlIjt0air-NAHk_O8QF2apjxdBmWxeA-dMKYlv_w4qTlHLkqMbVKMg8YS1rZ3mdxOSqq71OKQe-ZmSyXXRlcFzo2dkZNupii4U12--9HvTmWiWZXpkVY-XU6T6EvWdxzwFCtvSZbU9D7MAN6i6QuQUzlaFE2zdPEujK6CGDbPLWEBIv_Zj4637UGeBksv-nmwA2AeRCD0rWSv3F_o7k8kVEZQX9c)**.

name: Jayla Gilliam
subject: 3 things you should know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
It means everything to Erica to know that she can count on you when it matters the most.
#
Hi! It’s Jayla, Finance Director for Erica Smith.
**[Your first $5 contribution to our campaign today couldn’t come at a more urgent time.](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14782?refcode=em20210914-other-437&t=1&akid=437%2E3698%2EJZFpkV)** Here's why:
1. **There’s never been a more important time to elect a progressive Democrat like Erica to the U.S. Senate.** Change can’t wait, and Erica is the ONLY candidate in this race who supports a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and abolishing the filibuster.
2. **CNN analysts ranked North Carolina as one of the Top 10 U.S Senate Seats to flip in 2022.** Senator Richard Burr’s retirement is a golden, once-in-a-generation opportunity for progressive Democrats to flip a U.S. Senate seat and expand our razor-thin Senate majority.
3. **Our goal is to raise $15,000 online before the public FEC fundraising deadline on September 30 — and we need to raise $2,050 by midnight tomorrow to stay on track.** At the end of the month, Erica is required by federal law to report how much our campaign raised in the last three months. Reaching our $15,000 goal is critically important in showing the naysayers, our opponents, and the media that our campaign has what it takes to win.

A $5 contribution from you today will help us close our $2,050 fundraising gap and post the strongest FEC report possible at the end of the month. On top of that, it will make a huge, immediate, and direct impact on the success of our campaign. **So I have to ask:**
[**If you’re in a place to do so, will you make your first $5 contribution to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate? It means everything to Erica to know that she can count on you when it matters the most.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14782?refcode=em20210914-other-437&t=2&akid=437%2E3698%2EJZFpkV)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14782?refcode=em20210914-437&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=437%2E3698%2EJZFpkV)**
Thank you,
Jayla
Finance Director
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210914-437-footer&t=22&refcode2=437_3698_JZFpkV&akid=437%2E3698%2EJZFpkV)**

Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Tax the rich… explained 👗
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Let’s talk about it
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210914-2509-header&t=1&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl)
Every day is a good day to talk about taxing the rich.
Whether the message is on a [**sweatshirt**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10052?t=2&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl) or [**something more formal**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10053?t=3&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl) 👗, the facts are the same. Politicians spent the better part the last 40 years cutting taxes for the rich – expecting wealth to “trickle down” to the rest of us (spoiler alert: it doesn't).
In order to reshape our economy and make it work for all of us — not just those who can self-fund their trips to space — we absolutely must Tax the Rich. That’s why Alexandria has been pushing for higher taxes on the rich and large profitable corporations in the Build Back Better bill.
In case you get into a conversation today about what exactly we mean when we say “tax the rich,” here’s some more info to help you out:
### **So, why do we need to tax the rich?**
* **The super rich pay lower taxes than the poorest Americans.** The United States has a regressive tax system in which the richest people actually pay lower effective tax rates across all levels of government than the poorest people in our country. Seems hard to believe, right? But it’s true.1

* **Taxes on the rich are much lower than they used to be.** Check out this graph from _The New York Times_ comparing rates from 1950 to 2018.2

* **Two men — Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos — own more wealth than the bottom 40% of Americans combined.** 3

* **During the pandemic, U.S. billionaires saw their wealth go up 55% from $2.95 trillion to $4.56 trillion.** Just the gains they made over the last year of this pandemic alone could pay for almost 70% of Biden’s jobs plan.4

* **U.S. income inequality has returned to Gilded Age levels from the early 1900s.** Our inequality levels are the highest of all G7 countries (UK, Italy, Japan, Canada, Germany, France).5,6

* **CEOs at large companies in the U.S. now make an astonishing 264 times what the average U.S. worker makes.** 7 In 1989, the ratio was 58-to-1, and in 1965, it was 20-to-1.8

* **Polls show Americans don’t believe the rich pay their fair share, but Republicans keep lowering their taxes.** Gallup polls as far back as 1992 have shown that the vast majority of Americans want to tax the rich more.9 Even then, Presidents Bush and Trump pushed through massive tax breaks for the wealthiest Americans.

### Are you fired up and ready to tax the rich?
Good — because we can’t win this fight without grassroots activism and organizing. **If you know someone who might benefit from reading the facts above, please forward them this email.** When the rich finally pay their fair share, we can have the funds to provide universal Pre-K, transition our economy off of fossil fuels, rebuild our crumbling schools, and so much more.
Thanks for continuing the conversation,
– Team AOC
**P.S. You can also show your support with a "Tax the Rich" shirt or hoodie —** 100% of proceeds help fund Team AOC’s critical grassroots organizing and campaigning for policies like this one. [**Check out our “Tax the Rich” collection >>**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10052?t=4&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl)
* * *
1 - [New York Times
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8911?t=5&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl)2 - [New York Times](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8911?t=6&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl)
3 - [Bernie Sanders](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8912?t=7&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl)
4 - [Institute for Policy Studies](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8913?t=8&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl)
5 - [Pew Research](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8914?t=9&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl)
6 - [Inequality.org](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8915?t=10&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl)
7 - [Inequality.org](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8915?t=11&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl)
8 - [MarketWatch](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8916?t=12&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl)
9 - [Gallup](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8917?t=13&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210914-2509-P_OTH_EXP_TAX&t=14&refcode2=2509_2526796_qXJFXl&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210914-2509-P_OTH_EXP_TAX&t=15&akid=2509%2E2526796%2EqXJFXl)**

---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

**AS YOU KNOW, the Trump Patriot movement is unstoppable.** From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for President Trump. But only the most dedicated were invited to join the 1776 Donor Club: **including you!**

Will you decide to step up to the plate one more time for Trump and for America and renew your 1776 Donor Club Membership? **We are ONLY inviting our TOP Trump Patriots to re-up their status as a member.**

245 years ago, our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history: _**AMERICA**_. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. _**But now, those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

That's why we're asking top patriots, like yourself, to fight the good fight and keep America free from Pelosi's socialist agenda. We will not win this fight alone. We are depending on you to renew your membership...

body:

Fellow patriot,

Last week, a white woman in a gorilla mask threw an egg at a black man running for governor. Then, she and her friends verbally assaulted him and even physically attacked his staff.

The media, Democrat politicians, and Black Lives Matter activists **have completely ignored this.** No cries of racism -- _nothing_.

Why? Because that black man was **Larry Elder** - _a Republican._

**Apparently, hateful and violent acts aren't racist if they're aimed at Republicans.**

As a black Republican who served my country in the war in Afghanistan, I am appalled by the hyporcitical silence on this incident from those who would me losing their minds had Larry Elder been a Democrat.

**This proves that the ONLY thing they REALLY care about is their radical leftist agenda.**

These are the people in power here in California and America, [**and it's time for new conservative leadership.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e676a0a631e7414c8dce082f2d208dcd&_e=DRfqn1oXJObC6PUMExGUAkfTT_2qu_9UshmE3PkDIbM0ISCc7QJFPYqo_dmSp3EBVXX9r4d66Q6Fp5vw6tCxcX0DfA1U4j49qXsoqQFmCm7fq9MxhgDR5jQ4VBmYEHeMSNeyHUwgnJ4DoCLqlkrE9lJ7mmJ2ic4GnqohscTT4Te8BwuA6b43gaqXdpsJ9wAq2vnjUMtQU69BX4rK04B8XFsLCA_0Gxn-vGAe8RIdHmJmrQcJUB3KzuyYcObYaxiJq_-IlRKSrYbY3j_ENAkxGu04vA25Lyf-BxyWv4H__MeHCSQ96fkw9ez_usM2Dx2DpPeW6GUoAr9IiVUlc1N5TQfJImdBDfA5fflYco2klK9n6xNuYWcib0mc2wzhjHgClg3H_CPaKX6PJ63XCP0rKJWaqMIjYr1DhAgiHYs_wEvWtz_8WCla52Q0DfUrRxdc7nyJsnQeDXFsReHj5GxyOJEIAJ-NS5dieMuJ-AMZDH0%3D)

So, here's what you should do:

1. If you live in California, **make sure you vote to RECALL Gavin Newsom** in the recall election today. Getting rid of Gavin is the only way to fix our state.

2. [**I need your support**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e676a0a631e7414c8dce082f2d208dcd&_e=DRfqn1oXJObC6PUMExGUAkfTT_2qu_9UshmE3PkDIbM0ISCc7QJFPYqo_dmSp3EBVXX9r4d66Q6Fp5vw6tCxcX0DfA1U4j49qXsoqQFmCm7fq9MxhgDR5jQ4VBmYEHeMSNeyHUwgnJ4DoCLqlkrE9lJ7mmJ2ic4GnqohscTT4Te8BwuA6b43gaqXdpsJ9wAq2vnjUMtQU69BX4rK04B8XFsLCA_0Gxn-vGAe8RIdHmJmrQcJUB3KzuyYcObYaxiJq_-IlRKSrYbY3j_ENAkxGpaFWMnv6S2M9nXMvnXbaQ_SWtVJSxktOTGSYxtdmC94iF70pagTofsbcYQD2XNc6dAKA6f7i3YzwjPZAB9LJHyYcCikPzXR-RbMhHb8Y6RZ-MsJdQiAizyeV4Rl57j39VNXW4ftdUq98A3NYlokiuVXHcH-E7JZPjYRbjkPU4411IlWdWorYIiblhuV3Cr9X7i89uNFSjrfwuJ01hzNzWE%3D) in my run for Congress to defeat radical leftist **Katie Porter** in CA-45. Winning this swing seat is key to restoring a Republican House majority and being a check against Biden's failed leadership.

As a Navy combat veteran who served in Afghanistan, I have spent my life fighting for the Constitution I swore to uphold and defend.

Now, I want to take that same fighting spirit to the halls of Congress.

[**Will you chip in $10, $25, $50 to support my fight to defeat Katie Porter and give America the real leadership that we're sorely lacking and desperately need?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e676a0a631e7414c8dce082f2d208dcd&_e=DRfqn1oXJObC6PUMExGUAkfTT_2qu_9UshmE3PkDIbM0ISCc7QJFPYqo_dmSp3EBVXX9r4d66Q6Fp5vw6tCxcX0DfA1U4j49qXsoqQFmCm7fq9MxhgDR5jQ4VBmYEHeMSNeyHUwgnJ4DoCLqlkrE9lJ7mmJ2ic4GnqohscTT4Te8BwuA6b43gaqXdpsJ9wAq2vnjUMtQU69BX4rK04B8XFsLCA_0Gxn-vGAe8RIdHmJmrQcJUB3KzuyYcObYaxiJq_-IlRKSrYbY3j_ENAkxGsejXTnbteGh5_9i4xLmkCBxz1nzqdIrX9vaAU__4xY2PHJdThZvGOIGMLlGFkQxJSIaSCrCFzpo7HNLkjnHc2ZIO9oLrhcEAbK5la5FMrw7-2wnzAO6lkAZjjhw27BFdUnbMTml0qvXL-ZvqUQkn9NMSAvtMjEsAT5W-ad3WSQxKj8ybcZv2GcZY_qNfcpIfE5D_GrRTULBW_9jHqfPuAw%3D)

clean_body: Apparently, hateful and violent acts aren't racist if they're aimed at Republicans. | Fellow patriot, Last week, a white woman in a gorilla mask threw an egg at a black man running for governor. Then, she and her friends verbally assaulted him and even physically attacked his staff. The media, Democrat politicians, and Black Lives Matter activists have completely ignored this. No cries of racism -- nothing. Why? Because that black man was Larry Elder - a Republican. Apparently, hateful and violent acts aren't racist if they're aimed at Republicans. As a black Republican who served my country in the war in Afghanistan, I am appalled by the hyporcitical silence on this incident from those who would me losing their minds had Larry Elder been a Democrat. This proves that the ONLY thing they REALLY care about is their radical leftist agenda. These are the people in power here in California and America, So, here's what you should do: 1. If you live in California, make sure you vote to RECALL Gavin Newsom in the recall election today. Getting rid of Gavin is the only way to fix our state. 2. in my run for Congress to defeat radical leftist Katie Porter in CA-45. Winning this swing seat is key to restoring a Republican House majority and being a check against Biden's failed leadership. As a Navy combat veteran who served in Afghanistan, I have spent my life fighting for the Constitution I swore to uphold and defend. name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: We're still accepting questions!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
For a limited time, you can submit a question about anything to Beto.
#
Hi, I want to make sure you saw this message:
For a limited time, you can submit a question about anything to Beto — from voting rights to the Texas power grid, or even his Whataburger order. Over the next few weeks, we'll share some of his responses with you!
**Powered by People is working every day to expand access to our democracy, and we want you to be involved.[Please, submit your question to Beto by clicking here.](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/ask-beto-anything?source=em20210914&t=1&akid=153857%2E444211%2ExpXJn6)**
**[Submit a question »](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/ask-beto-anything?source=em20210914&t=2&akid=153857%2E444211%2ExpXJn6)**
Don't miss your chance to ask Beto about whatever is on your mind.
More soon,
Kate Roberts
Powered by People
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
Date: Fri, Sep 10, 2021
Subject: Ask Beto anything
_
Like our name suggests, Powered by People is focused on one thing: **Building the largest people-powered movement of voters Texas has ever seen.**
With the GOP's clear focus on voter suppression and restricting the rights of Texans, our democracy is in a perilous position, and we need everyone's involvement.
That's why Beto wants to hear from you! **So, today we're coming _directly_ to you to ask what questions you have for Beto.**
Curious how the recent passage of voter suppression legislation in Texas will impact your ability to vote? Want to learn more about the harmful GOP laws that went into effect this month? Or maybe you've been waiting for the chance to ask Beto about joining the fight for our democracy?
**No matter the question, we want to hear it![Please, submit your question to Beto here. We'll follow up with Beto's answers over the next few weeks.](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/ask-beto-anything?source=em20210914&t=3&akid=153857%2E444211%2ExpXJn6)**
**[Submit a question »](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/ask-beto-anything?source=em20210914&t=4&akid=153857%2E444211%2ExpXJn6)**
Beto is doing his best to knock on every door in Texas — including in counties that are often cast off as low turnout — and meet every resident he can because we believe politics should be inclusive. **Our work is about including as many people as possible in our democracy so we can fight for the change we want to see in Texas.**
**[Please, ask Beto a question today. We can't wait to hear what's on your mind!](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/ask-beto-anything?source=em20210914&t=5&akid=153857%2E444211%2ExpXJn6)**
Together,
Powered by People

**[Donate »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44727?refcode=ema20210914-153857&t=6&akid=153857%2E444211%2ExpXJn6)**

subject: FIRED UP! READY TO GO! We must defend this House!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Are you [_**FIRED UP**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pNSW9EBIw5UhDkFK65MJ7HaHxMX7ZCCxFvwEEjHpLaU=/1SjYNC7ZgfY_LOj0Q2CcRoPP7Zom1cjJ0JyeyuDUqvY=)? Are you [_**READY TO GO**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pNSW9EBIw5UhDkFK65MJ7HaHxMX7ZCCxFvwEEjHpLaU=/1SjYNC7ZgfY_LOj0Q2CcRoPP7Zom1cjJ0JyeyuDUqvY=)?

This week, Taking the Hill begins our [_**FINAL phase**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pNSW9EBIw5UhDkFK65MJ7HaHxMX7ZCCxFvwEEjHpLaU=/1SjYNC7ZgfY_LOj0Q2CcRoPP7Zom1cjJ0JyeyuDUqvY=) of the 2022 Election when we announce our FIRST US House endorsement of the cycle! It is critical that we win this phase and hold the House - Republicans only need to flip 5 seats for a majority. And we lived through that once - [_**we are not going back again.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pNSW9EBIw5UhDkFK65MJ7HaHxMX7ZCCxFvwEEjHpLaU=/1SjYNC7ZgfY_LOj0Q2CcRoPP7Zom1cjJ0JyeyuDUqvY=)

[_**We cannot afford to lose!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pNSW9EBIw5UhDkFK65MJ7HaHxMX7ZCCxFvwEEjHpLaU=/1SjYNC7ZgfY_LOj0Q2CcRoPP7Zom1cjJ0JyeyuDUqvY=) In order to show our candidates the support they need, [_**we need to raise $10,000 this week. Will you be a part of our veteran- and military family-led movement to HOLD THIS HOUSE?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pNSW9EBIw5UhDkFK65MJ7HaHxMX7ZCCxFvwEEjHpLaU=/1SjYNC7ZgfY_LOj0Q2CcRoPP7Zom1cjJ0JyeyuDUqvY=)

_To break down why this is important:_
* [_**$10 helps us reach 20 voters by mail**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pNSW9EBIw5UhDkFK65MJ7HaHxMX7ZCCxFvwEEjHpLaU=/1SjYNC7ZgfY_LOj0Q2CcRoPP7Zom1cjJ0JyeyuDUqvY=)
* [_**$100 helps us reach 250 voters door-to-door**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pNSW9EBIw5UhDkFK65MJ7HaHxMX7ZCCxFvwEEjHpLaU=/1SjYNC7ZgfY_LOj0Q2CcRoPP7Zom1cjJ0JyeyuDUqvY=)
* [_**$500 helps us reach 5,000 voters by radio**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pNSW9EBIw5UhDkFK65MJ7HaHxMX7ZCCxFvwEEjHpLaU=/1SjYNC7ZgfY_LOj0Q2CcRoPP7Zom1cjJ0JyeyuDUqvY=)
* [_**$1,000 or more helps us reach an extra 20,000 voters with TV or digital ad buys**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pNSW9EBIw5UhDkFK65MJ7HaHxMX7ZCCxFvwEEjHpLaU=/1SjYNC7ZgfY_LOj0Q2CcRoPP7Zom1cjJ0JyeyuDUqvY=)

All hands on deck! [_**Chipping in early**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pNSW9EBIw5UhDkFK65MJ7HaHxMX7ZCCxFvwEEjHpLaU=/1SjYNC7ZgfY_LOj0Q2CcRoPP7Zom1cjJ0JyeyuDUqvY=) is how we win the House!

Stay tuned this week for our first House endorsements of 2022!

[_**Fired up**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pNSW9EBIw5UhDkFK65MJ7HaHxMX7ZCCxFvwEEjHpLaU=/1SjYNC7ZgfY_LOj0Q2CcRoPP7Zom1cjJ0JyeyuDUqvY=) + [_**ready to go**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pNSW9EBIw5UhDkFK65MJ7HaHxMX7ZCCxFvwEEjHpLaU=/1SjYNC7ZgfY_LOj0Q2CcRoPP7Zom1cjJ0JyeyuDUqvY=) with you,
Roger

name: Herschel Walker
subject: CNN is trying to tank my campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
CNN knows that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year’s midterm elections. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=dcd8cc6a8c694e31bf2bc2d700843924&_e=EbCZShc651_ISOFkiZsicP5oeMWFUInRgD4jXawSiqHwpwpsScCSi8wT69PbTyr5TIuOSTYUNpZJ3dz_8nflvBt0ow9-cv6Tqb0xILquSqdY9gBGEizwJA_TadIM1a9XTnVyLQ_3us7fXLMTwzD_eUD21w0JZoCurKRz4iW0s1ka2ScYo_sqB-SyO4aRIiQOK-PFTstgdCSg4MYn3YyefbQLaCHiRyQjLcN-G_rLi37C7r7jezknV5qRJ_0rMop3jhVpISggO8fWZ2zf_pmZmoAatNx7piuNJQhjebf0pn2gBpKebzFOnCrqTmoirV-VHHh4hqq3ChMlr-VCeJV8mIzhWPLcOsa5QgxBUcaltp_GmEhhPta4VzRu81VnBaIWYhMIOpaBtejyKRQ3QPcSNmGJSaNjGkZyPZjBeDo0cHt5nJhztMP8jrnSxMxov5WNtxCoYq_qjQKKqx8XFh8Elw%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

I knew it was only a matter of time before left-leaning news networks would start attempting to slander our campaign at every possible opportunity.

CNN has stepped into the role they've come to embrace over the years: The Democrat Party's mouthpiece. _Recently they published a story about me that couldn't be further from the truth._

The truth is that Democrats - including the top executives at CNN - know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections.

**Peter, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy.**

My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. **[Can I count on you to help us ensure we hit our goal before midnight with a gift of $10, $25, $100- or even my favorite number, $34!](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=dcd8cc6a8c694e31bf2bc2d700843924&_e=EbCZShc651_ISOFkiZsicP5oeMWFUInRgD4jXawSiqHwpwpsScCSi8wT69PbTyr5TIuOSTYUNpZJ3dz_8nflvBt0ow9-cv6Tqb0xILquSqdY9gBGEizwJA_TadIM1a9XTnVyLQ_3us7fXLMTwzD_eUD21w0JZoCurKRz4iW0s1ka2ScYo_sqB-SyO4aRIiQOK-PFTstgdCSg4MYn3YyefbQLaCHiRyQjLcN-G_rLi37C7r7jezknV5qRJ_0rMop3M1MmFk4EygMeLuDQxCvR0EZcJfeOTblrDpijOMuCINAOCaG3Fizd9ooCcZQS0X_846xrqQ4AE0z5pY1CdBdgMdtA_RsJRjqwM7dhDEoePY5s7586jWYdstXJAFK7KuonnUGsEiHut1CZBGXx_bp1LR2MrfHBT_VDl6z9ZpZSL8Ww728y7N1UErRBEPI8oPJZ_s_5fhfuUZN50zT-Bn6awQ%3D%3D)**

[** STAND WITH ME AGAINST THE LIBERAL MEDIA -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=dcd8cc6a8c694e31bf2bc2d700843924&_e=EbCZShc651_ISOFkiZsicP5oeMWFUInRgD4jXawSiqHwpwpsScCSi8wT69PbTyr5TIuOSTYUNpZJ3dz_8nflvBt0ow9-cv6Tqb0xILquSqdY9gBGEizwJA_TadIM1a9XTnVyLQ_3us7fXLMTwzD_eUD21w0JZoCurKRz4iW0s1ka2ScYo_sqB-SyO4aRIiQOK-PFTstgdCSg4MYn3YyefbQLaCHiRyQjLcN-G_rLi37C7r7jezknV5qRJ_0rMop30R4PJTHBPEfCA23clajJyNX5-iYcFqwgM0cTYHZv8lKdFNqRkGegNMHdT1wzQONN_kBVelGaYiT0eWO_bVELwErH09-_glD7x_pPVBse4r8yFNK0iQ1g3UDgg_ZyDr7PmgHgWxZ0sOj0PO_namzIuN-id-JmbrSlG8YoL0o7TlsZyS8IYVSd8Sk3QKyBeO4apEpVHkdclJVa_ktr46bCdQ%3D%3D)
When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on - or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way.

I chose the latter because the future of our country - and the future of Georgia - is too important to sit on the sidelines.

**[You would be doing me a great honor if you would support our campaign to take back the Senate with a contribution today.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=dcd8cc6a8c694e31bf2bc2d700843924&_e=EbCZShc651_ISOFkiZsicP5oeMWFUInRgD4jXawSiqHwpwpsScCSi8wT69PbTyr5TIuOSTYUNpZJ3dz_8nflvBt0ow9-cv6Tqb0xILquSqdY9gBGEizwJA_TadIM1a9XTnVyLQ_3us7fXLMTwzD_eUD21w0JZoCurKRz4iW0s1ka2ScYo_sqB-SyO4aRIiQOK-PFTstgdCSg4MYn3YyefbQLaCHiRyQjLcN-G_rLi37C7r7jezknV5qRJ_0rMop3MnoCRURPnSBEqZJeJgloy-BOKRv-WNy66L4tm05RnFWRwd-yxyrTcn58pSHENJcMJ_DzVR7V6-YvmtaULnMrZPrGv4QKftQy17xTVJE9ZRPZEDpXwueG2SdaD7_eJJAZZkbMpmVmn1NVOT4SIlTxdD-epsut_UIwWe0d4qq6GJSKWRip6Jws0TPp6heDTCceQUyE250RFdwt3RdFddAZzA%3D%3D)**

Democrats know there is not a more critical Senate race than the one in Georgia, Peter, that's why the attacks on me are going to be constant between now and November 2022.

We've got to be ready for anything.

Thank you,

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=dcd8cc6a8c694e31bf2bc2d700843924&_e=EbCZShc651_ISOFkiZsicP5oeMWFUInRgD4jXawSiqHwpwpsScCSi8wT69PbTyr5TIuOSTYUNpZJ3dz_8nflvBt0ow9-cv6Tqb0xILquSqdY9gBGEizwJA_TadIM1a9XTnVyLQ_3us7fXLMTwzD_eUD21w0JZoCurKRz4iW0s1ka2ScYo_sqB-SyO4aRIiQOK-PFTstgdCSg4MYn3YyefbQLaCHiRyQjLcN-G_rLi37C7r7jezknV5qRJ_0rMop3BnghvW3_AQf1nmj4co3K81u72pb94s1Oh9RtVigYFnjrwP7JCORueFSUJGusMx6cHEEBIuw9I3WJVI6kUIG0w1NiKHJeA8iJFi32aTUvX1_c7CgjMsmCS55v3JhCQdslGt9zyG7H8sCrC250yJnrKJwoqhrIpbI8UCvxAvru0Q2QPx9W7CBgeUQhaKgDFGwE_mks09N6k8qk9pdATw5oMA%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=dcd8cc6a8c694e31bf2bc2d700843924&_e=EbCZShc651_ISOFkiZsicP5oeMWFUInRgD4jXawSiqHwpwpsScCSi8wT69PbTyr5TIuOSTYUNpZJ3dz_8nflvBt0ow9-cv6Tqb0xILquSqdY9gBGEizwJA_TadIM1a9XTnVyLQ_3us7fXLMTwzD_eUD21w0JZoCurKRz4iW0s1ka2ScYo_sqB-SyO4aRIiQOK-PFTstgdCSg4MYn3YyefbQLaCHiRyQjLcN-G_rLi37C7r7jezknV5qRJ_0rMop3_i2qDILF29GcHRCP5ZkNaT5rtp898WytjpZJpG664fnN3bw311e_GUGM9REhLN-Oty0KELwIZVnJ8R9-JfKV7wkAyS0snfAz728-VEjvvFmhUizIY7YlrK12tU0an5RaBT7ku4v71AZBH3gebBLuFW8xWzo2xd1lvoRT63qYM_mNGomENoNUU_OUyqLzBQlYev2Mcvo8JDDeOC1JulxTvA%3D%3D)

[

My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on - or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way. I chose the latter because the future of our country - and the future of Georgia - is too important to sit on the sidelines. Democrats know there is not a more critical Senate race than the one in Georgia, Peter, that's why the attacks on me are going to be constant between now and November 2022. We've got to be ready for anything. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

clean_body: bumping this one last time | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. WE TOLD YOU: Trump’s Postmaster General is sabotaging the USPS and slowing our mail delivery. WE TOLD YOU: Trump’s crooks would LOVE to make sure Cresco post offices CLOSE for good! AND WE TOLD YOU: We need data to prove Democrats in Cresco LOVE our post office! So we’re giving you a one-time 12 hour extension to give your thoughts on the USPS: | | | | | | | | | We really appreciate your response! Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you.
