name: Team Ryan
subject: Will you put 43614 on the map?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=859%2E3611125%2ETiCy2C ][IMG]

Folks,

Every dot on this map represents an Ohioan who contributed to Tim’s
campaign this year -- isn’t that a powerful sight?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2723?t=1007&akid=859%2E3611125%2ETiCy2C ]Zipcode map

Tim’s been working hard to build a grassroots movement that resonates with
folks in every corner of Ohio -- from Greenville to Columbus to Marietta.
And if this map is any indication, it’s working.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2723?t=1008&akid=859%2E3611125%2ETiCy2C ]So, we’re reaching out today to see if you will put 43614 on
the map? Add a donation to our campaign today and we’ll put your dot on
the map:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2723?t=1009&akid=859%2E3611125%2ETiCy2C ]Put 43614 on the map

Our records indicate that you haven’t donated yet to Tim’s campaign, and
we get it -- not everyone can donate every time we send an email. But if
there were ever a time to donate, it’s now.

The FEC quarter ends this month and once our report goes public, we need
to make sure our numbers show that we have what it takes to flip this seat
blue -- and that Tim has supporters from every zip code in Ohio.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2723?t=1010&akid=859%2E3611125%2ETiCy2C ]We’ll be sharing our updated donation map with Tim this week. So, what
do you say, can you chip in today and put 43614 on the map?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2723?t=1011&akid=859%2E3611125%2ETiCy2C ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2724?t=1012&akid=859%2E3611125%2ETiCy2C ]Donate $50

-- Team Ryan

P.S. If you have donated to our campaign, don’t worry! We have your
donation. Sometimes it takes a while for our records to update and we
appreciate your support.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=859%2E3611125%2ETiCy2C ][IMG]

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

subject: URGENT: Your monthly foreign policy briefing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin |
body:
As the fallout from President Biden’s exit from Afghanistan worsens, Mike is doing everything in his power to get answers... Friend, As the fallout from President Biden’s exit from Afghanistan continues to worsen, Mike has been holding the administration accountable for repeatedly lying to the American people. While Biden retreats, the Chinese Communist Party is rapidly acting to expand its power in the region.
_Check out all the top foreign policy headlines and_ _join Mike’s call for Dr. Fauci to resign over lying about funding the Wuhan lab!_ **[WATCH]**[**REP. body:
Before midnight tonight, I need to raise an additional $3,500 toward my September End-Of-Quarter fundraising goal. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=0bb9e35c33d74b078c18677f7a291aed&_e=ZfUwm49SpCKMqhu1adBC38_GoQ_WkwBABW1YR5WoAX2vaNvFvXNySoJbSXYuwo6yO_GU2HN7liUrvNLUz7hA51TsasSNiR4EUVj_OY3Ulwp5q5hlMyI3N293ykce_jJXUc8yYChy61PrBNkB332EM1XVJQ6E_X93H45v0rHr5kcmnuDVV9oj8D6H2Uu0l768dPLjvFuZ1syPL_vr6O2dkVYU09wL4j-a728BmwacE1V-6V0inDXDhFs_1EoYWt092d5hm-pJhyvSXCemZ-TpiOWr-qJuHaN9pHYJBzepVNFCkp0SmPfg1jQXUQuGEkJbZNNP_tQVXXJ6XBdYlbfAKPwaWofer2BypFdIi-yhSUwz9msZWO9oDOnusHt_3m0VoVGWBXcp9lV2nI52oMPZ6Q48bGbxJd_SPF_ap8MSYWurwjSPvUGsUYt2y2Z-cU1loQ_67t_miWAAn8kTIrjJBg%3D%3D)

Peter,

Here is hoping that you had a nice weekend.

Today, as I do every Monday, I was looking over weekend fundraising numbers with my campaign manager and noticed we didn't make as much headway as I hoped we would.

_**Why does this matter to you?**_

Because the House and Senate are barreling toward passing some of the biggest tax increases in history – with only Democrat support - and without giving the American public so much as a month to scrutinize their complete makeover of American society.

**I could give you $3.5 trillion reasons to lend me a helping hand this Monday** , but in the interest of time I’ll just give you one: Democrats have a narrow 5 seat Majority in the House; **I can win the race against Oregon’s Peter DeFazio and help catapult Republicans to the House Majority**.

[**But I need your help today.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=0bb9e35c33d74b078c18677f7a291aed&_e=ZfUwm49SpCKMqhu1adBC38_GoQ_WkwBABW1YR5WoAX2vaNvFvXNySoJbSXYuwo6yO_GU2HN7liUrvNLUz7hA51TsasSNiR4EUVj_OY3Ulwp5q5hlMyI3N293ykce_jJXUc8yYChy61PrBNkB332EM1XVJQ6E_X93H45v0rHr5kcmnuDVV9oj8D6H2Uu0l768dPLjvFuZ1syPL_vr6O2dkVYU09wL4j-a728BmwacE1V-6V0inDXDhFs_1EoYWt09V37CQWsjSd6_-7uGLYkgXcte53upuTbI9L_-YtmD7rQLhObMphqyqGDRaaN2FPi6WoQs3b1CD8ov1bCwyV-DFPvBwhl3ZBVZCekG1MoajFQ41pLzLd_9g-6SZA_lmBgLIWhpZD1AJN-qH52rD0KKTksnuQUmoJk6NdIvKyZrV8a7PmUZyenmcJXL21kqBzJI79O7bZiczEGEuNZE4R67vg%3D%3D)

**Last week I wrote to you laying out what needed to happen before September 30th to meet our quarterly fundraising goal of $250,000**. Today, I’m writing to update you on where things stand:
* **Over the weekend** we raised $11,534

* Which leaves me with **$59,526 left** to raise before September 30th

* Meaning I**have to raise $3,500 every day** between now and then to hit my quarterly goal

[**HELP ME HIT MY 3RD QUARTER FUNDRAISING GOAL
CHIP IN $4 -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=0bb9e35c33d74b078c18677f7a291aed&_e=ZfUwm49SpCKMqhu1adBC38_GoQ_WkwBABW1YR5WoAX2vaNvFvXNySoJbSXYuwo6yO_GU2HN7liUrvNLUz7hA51TsasSNiR4EUVj_OY3Ulwp5q5hlMyI3N293ykce_jJXUc8yYChy61PrBNkB332EM1XVJQ6E_X93H45v0rHr5kcmnuDVV9oj8D6H2Uu0l768dPLjvFuZ1syPL_vr6O2dkVYU09wL4j-a728BmwacE1V-6V0inDXDhFs_1EoYWt09xKPq4arbtTWguEVq8lGo6EK9qwtXk9Pndf2wobBIY9EbXjnRPLug-eslbEaQ6Cz8W_Yk5YcZirs63ZNYGfJqOQAhsBH9V62qhTeRMaFZnSJJ_fNb3BADI52CzceG6FJLV0vZMadyPf9Jze7KLM46M2kV8GolMMyDLtp5i5O6c1pCz4SpUzOVT4uQtFvhN372Mu2tRpBfqV3N5NCMJWxO3w%3D%3D)

With sincere thanks

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world.
